_foundation.title: 虚拟机生命周期基础:创建、修改资源、删除与 Job 轮询
_foundation.code:
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# DefineSystem 创建第二代虚拟机 (OUT 参数为 ResultingSystem):
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_x'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null); if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
# 遍历 VM -> VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData:
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|select -First 1
$proc=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData')|select -First 1
# 修改单个资源:
$proc.VirtualQuantity=[uint64]2; $r2=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings($proc.GetText(1))
# 修改整机设置: $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
# 添加资源:     $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH,@($rasd.GetText(1)))
# 删除虚拟机:
$rc=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rc.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $rc.Job|Out-Null}
notes: 嵌入实例统一使用 GetText(1) 序列化为文本后作为参数传入。
DefineSystem 的 OUT 参数名为 ResultingSystem，而非 DefinedSystem。
ModifyResourceSettings 修改单个资源；ModifySystemSettings 修改整机设置；AddResourceSettings 添加资源。
返回值 4096 表示 Job 已启动，需轮询 Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState（7=完成，8/9/10=失败）。
安全相关设置由 Msvm_SecurityService 提供，不在虚拟系统管理服务中处理。
_foundation.title_en: Virtual Machine Lifecycle Fundamentals: Creation, Resource Modification, Deletion, and Job Polling
notes_en: An embedded instance is uniformly serialized to text with GetText(1) before being passed as an argument.
The OUT parameter of DefineSystem is named ResultingSystem, not DefinedSystem.
ModifyResourceSettings modifies a single resource; ModifySystemSettings modifies the whole-system settings; AddResourceSettings adds a resource.
A return value of 4096 indicates that an asynchronous job has been started, which requires polling Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState (7=completed, 8/9/10=failed).
Security-related settings are provided by Msvm_SecurityService and are not handled by the virtual system management service.
_foundation.code_en:
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# DefineSystem creates a generation 2 VM (the OUT parameter is ResultingSystem):
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_x'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null); if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
# Traverse VM -> VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData:
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|select -First 1
$proc=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData')|select -First 1
# Modify a single resource:
$proc.VirtualQuantity=[uint64]2; $r2=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings($proc.GetText(1))
# Modify the whole-system settings: $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
# Add a resource:                   $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH,@($rasd.GetText(1)))
# Delete the VM:
$rc=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rc.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $rc.Job|Out-Null}

add_dvd.title: 为虚拟机添加合成 DVD 驱动器
notes: 合成 DVD 对应 Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData，ResourceType=16，ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic DVD Drive'。
DVD 驱动器必须挂在控制器下。第二代虚拟机使用 SCSI 控制器（Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic SCSI Controller）；新建的空第二代虚拟机默认不含 SCSI 控制器，须先 AddResourceSettings 添加一个，再将 DVD 的 Parent 指向该控制器。

获取模板 RASD 的推荐方式：从 Primordial=true 的 Msvm_ResourcePool（按 ResourceSubType 过滤）-> GetRelated('Msvm_AllocationCapabilities') -> REFERENCES OF ... Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities，取 ValueRole=0（Default）的 PartComponent。
添加资源调用 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.AddResourceSettings($vssd.__PATH, @($rasd.GetText(1)))；OUT 参数 ResultingResourceSettings 为新资源路径数组；返回值 0 表示同步成功，4096 表示 Job 已启动。
DVD 的 Parent 必须为控制器 RASD 的 __PATH，AddressOnParent 为控制器上空闲的 LUN 号（本例为 '0'）。此处仅挂载空驱动器，未插入 ISO；插入 ISO 需另行添加指向 .iso 的 Msvm_StorageAllocationSettingData。
add_dvd.title_en: Adding a Synthetic DVD Drive to a Virtual Machine
notes_en: A synthetic DVD corresponds to Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData with ResourceType=16 and ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic DVD Drive'.

A DVD drive must be attached under a controller. A generation 2 VM uses a SCSI controller (Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic SCSI Controller); a newly created empty generation 2 VM contains no SCSI controller by default, so one must first be added via AddResourceSettings before the DVD's Parent is pointed at that controller.

The recommended way to obtain the template RASD: from an Msvm_ResourcePool with Primordial=true (filtered by ResourceSubType) -> GetRelated('Msvm_AllocationCapabilities') -> REFERENCES OF ... Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities, taking the PartComponent with ValueRole=0 (Default).

Adding a resource calls Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.AddResourceSettings($vssd.__PATH, @($rasd.GetText(1))); the OUT parameter ResultingResourceSettings is an array of new resource paths; a return value of 0 indicates synchronous success, and 4096 indicates that an asynchronous job has been started.

The DVD's Parent must be the __PATH of the controller RASD, and AddressOnParent is a free LUN number on the controller (here '0'). This step mounts only an empty drive without inserting an ISO; inserting an ISO requires separately adding an Msvm_StorageAllocationSettingData pointing to the .iso.

add_nic.title: 为虚拟机添加合成网卡
add_nic.code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# 1) 创建第二代测试虚拟机
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_add_nic'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){[void](Wait-Job2 $r.Job)}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1

# 2) 取合成网卡资源池的默认模板 (不能使用空白 CreateInstance)
$pool=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool -Filter "ResourceType=10 AND ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Ethernet Port' AND Primordial=True"
$cap=$pool.GetRelated('Msvm_AllocationCapabilities','Msvm_ElementCapabilities',$null,$null,$null,$null,$false,$null)|Select-Object -First 1
$defPath=$null
foreach($rel in $cap.GetRelationships('Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities')){ if($rel.ValueRole -eq 0){$defPath=$rel.PartComponent; break} }
$nic=[wmi]$defPath
$nic.ElementName='WMITEST_NIC'
$nic.VirtualSystemIdentifiers=@('{'+[guid]::NewGuid().ToString()+'}')
$nic.StaticMacAddress=$false

# 3) AddResourceSettings 添加 (rv=0 同步成功；4096 则 Wait-Job2)
$addr=$vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH,@($nic.GetText(1)))
if($addr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){[void](Wait-Job2 $addr.Job)}

# 4) 读回验证
$after=@(([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData'))
'NIC count = '+$after.Count

# 5) 清理
$d=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){[void](Wait-Job2 $d.Job)}
notes: 不能使用 [wmiclass].CreateInstance() 构造空白 Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData 直接 Add，该方式会异步失败（Job JobState=10，ErrorCode=32773 无法添加资源）。须从合成网卡资源池（ResourceType=10，ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Ethernet Port'，Primordial=True）经 Msvm_AllocationCapabilities 与 Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities（ValueRole=0）取默认模板 RASD，再克隆并修改属性。
AddResourceSettings 通常同步返回 rv=0，网卡数由 0 变为 1。OUT 参数 ResultingResourceSettings 含新建网卡的 __PATH。
网卡须设置 VirtualSystemIdentifiers=@('{<新GUID>}')；系统会额外补充一个端口 GUID，因此读回时可得到两个 VSID。StaticMacAddress=$false 表示由 Hyper-V 自动分配动态 MAC。
ResourceType=10 同时包含 'Emulated Ethernet Port'（模拟式）与 'Synthetic Ethernet Port'（合成式）；本配方使用合成网卡。
此步仅添加网卡，未连接虚拟交换机；连接虚拟交换机由单独的 connect_switch（EthernetPortAllocationSettingData）处理。
add_nic.title_en: Adding a Synthetic Network Adapter to a Virtual Machine
notes_en: A blank Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData constructed with [wmiclass].CreateInstance() cannot be added directly, as that approach fails asynchronously (Job JobState=10, ErrorCode=32773, unable to add the resource). The default template RASD must be obtained from the synthetic network adapter resource pool (ResourceType=10, ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Ethernet Port', Primordial=True) via Msvm_AllocationCapabilities and Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities (ValueRole=0), then cloned and its properties modified.
AddResourceSettings typically returns rv=0 synchronously, and the adapter count changes from 0 to 1. The OUT parameter ResultingResourceSettings contains the __PATH of the newly created adapter.

The adapter must have VirtualSystemIdentifiers=@('{<new GUID>}') set; the system supplements an additional port GUID, so two VSIDs are obtained on read-back. StaticMacAddress=$false indicates that Hyper-V automatically assigns a dynamic MAC.
ResourceType=10 covers both 'Emulated Ethernet Port' (emulated) and 'Synthetic Ethernet Port' (synthetic); this recipe uses the synthetic adapter.
This step only adds the adapter and does not connect it to a virtual switch; connecting to a virtual switch is handled separately by connect_switch (EthernetPortAllocationSettingData).
add_nic.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# 1) Create a generation 2 test VM
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_add_nic'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){[void](Wait-Job2 $r.Job)}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1

# 2) Obtain the default template from the synthetic network adapter resource pool (a blank CreateInstance cannot be used)
$pool=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool -Filter "ResourceType=10 AND ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Ethernet Port' AND Primordial=True"
$cap=$pool.GetRelated('Msvm_AllocationCapabilities','Msvm_ElementCapabilities',$null,$null,$null,$null,$false,$null)|Select-Object -First 1
$defPath=$null
foreach($rel in $cap.GetRelationships('Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities')){ if($rel.ValueRole -eq 0){$defPath=$rel.PartComponent; break} }
$nic=[wmi]$defPath
$nic.ElementName='WMITEST_NIC'
$nic.VirtualSystemIdentifiers=@('{'+[guid]::NewGuid().ToString()+'}')
$nic.StaticMacAddress=$false

# 3) Add via AddResourceSettings (rv=0 is synchronous success; 4096 requires Wait-Job2)
$addr=$vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH,@($nic.GetText(1)))
if($addr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){[void](Wait-Job2 $addr.Job)}

# 4) Read back and verify
$after=@(([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData'))
'NIC count = '+$after.Count

# 5) Clean up
$d=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){[void](Wait-Job2 $d.Job)}

add_scsi.title: 为虚拟机添加合成 SCSI 控制器
add_scsi.code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$scsiSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic SCSI Controller'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
function Get-DefaultRasd($subType){
  $pool=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool -Filter "ResourceSubType='$subType' AND Primordial=True"
  $caps=$pool.GetRelated('Msvm_AllocationCapabilities','Msvm_ElementCapabilities',$null,$null,$null,$null,$false,$null) | Select-Object -First 1
  $rasd=$null
  foreach($sdc in $caps.GetRelationships('Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities')){ if([uint16]$sdc.ValueRole -eq 0){ $rasd=[wmi]($sdc.PartComponent); break } }
  return $rasd
}
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# 创建第二代虚拟机
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_add_scsi'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
# 从 primordial 资源池的默认模板构造 SCSI 控制器 RASD，再添加
$rasd=Get-DefaultRasd $scsiSubType
$r2=$vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH, @($rasd.GetText(1)))
if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }
# 读回验证
$vssd2.Get()
$after=@($vssd2.GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData') | ? { $_.ResourceSubType -eq $scsiSubType })
'SCSI count='+$after.Count
# 清理
$rd=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
notes: 合成 SCSI 控制器的 ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic SCSI Controller'，ResourceType=6（Controller）。

推荐方式：从 Msvm_ResourcePool（Primordial=True，指定 SubType）-> Msvm_AllocationCapabilities（经 Msvm_ElementCapabilities）-> Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities（ValueRole=0 即 Default）取默认 RASD 模板，再 GetText(1) 序列化后交给 AddResourceSettings。相比手动构造 RASD 更稳定。
AddResourceSettings 第一个参数为 VSSD 的 __PATH，第二个参数为嵌入实例字符串数组；同步返回时 rv=0，OUT 参数 ResultingResourceSettings 给出新建控制器的实例路径。
AddResourceSettings 也可能返回 4096（异步 Job），需 Wait-Job2 $r2.Job 轮询。
读回时先 $vssd2.Get() 刷新，再 GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData') 按 ResourceSubType 过滤计数。
第二代虚拟机最多支持 4 个合成 SCSI 控制器；本例从 0 增加到 1，清理后无残留。
add_scsi.title_en: Adding a Synthetic SCSI Controller to a Virtual Machine
notes_en: A synthetic SCSI controller has ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic SCSI Controller' and ResourceType=6 (Controller).

Recommended approach: from Msvm_ResourcePool (Primordial=True, with the specified SubType) -> Msvm_AllocationCapabilities (via Msvm_ElementCapabilities) -> Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities (ValueRole=0, i.e. Default), obtain the default RASD template, serialize it with GetText(1), and pass it to AddResourceSettings. This is more stable than manually constructing the RASD.

The first argument of AddResourceSettings is the __PATH of the VSSD, and the second is an array of embedded instance strings; on synchronous return rv=0, and the OUT parameter ResultingResourceSettings gives the instance path of the newly created controller.
AddResourceSettings may also return 4096 (asynchronous job), which requires polling with Wait-Job2 $r2.Job.
On read-back, first refresh with $vssd2.Get(), then use GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData') filtered by ResourceSubType to count.
A generation 2 VM supports at most 4 synthetic SCSI controllers; this example increases the count from 0 to 1, with no leftover after cleanup.
add_scsi.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$scsiSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic SCSI Controller'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
function Get-DefaultRasd($subType){
  $pool=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool -Filter "ResourceSubType='$subType' AND Primordial=True"
  $caps=$pool.GetRelated('Msvm_AllocationCapabilities','Msvm_ElementCapabilities',$null,$null,$null,$null,$false,$null) | Select-Object -First 1
  $rasd=$null
  foreach($sdc in $caps.GetRelationships('Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities')){ if([uint16]$sdc.ValueRole -eq 0){ $rasd=[wmi]($sdc.PartComponent); break } }
  return $rasd
}
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# Create a generation 2 VM
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_add_scsi'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
# Construct the SCSI controller RASD from the default template of the primordial resource pool, then add it
$rasd=Get-DefaultRasd $scsiSubType
$r2=$vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH, @($rasd.GetText(1)))
if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }
# Read back and verify
$vssd2.Get()
$after=@($vssd2.GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData') | ? { $_.ResourceSubType -eq $scsiSubType })
'SCSI count='+$after.Count
# Clean up
$rd=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }

attach_vhd.title: 创建 VHDX 并挂载到虚拟机
notes: 挂载磁盘需分两步完成。先 AddResourceSettings 添加 Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData（ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Disk Drive'，Parent=SCSI 控制器路径，AddressOnParent='0'）；再 AddResourceSettings 添加 Msvm_StorageAllocationSettingData（Parent=上一步驱动器路径，HostResource=@(vhdx 路径)）。
若直接将 StorageAllocationSettingData 的 Parent 指向 SCSI 控制器，将失败：JobState=10，ErrorCode=32768（无法添加设备 Virtual Hard Disk）。必须先存在磁盘驱动器（Drive）。
默认模板取法：Msvm_ResourcePool（ResourceSubType=...，Primordial=True）-> Msvm_AllocationCapabilities -> Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities（ValueRole=0）的 PartComponent。使用 .psbase.Clone() 复制后修改属性，再 GetText(1) 序列化。
StorageAllocationSettingData 的关键属性（HostResource/Parent/AddressOnParent/ResourceType=31）均继承自 CIM 基类，不出现在 canonical.json 的子类属性表中，需查阅继承链。
CreateVirtualHardDisk 使用 Msvm_ImageManagementService，传入序列化的 Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData（Type=3 动态 / Format=3 VHDX / Path / MaxInternalSize）。
HostResource 路径须使用反斜杠形式的 Windows 路径。验证时从 VSSD GetRelated('Msvm_StorageAllocationSettingData') 读回 HostResource 进行比对。
所有写方法返回 4096 时需 Wait-Job2 轮询；JobState 7=完成，10=失败。
attach_vhd.title_en: Creating a VHDX and Attaching It to a Virtual Machine
notes_en: Attaching a disk requires two steps. First, AddResourceSettings adds an Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData (ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Disk Drive', Parent=SCSI controller path, AddressOnParent='0'); then AddResourceSettings adds an Msvm_StorageAllocationSettingData (Parent=the drive path from the previous step, HostResource=@(vhdx path)).

Pointing the Parent of the StorageAllocationSettingData directly at the SCSI controller fails: JobState=10, ErrorCode=32768 (unable to add device Virtual Hard Disk). A disk drive (Drive) must exist first.

How to obtain the default template: Msvm_ResourcePool (ResourceSubType=..., Primordial=True) -> Msvm_AllocationCapabilities -> the PartComponent of Msvm_SettingsDefineCapabilities (ValueRole=0). Copy it with .psbase.Clone(), modify the properties, then serialize with GetText(1).

The key properties of StorageAllocationSettingData (HostResource/Parent/AddressOnParent/ResourceType=31) are all inherited from CIM base classes and do not appear in the subclass property table of canonical.json, so the inheritance chain must be consulted.
CreateVirtualHardDisk uses Msvm_ImageManagementService and takes a serialized Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData (Type=3 dynamic / Format=3 VHDX / Path / MaxInternalSize).
The HostResource path must use a backslash-form Windows path. During verification, read back HostResource from the VSSD via GetRelated('Msvm_StorageAllocationSettingData') for comparison.
Whenever a write method returns 4096, poll with Wait-Job2; JobState 7=completed, 10=failed.

automatic_actions.title: 设置虚拟机自动启动延迟与故障恢复操作
automatic_actions.code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$name='WMITEST_automatic_actions'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vm=$null
try {
  # 创建第二代测试虚拟机 (CreateInstance 用 Get-WmiObject -List 获取类；PS5.1 下 [wmiclass]\\.\ns:cls 不可靠)
  $cls=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -List -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData
  $vssd=$cls.CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName=$name
  $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $st=Wait-Job2 $r.Job; if($st -ne 7){throw "DefineSystem job state=$st"} }
  elseif($r.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "DefineSystem rv=$($r.ReturnValue)" }
  $vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

  $vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1

  # AutomaticStartupActionDelay 为 datetime 的 interval 类型: ddddddddhhmmss.mmmmmm:000
  $delay = '00000000000200.000000:000'   # 120 秒
  $vssd2.AutomaticStartupActionDelay = $delay
  # AutomaticRecoveryAction ValueMap: 2=None 3=Restart 4=Revert to snapshot
  $vssd2.AutomaticRecoveryAction = [uint16]2
  # AutomaticCriticalErrorAction: 0=None 1=Pause/Resume
  $vssd2.AutomaticCriticalErrorAction = [uint16]1
  # AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout interval (仅当 action!=0 时生效)
  $vssd2.AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout = '00000000001500.000000:000'  # 15 分钟

  $rm=$vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
  if($rm.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $st=Wait-Job2 $rm.Job; if($st -ne 7){ $jb=[wmi]$rm.Job; throw "Modify job state=$st err=$($jb.ErrorDescription)" } }
  elseif($rm.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "Modify rv=$($rm.ReturnValue)" }

  $vm2=[wmi]$vm.__PATH
  $vssd3=$vm2.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
  $okDelay  = ($vssd3.AutomaticStartupActionDelay -eq $delay)
  $okRec    = ($vssd3.AutomaticRecoveryAction -eq 2)
  $okCrit   = ($vssd3.AutomaticCriticalErrorAction -eq 1)
  $okCritTo = ($vssd3.AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout -eq '00000000001500.000000:000')
  if($okDelay -and $okRec -and $okCrit -and $okCritTo){ 'ASSERT: PASS' } else { 'ASSERT: FAIL' }
}
finally {
  if($vm){ $rd=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null } }
}
notes: 通过 ModifySystemSettings 修改 VSSD 上的四个自动操作字段，修改后均可读回。
AutomaticRecoveryAction 的 ValueMap 为 2=None / 3=Restart / 4=Revert to snapshot（并非 0/1/2）。新建第二代虚拟机的默认值为 3（Restart）。传入非法值（如 1）会导致 ModifySystemSettings 返回 4096 后 Job 进入 state=10（Exception）失败。
AutomaticCriticalErrorAction 的 ValueMap 为 0=None / 1=Pause Resume，默认值为 1。
AutomaticStartupActionDelay 与 AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout 均为 datetime 的 interval 变体，格式为 ddddddddhhmmss.mmmmmm:000（例如 120 秒='00000000000200.000000:000'，15 分钟='00000000001500.000000:000'）。
AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout 仅当 AutomaticCriticalErrorAction != 0 时生效；若将 action 设为 0（None），该 Timeout 会被清空为 NULL（读回为空）。
在 PowerShell 5.1 下，[wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class".CreateInstance() 不可靠（命名空间含反斜杠会导致转换失败或 CreateInstance 异常）。改用 Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -List -Class <Class> 取类后再 .CreateInstance() 更稳定。
DefineSystem 的 OUT 参数为 ResultingSystem；DefineSystem/ModifySystemSettings/DestroySystem 返回 4096 时需 Wait-Job2 轮询 Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState（7=Completed）。
整个流程仅读写 VSSD 配置，无需启动虚拟机。
automatic_actions.title_en: Configuring Virtual Machine Automatic Startup Delay and Failure Recovery Actions
notes_en: The four automatic action fields on the VSSD are modified via ModifySystemSettings, and all can be read back after modification.

The ValueMap of AutomaticRecoveryAction is 2=None / 3=Restart / 4=Revert to snapshot (not 0/1/2). The default value for a newly created generation 2 VM is 3 (Restart). Passing an invalid value (such as 1) causes ModifySystemSettings to return 4096, after which the job enters state=10 (Exception) and fails.
The ValueMap of AutomaticCriticalErrorAction is 0=None / 1=Pause Resume, with a default value of 1.

AutomaticStartupActionDelay and AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout are both datetime interval variants, formatted as ddddddddhhmmss.mmmmmm:000 (for example, 120 seconds='00000000000200.000000:000', 15 minutes='00000000001500.000000:000').
AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout is effective only when AutomaticCriticalErrorAction != 0; if the action is set to 0 (None), that Timeout is cleared to NULL (read back as empty).

Under PowerShell 5.1, [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class".CreateInstance() is unreliable (a namespace containing backslashes causes the conversion to fail or CreateInstance to throw). Using Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -List -Class <Class> to obtain the class and then calling .CreateInstance() is more stable.
The OUT parameter of DefineSystem is ResultingSystem; when DefineSystem/ModifySystemSettings/DestroySystem return 4096, poll Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState with Wait-Job2 (7=Completed).
The entire procedure only reads and writes VSSD configuration and does not require starting the VM.
automatic_actions.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$name='WMITEST_automatic_actions'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$vm=$null
try {
  # Create a generation 2 test VM (obtain the class for CreateInstance via Get-WmiObject -List; under PS5.1 [wmiclass]\\.\ns:cls is unreliable)
  $cls=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -List -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData
  $vssd=$cls.CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName=$name
  $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $st=Wait-Job2 $r.Job; if($st -ne 7){throw "DefineSystem job state=$st"} }
  elseif($r.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "DefineSystem rv=$($r.ReturnValue)" }
  $vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

  $vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1

  # AutomaticStartupActionDelay is a datetime interval type: ddddddddhhmmss.mmmmmm:000
  $delay = '00000000000200.000000:000'   # 120 seconds
  $vssd2.AutomaticStartupActionDelay = $delay
  # AutomaticRecoveryAction ValueMap: 2=None 3=Restart 4=Revert to snapshot
  $vssd2.AutomaticRecoveryAction = [uint16]2
  # AutomaticCriticalErrorAction: 0=None 1=Pause/Resume
  $vssd2.AutomaticCriticalErrorAction = [uint16]1
  # AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout interval (effective only when action!=0)
  $vssd2.AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout = '00000000001500.000000:000'  # 15 minutes

  $rm=$vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
  if($rm.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $st=Wait-Job2 $rm.Job; if($st -ne 7){ $jb=[wmi]$rm.Job; throw "Modify job state=$st err=$($jb.ErrorDescription)" } }
  elseif($rm.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "Modify rv=$($rm.ReturnValue)" }

  $vm2=[wmi]$vm.__PATH
  $vssd3=$vm2.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
  $okDelay  = ($vssd3.AutomaticStartupActionDelay -eq $delay)
  $okRec    = ($vssd3.AutomaticRecoveryAction -eq 2)
  $okCrit   = ($vssd3.AutomaticCriticalErrorAction -eq 1)
  $okCritTo = ($vssd3.AutomaticCriticalErrorActionTimeout -eq '00000000001500.000000:000')
  if($okDelay -and $okRec -and $okCrit -and $okCritTo){ 'ASSERT: PASS' } else { 'ASSERT: FAIL' }
}
finally {
  if($vm){ $rd=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null } }
}

battery_setting.title: 为虚拟机添加合成电池
battery_setting.code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- 创建第二代虚拟机 ---
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_battery_setting'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
# --- 电池: 克隆 Default 模板实例(空 CreateInstance 会被拒 ErrorCode=32773) ---
$tmpl = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_BatterySettingData | Where-Object { $_.InstanceID -like '*\Default' } | Select-Object -First 1
$bat = $tmpl.PSObject.BaseObject.Clone()
$r2 = $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH, @($bat.GetText(1)))
if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }
# --- 回读 ---
$bats = $vssd2.GetRelated('Msvm_BatterySettingData')
'Battery count = ' + @($bats).Count
# --- 清理 ---
$d = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $d.Job | Out-Null }
notes: 合成电池由 Msvm_BatterySettingData 表示，该类继承 CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData，自身无独有属性；该资源自 build 16299 起提供。
不能通过 ([wmiclass]...).CreateInstance() 直接创建空实例：空实例 ResourceType 为空，AddResourceSettings 会被作业拒绝并返回 ErrorCode=32773(无法添加资源)。
正确做法是枚举 Msvm_BatterySettingData，选取 InstanceID 以 '\Default' 结尾的模板实例并克隆(ResourceType=1)，再通过 GetText(1) 序列化传入 AddResourceSettings；该调用同步完成，返回 0 而非 4096。
该资源提供 Default / Minimum / Maximum / Increment 四个模板实例，定义 GUID 为 C7E49E80-13B3-4DF9-A434-B56F579E2A68。
电池为纯标记型资源，无可调参数(SubType 为空)；回读的 ElementName 为本地化默认名称。
PowerShell 模块未提供对应的 Add-VMBattery cmdlet，只能通过 WMI 添加；适用于需要来宾操作系统识别电池存在的场景。
battery_setting.title_en: Add a Synthetic Battery to a Virtual Machine
notes_en: The synthetic battery is represented by Msvm_BatterySettingData, which derives from CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData and defines no unique properties of its own; this resource is available starting from build 16299.

An empty instance cannot be created directly via ([wmiclass]...).CreateInstance(): an empty instance has an empty ResourceType, and AddResourceSettings rejects it at the job level with ErrorCode=32773 (unable to add resource).

The correct approach is to enumerate Msvm_BatterySettingData, select the template instance whose InstanceID ends with '\Default' and clone it (ResourceType=1), then serialize it with GetText(1) and pass it to AddResourceSettings; this call completes synchronously and returns 0 rather than 4096.
This resource provides four template instances (Default / Minimum / Maximum / Increment), with the definition GUID C7E49E80-13B3-4DF9-A434-B56F579E2A68.
The battery is a pure marker resource with no adjustable parameters (SubType is empty); the ElementName read back is the localized default name.

The PowerShell module provides no corresponding Add-VMBattery cmdlet, so the battery can only be added through WMI; this applies to scenarios where the guest operating system must detect the presence of a battery.
battery_setting.code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- Create a generation 2 virtual machine ---
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_battery_setting'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
# --- Battery: clone the Default template instance (an empty CreateInstance is rejected with ErrorCode=32773) ---
$tmpl = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_BatterySettingData | Where-Object { $_.InstanceID -like '*\Default' } | Select-Object -First 1
$bat = $tmpl.PSObject.BaseObject.Clone()
$r2 = $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH, @($bat.GetText(1)))
if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }
# --- Read back ---
$bats = $vssd2.GetRelated('Msvm_BatterySettingData')
'Battery count = ' + @($bats).Count
# --- Cleanup ---
$d = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $d.Job | Out-Null }

boot_order.title: 设置虚拟机启动顺序
notes: 第二代虚拟机的启动顺序由 VSSD.BootSourceOrder 表示，类型为 string[]，每个元素是指向 Msvm_BootSourceSettingData 实例的完整 WMI 路径(REF)。调整顺序即重排该字符串数组，再通过 ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1)) 整机下发，同步返回 rv=0。

Msvm_BootSourceSettingData 为只读枚举项，代表第二代虚拟机的单个启动条目，由实际设备自动生成，不能通过 CreateInstance 凭空创建。空的第二代虚拟机 BootSourceOrder 为空；必须先挂载设备：添加合成网卡生成 BootSourceType=2 'EFI Network'，添加 SCSI 控制器与合成 DVD 生成 BootSourceType=1 'EFI SCSI Device'。
Msvm_BootSourceSettingData.BootSourceType 枚举: 0=Unknown, 1=Drive, 2=Network, 3=File；可读字段包括 BootSourceDescription(如 'EFI Network' / 'EFI SCSI Device')、FirmwareDevicePath、OtherLocation、OptionalData。
写回时须将数组强制转换为 [string[]]，否则 GetText(1) 序列化可能丢失类型信息。回读时对每个元素执行 [wmi]$ref 即可解析出对应的 Msvm_BootSourceSettingData。

第一代虚拟机(SubType:1)机制不同: 使用 VSSD.BootOrder = [uint16[]]，枚举 0=Floppy, 1=CD-ROM, 2=IDE Hard Drive, 3=PXE Boot, 4=SCSI Hard Drive(最多 4 项)，同样经 ModifySystemSettings 下发。第二代虚拟机不提供 BootOrder 整数字段，改用 BootSourceOrder REF 数组。
在 PowerShell 5.1 中，[wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class" 里的 $ns: 会被解析为作用域变量，必须写作 ${ns}: 才能正确展开命名空间。
boot_order.title_en: Set the Boot Order of a Virtual Machine
notes_en: For a generation 2 virtual machine the boot order is represented by VSSD.BootSourceOrder, of type string[], where each element is the full WMI path (REF) to an Msvm_BootSourceSettingData instance. Changing the order means reordering this string array and then applying it to the whole machine via ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1)), which returns rv=0 synchronously.

Msvm_BootSourceSettingData is a read-only enumerated item representing a single boot entry of a generation 2 virtual machine; it is generated automatically from actual devices and cannot be created from scratch via CreateInstance. An empty generation 2 virtual machine has an empty BootSourceOrder; devices must be attached first: adding a synthetic network adapter produces BootSourceType=2 'EFI Network', and adding a SCSI controller with a synthetic DVD produces BootSourceType=1 'EFI SCSI Device'.

Msvm_BootSourceSettingData.BootSourceType enumeration: 0=Unknown, 1=Drive, 2=Network, 3=File; readable fields include BootSourceDescription (such as 'EFI Network' / 'EFI SCSI Device'), FirmwareDevicePath, OtherLocation, and OptionalData.

When writing back, the array must be cast to [string[]], otherwise GetText(1) serialization may lose type information. When reading back, applying [wmi]$ref to each element resolves it to the corresponding Msvm_BootSourceSettingData.

A generation 1 virtual machine (SubType:1) uses a different mechanism: VSSD.BootOrder = [uint16[]], with the enumeration 0=Floppy, 1=CD-ROM, 2=IDE Hard Drive, 3=PXE Boot, 4=SCSI Hard Drive (up to 4 entries), also applied via ModifySystemSettings. A generation 2 virtual machine does not provide the integer BootOrder field and uses the BootSourceOrder REF array instead.
In PowerShell 5.1, the $ns: in [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class" is parsed as a scoped variable and must be written as ${ns}: for the namespace to expand correctly.

cad_input.title: 向虚拟机发送 Ctrl+Alt+Del
cad_input.code:
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$name = 'WMITEST_cad_input'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# 创建第二代虚拟机
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# 启动虚拟机(RequestStateChange -> Enabled=2)。Msvm_Keyboard.TypeCtrlAltDel
# 仅在虚拟机运行时有效;虚拟机处于停止态时调用会返回非零值或作业失败。
$sc = $vm.RequestStateChange(2)
if ($sc.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $sc.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$vm.__PATH   # 重新读取;EnabledState 此时应为 2

# 获取虚拟机的合成键盘设备并发送安全注意序列
$kbd = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_Keyboard') | Select-Object -First 1
$kb  = [wmi]$kbd.__PATH
$call = $kb.TypeCtrlAltDel()   # 无参数
if ($call.ReturnValue -eq 4096 -and $call.Job) { Wait-Job2 $call.Job | Out-Null }
# ReturnValue=0 表示成功(已注入 Ctrl+Alt+Del)

# 清理:强制关闭虚拟机后销毁。空虚拟机无操作系统可正常关机,
# 故销毁前轮询 EnabledState 直到为 3
for ($i=0; $i -lt 10; $i++) { $c=[wmi]$vm.__PATH; if($c.EnabledState -eq 3){break}; $o=$c.RequestStateChange(3); if($o.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $o.Job|Out-Null}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }
$d = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $d.Job | Out-Null }
notes: Msvm_Keyboard.TypeCtrlAltDel() 无参数,返回 uint32,0 表示成功,该调用同步返回,不走 Job。
键盘设备经 $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_Keyboard') 获取(每台虚拟机一个),需以 [wmi]$kbd.__PATH 取得实例后再调用方法。
TypeCtrlAltDel 要求虚拟机处于运行态(EnabledState=2),须先经 RequestStateChange(2) 启动。无操作系统或启动介质的空虚拟机同样可启动至 Enabled 并接受注入。
空的第二代虚拟机无操作系统,RequestStateChange(3) 关机作业虽返回成功(JobState=7),但 EnabledState 可能仍停留在 2;若立即调用 DestroySystem,可能出现调用返回成功却残留运行中虚拟机的情况。应轮询 EnabledState 直到为 3(必要时重发关机)后再执行 Destroy,并重试 Destroy 直至枚举不到。
同类键盘注入方法:TypeText / PressKey / ReleaseKey / TypeScancodes(参见 keyboard_input)。
cad_input.title_en: Send Ctrl+Alt+Del to a Virtual Machine
notes_en: Msvm_Keyboard.TypeCtrlAltDel() takes no parameters and returns a uint32, where 0 indicates success; this call returns synchronously and does not go through a Job.
The keyboard device is obtained via $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_Keyboard') (one per virtual machine); the instance must be retrieved with [wmi]$kbd.__PATH before the method is invoked.

TypeCtrlAltDel requires the virtual machine to be running (EnabledState=2), so it must first be started via RequestStateChange(2). An empty virtual machine with no operating system or boot media can likewise be started to Enabled and accept the injection.

An empty generation 2 virtual machine has no operating system; although the RequestStateChange(3) shutdown job returns success (JobState=7), EnabledState may still remain at 2. If DestroySystem is called immediately, the call may return success while a running virtual machine is left behind. EnabledState should be polled until it reaches 3 (resending the shutdown if necessary) before Destroy is executed, and Destroy should be retried until the virtual machine can no longer be enumerated.
Related keyboard injection methods: TypeText / PressKey / ReleaseKey / TypeScancodes (see keyboard_input).
cad_input.code_en:
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$name = 'WMITEST_cad_input'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# Create a generation 2 virtual machine
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# Start the virtual machine (RequestStateChange -> Enabled=2). Msvm_Keyboard.TypeCtrlAltDel
# is only effective while the virtual machine is running; calling it while the virtual machine is stopped returns a non-zero value or the job fails.
$sc = $vm.RequestStateChange(2)
if ($sc.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $sc.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$vm.__PATH   # Re-read; EnabledState should now be 2

# Get the virtual machine's synthetic keyboard device and send the secure attention sequence
$kbd = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_Keyboard') | Select-Object -First 1
$kb  = [wmi]$kbd.__PATH
$call = $kb.TypeCtrlAltDel()   # no parameters
if ($call.ReturnValue -eq 4096 -and $call.Job) { Wait-Job2 $call.Job | Out-Null }
# ReturnValue=0 indicates success (Ctrl+Alt+Del has been injected)

# Cleanup: force shut down the virtual machine and destroy it. An empty virtual machine has no operating system to shut down gracefully,
# so before destroying, poll EnabledState until it is 3
for ($i=0; $i -lt 10; $i++) { $c=[wmi]$vm.__PATH; if($c.EnabledState -eq 3){break}; $o=$c.RequestStateChange(3); if($o.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $o.Job|Out-Null}; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }
$d = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $d.Job | Out-Null }

checkpoint_type.title: 设置检查点类型(生产/标准)
checkpoint_type.code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns  = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$name = 'WMITEST_checkpoint_type'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# 创建第二代测试虚拟机
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { $null = Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# 获取虚拟机设置实例(UserSnapshotType 位于 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData)
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1

# 通过 ModifySystemSettings 设置检查点类型。枚举:
#   2=Disable 3=ProductionFallbackToTest 4=ProductionNoFallback 5=Test
$vssd2.UserSnapshotType = [uint16]3   # 生产检查点，不可用时回退到标准
$m = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if ($m.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { $null = Wait-Job2 $m.Job }

# 从 WMI 重新回读
$back = ([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).UserSnapshotType
Write-Output "UserSnapshotType = $back"

# 清理
$d = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { $null = Wait-Job2 $d.Job }
notes: 检查点类型由 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData.UserSnapshotType (uint16) 控制，不在快照服务上；通过 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ModifySystemSettings 整机下发。
枚举值: 2=Disable(禁止创建检查点)、3=ProductionFallbackToTest(生产，不可用时回退到标准)、4=ProductionNoFallback(生产，不回退)、5=Test(标准/测试，含内存设备状态)。'生产检查点'对应 3/4，'标准检查点'对应 5。
新建第二代虚拟机的默认值为 3(ProductionFallbackToTest)，与 Hyper-V 管理器默认一致。
该属性为纯配置项，无需运行的操作系统或嵌套虚拟化，虚拟机停机时即可修改。
ModifySystemSettings 同步完成时返回 0；返回 4096 时需 Wait-Job2 轮询作业。嵌入实例统一通过 GetText(1) 序列化。
notes_en: The checkpoint type is controlled by Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData.UserSnapshotType (uint16), not on the snapshot service; it is applied to the whole machine via Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ModifySystemSettings.

Enumeration values: 2=Disable (checkpoint creation prohibited), 3=ProductionFallbackToTest (production, falling back to standard when unavailable), 4=ProductionNoFallback (production, no fallback), 5=Test (standard/test, including memory device state). 'Production checkpoint' corresponds to 3/4, and 'standard checkpoint' corresponds to 5.
The default value for a newly created generation 2 virtual machine is 3 (ProductionFallbackToTest), matching the Hyper-V Manager default.
This property is a pure configuration item; it requires no running operating system or nested virtualization and can be modified while the virtual machine is stopped.
ModifySystemSettings returns 0 when it completes synchronously; when it returns 4096, Wait-Job2 must poll the job. Embedded instances are consistently serialized via GetText(1).
checkpoint_type.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns  = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$name = 'WMITEST_checkpoint_type'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# Create a generation 2 test virtual machine
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { $null = Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# Get the virtual machine setting instance (UserSnapshotType resides on Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData)
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1

# Set the checkpoint type via ModifySystemSettings. Enumeration:
#   2=Disable 3=ProductionFallbackToTest 4=ProductionNoFallback 5=Test
$vssd2.UserSnapshotType = [uint16]3   # Production checkpoint, falling back to standard when unavailable
$m = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if ($m.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { $null = Wait-Job2 $m.Job }

# Read back from WMI
$back = ([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).UserSnapshotType
Write-Output "UserSnapshotType = $back"

# Cleanup
$d = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { $null = Wait-Job2 $d.Job }

config_version.title: 读取与升级虚拟机配置版本
config_version.code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$name = 'WMITEST_config_version'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# --- 创建新的第二代虚拟机(始终按主机默认/最新版本创建) ---
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# --- 读取 VSSD.Version(配置版本，如 12.0) ---
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$verBefore = $vssd2.Version   # -> '12.0'

# --- 升级: UpgradeSystemVersion(ComputerSystem REF, UpgradeSettingData string, OUT Job) ---
# 注意: 动态后期绑定调用 $vsms.UpgradeSystemVersion(...) 会抛'无效的方法';
# 必须通过 [wmiclass].GetMethodParameters 构造 InParameters 后 InvokeMethod。
$vsmsClass = [wmiclass]("\\.\" + $ns + ":Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService")
$inParams = $vsmsClass.GetMethodParameters('UpgradeSystemVersion')
$inParams['ComputerSystem'] = $vm.__PATH
$inParams['UpgradeSettingData'] = ''   # 空串 -> 升级到主机默认
$ru = $vsms.InvokeMethod('UpgradeSystemVersion', $inParams, $null)
if ($ru.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $ru.Job | Out-Null }   # rv 4096 = 异步作业

# --- 回读 ---
$vssdAfter = ([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$verAfter = $vssdAfter.Version

# --- 清理 ---
$rd = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }

# 主机支持的版本列表(供参考/选择目标版本):
#   Get-VMHostSupportedVersion   -> Name/Version/IsDefault
notes: VSSD.Version 是只读字符串属性(如 '12.0')，通过 VM.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') 取得 Realized 配置后读取。
UpgradeSystemVersion 是 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService 的方法，签名为 (ComputerSystem REF[IN], UpgradeSettingData string[IN], OUT Job)。

动态后期绑定调用 $vsms.UpgradeSystemVersion($path, $null) 会抛出'无效的方法'异常。必须用 [wmiclass].GetMethodParameters('UpgradeSystemVersion') 构造 InParameters，设置 ComputerSystem=__PATH、UpgradeSettingData=''(空串而非 $null)，再调用 $vsms.InvokeMethod(...)。
返回 4096 表示异步 Job，需 Wait-Job2 轮询至 JobState=7(Completed)。
新建虚拟机总是落在主机支持的最高版本，因此对新建虚拟机执行升级为空操作；调用仍成功返回 4096 并完成，版本回读不变。若要观察真正的跨版本升级，需先具备低版本虚拟机(由旧机导入或低版本主机创建)。
主机支持的版本列表可用 Get-VMHostSupportedVersion 读取(返回 Name / Version / IsDefault)。UpgradeSystemVersion 方法自 build 10240 起持续提供。
config_version.title_en: Read and Upgrade the Virtual Machine Configuration Version
notes_en: VSSD.Version is a read-only string property (e.g. '12.0'); it is read after obtaining the realized configuration via VM.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData').
UpgradeSystemVersion is a method of Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService, with the signature (ComputerSystem REF[IN], UpgradeSettingData string[IN], OUT Job).

A dynamic late-bound call $vsms.UpgradeSystemVersion($path, $null) throws an 'invalid method' exception. InParameters must be built with [wmiclass].GetMethodParameters('UpgradeSystemVersion'), setting ComputerSystem=__PATH and UpgradeSettingData='' (an empty string rather than $null), then $vsms.InvokeMethod(...) is called.
A return value of 4096 indicates an asynchronous job, which must be polled with Wait-Job2 until JobState=7 (Completed).

A newly created virtual machine always lands on the highest version the host supports, so upgrading a newly created virtual machine is a no-op; the call still succeeds, returning 4096 and completing, while the version read back is unchanged. To observe a genuine cross-version upgrade, a lower-version virtual machine must be available first (imported from an older machine or created on a lower-version host).

The list of versions supported by the host can be read with Get-VMHostSupportedVersion (which returns Name / Version / IsDefault). The UpgradeSystemVersion method has been provided continuously since build 10240.
config_version.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$name = 'WMITEST_config_version'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# --- Create a new generation 2 virtual machine (always created at the host default / latest version) ---
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# --- Read VSSD.Version (the configuration version, e.g. 12.0) ---
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$verBefore = $vssd2.Version   # -> '12.0'

# --- Upgrade: UpgradeSystemVersion(ComputerSystem REF, UpgradeSettingData string, OUT Job) ---
# Note: a dynamic late-bound call to $vsms.UpgradeSystemVersion(...) throws 'invalid method';
# InParameters must be built via [wmiclass].GetMethodParameters before calling InvokeMethod.
$vsmsClass = [wmiclass]("\\.\" + $ns + ":Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService")
$inParams = $vsmsClass.GetMethodParameters('UpgradeSystemVersion')
$inParams['ComputerSystem'] = $vm.__PATH
$inParams['UpgradeSettingData'] = ''   # empty string -> upgrade to the host default
$ru = $vsms.InvokeMethod('UpgradeSystemVersion', $inParams, $null)
if ($ru.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $ru.Job | Out-Null }   # rv 4096 = asynchronous job

# --- Read back ---
$vssdAfter = ([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$verAfter = $vssdAfter.Version

# --- Cleanup ---
$rd = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }

# List of versions supported by the host (for reference / selecting a target version):
#   Get-VMHostSupportedVersion   -> Name/Version/IsDefault

connect_switch.title: 将合成网卡接入虚拟交换机
connect_switch.code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# --- 创建第二代虚拟机 ---
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_connect_switch'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1

# --- 添加合成网卡（克隆 InstanceID 以 '...\Default' 结尾的类默认模板实例） ---
$nicTemplate=$null
Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData -Filter "InstanceID LIKE '%\\Default'" | ForEach-Object { if($_.InstanceID -match 'Default$'){ $nicTemplate=$_ } }
$nic=$nicTemplate.psbase.Clone()
$nic.ElementName='WMITEST_NIC'
$nic.VirtualSystemIdentifiers=@([guid]::NewGuid().ToString('B').ToUpper())
$addNic=$vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH,@($nic.GetText(1)))
if($addNic.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $addNic.Job|Out-Null}
$nicRasd=[wmi]$addNic.ResultingResourceSettings[0]

# --- 选取一个虚拟交换机 ---
$sw=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch | Select-Object -First 1

# --- 通过 EthernetPortAllocationSettingData 将网卡连接到交换机 ---
$epasTemplate=$null
Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData -Filter "InstanceID LIKE '%\\Default'" | ForEach-Object { if($_.InstanceID -match 'Default$'){ $epasTemplate=$_ } }
$epas=$epasTemplate.psbase.Clone()
$epas.Parent=$nicRasd.__PATH          # 网卡 RASD 的路径
$epas.HostResource=@($sw.__PATH)      # 目标交换机的路径
$addConn=$vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH,@($epas.GetText(1)))
if($addConn.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $addConn.Job|Out-Null}
$conn=[wmi]$addConn.ResultingResourceSettings[0]

# --- 读回验证 ---
$conn.HostResource   # -> 交换机 __PATH
$conn.EnabledState   # -> 2 (Enabled)

# --- 清理 ---
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
notes: 网卡与交换机的连接由 Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData (EPAS) 表达；它是合成网卡 Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData 的子资源，通过 AddResourceSettings 添加到虚拟机的 VSSD 上。
两个关键属性：EPAS.Parent 为网卡 RASD 的 __PATH；EPAS.HostResource 为交换机 __PATH。HostResource 为 string[] 类型，赋值时须用 @() 包成数组。
创建 EPAS 与网卡设置时应克隆 InstanceID 以 '...\Default' 结尾的类默认实例（psbase.Clone()），而非手动 CreateInstance，默认实例已带好 ResourceType/ResourceSubType 等字段。
添加顺序：先 AddResourceSettings 添加网卡并取 ResultingResourceSettings[0] 作为网卡 RASD 路径，再以该路径作为 EPAS.Parent。
AddResourceSettings、DefineSystem、DestroySystem 返回 4096 表示异步任务，需通过 Wait-Job2 轮询 Job 直至完成。
验证方式：读回 EPAS.HostResource 等于交换机 __PATH，且 EnabledState=2 (Enabled) 表示接入成功。
相关类自 build 9200 起提供，无版本限制。
connect_switch.title_en: Attach a Synthetic Network Adapter to a Virtual Switch
notes_en: The connection between the network adapter and the switch is expressed by Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData (EPAS); it is a child resource of the synthetic network adapter Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData and is added to the virtual machine's VSSD via AddResourceSettings.

Two key properties: EPAS.Parent is the __PATH of the network adapter RASD; EPAS.HostResource is the switch __PATH. HostResource is of type string[], so it must be wrapped in @() as an array when assigned.

When creating the EPAS and the network adapter setting, the class default instance whose InstanceID ends with '...\Default' should be cloned (psbase.Clone()) rather than manually calling CreateInstance, because the default instance already carries fields such as ResourceType / ResourceSubType.
Order of addition: first call AddResourceSettings to add the network adapter and take ResultingResourceSettings[0] as the network adapter RASD path, then use that path as EPAS.Parent.
AddResourceSettings, DefineSystem and DestroySystem returning 4096 indicates an asynchronous job, which must be polled with Wait-Job2 until it completes.
Verification method: read back EPAS.HostResource and confirm it equals the switch __PATH, and that EnabledState=2 (Enabled) indicates the attachment succeeded.
The related classes have been provided since build 9200, with no version restriction.
connect_switch.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# --- Create a generation 2 virtual machine ---
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_connect_switch'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1

# --- Add a synthetic network adapter (clone the class default template instance whose InstanceID ends with '...\Default') ---
$nicTemplate=$null
Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData -Filter "InstanceID LIKE '%\\Default'" | ForEach-Object { if($_.InstanceID -match 'Default$'){ $nicTemplate=$_ } }
$nic=$nicTemplate.psbase.Clone()
$nic.ElementName='WMITEST_NIC'
$nic.VirtualSystemIdentifiers=@([guid]::NewGuid().ToString('B').ToUpper())
$addNic=$vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH,@($nic.GetText(1)))
if($addNic.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $addNic.Job|Out-Null}
$nicRasd=[wmi]$addNic.ResultingResourceSettings[0]

# --- Select a virtual switch ---
$sw=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch | Select-Object -First 1

# --- Connect the network adapter to the switch via EthernetPortAllocationSettingData ---
$epasTemplate=$null
Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData -Filter "InstanceID LIKE '%\\Default'" | ForEach-Object { if($_.InstanceID -match 'Default$'){ $epasTemplate=$_ } }
$epas=$epasTemplate.psbase.Clone()
$epas.Parent=$nicRasd.__PATH          # path of the network adapter RASD
$epas.HostResource=@($sw.__PATH)      # path of the target switch
$addConn=$vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd2.__PATH,@($epas.GetText(1)))
if($addConn.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $addConn.Job|Out-Null}
$conn=[wmi]$addConn.ResultingResourceSettings[0]

# --- Read back and verify ---
$conn.HostResource   # -> switch __PATH
$conn.EnabledState   # -> 2 (Enabled)

# --- Cleanup ---
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)

cpu_compat.title: 启用处理器功能限制 (LimitProcessorFeatures / LimitCPUID)
notes: LimitProcessorFeatures 与 LimitCPUID 为 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData 上的布尔属性，用于跨主机迁移时限制暴露给来宾的处理器功能集与 CPUID 位；可通过 ModifyResourceSettings 写入并读回生效。
修改走标准资源修改路径：取虚拟机的 VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData，设置属性后经 GetText(1) 序列化传入 ModifyResourceSettings。ModifyResourceSettings 返回 0 表示同步成功，返回 4096 表示异步任务，须轮询 Job。
读回需重新经 VSSD 遍历 GetRelated 取新的 ProcessorSettingData 实例，原句柄为旧快照，不会自动刷新。
相关属性 LimitProcessorFeaturesMode (uint8, DefaultMinimumFeatures / ClusterNodeCommonFeatures) 控制受限功能集的类型，本用例保持默认未修改。
相关属性自 build 9200 起提供。
notes_en: LimitProcessorFeatures and LimitCPUID are boolean properties on Msvm_ProcessorSettingData, used to limit the set of processor features and CPUID bits exposed to the guest during cross-host migration; they can be written and read back via ModifyResourceSettings.

The modification follows the standard resource modification path: obtain the virtual machine's VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData, set the properties, then serialize with GetText(1) and pass to ModifyResourceSettings. ModifyResourceSettings returning 0 indicates synchronous success, and returning 4096 indicates an asynchronous job that must be polled.
Reading back requires traversing the VSSD again via GetRelated to obtain a fresh ProcessorSettingData instance, because the original handle is a stale snapshot that does not refresh automatically.

The related property LimitProcessorFeaturesMode (uint8, DefaultMinimumFeatures / ClusterNodeCommonFeatures) controls the type of the limited feature set; this example leaves it at the default, unmodified.
The related properties have been provided since build 9200.

cpu_count.title: 设置虚拟处理器数量
notes: 虚拟处理器数量由 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData.VirtualQuantity 表示，类型为 uint64，赋值前应显式转换为 [uint64]。
修改单个资源使用 ModifyResourceSettings($proc.GetText(1))（嵌入实例须经 GetText(1) 序列化），而非 AddResourceSettings。
读回验证须从 $vm.__PATH 重新经关联 VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData 取新实例，原对象为旧快照不会自动刷新。
DefineSystem 的 OUT 参数名为 ResultingSystem。ModifyResourceSettings 返回 0 表示同步成功，返回 4096 表示异步任务，须轮询 Job。
无需虚拟机处于运行态即可修改虚拟处理器数量，离线修改即刻生效。
cpu_count.title_en: Set the Number of Virtual Processors
notes_en: The number of virtual processors is represented by Msvm_ProcessorSettingData.VirtualQuantity, of type uint64, and should be explicitly cast to [uint64] before assignment.
Modifying a single resource uses ModifyResourceSettings($proc.GetText(1)) (the embedded instance must be serialized with GetText(1)), rather than AddResourceSettings.

Reading back for verification requires obtaining a fresh instance from $vm.__PATH by traversing the associated VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData, because the original object is a stale snapshot that does not refresh automatically.
The OUT parameter of DefineSystem is named ResultingSystem. ModifyResourceSettings returning 0 indicates synchronous success, and returning 4096 indicates an asynchronous job that must be polled.
The virtual machine does not need to be running to modify the number of virtual processors; the offline modification takes effect immediately.

cpu_nested.title: 启用嵌套虚拟化
notes: 嵌套虚拟化通过将 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData.ExposeVirtualizationExtensions 置为 $true 并调用 ModifyResourceSettings 启用，读回为 True 表示生效。
ModifyResourceSettings 返回 0 表示同步成功，返回 4096 表示异步任务，须轮询 Job。
该属性须在虚拟机处于停止态时修改，对运行中的虚拟机修改会失败；本示例使用新创建的空虚拟机，天然处于停止态。
嵌套虚拟化的实际运行（在来宾内启动内层虚拟机）还需主机 CPU 支持 VT-x/EPT，本示例仅验证 WMI 属性的写入与读回。
notes_en: Nested virtualization is enabled by setting Msvm_ProcessorSettingData.ExposeVirtualizationExtensions to $true and calling ModifyResourceSettings; a read back of True indicates it has taken effect.
ModifyResourceSettings returning 0 indicates synchronous success, and returning 4096 indicates an asynchronous job that must be polled.

This property must be modified while the virtual machine is in the stopped state; modifying a running virtual machine fails. This example uses a newly created empty virtual machine, which is naturally in the stopped state.

Actually running nested virtualization (starting an inner virtual machine within the guest) further requires host CPU support for VT-x/EPT; this example only verifies writing and reading back the WMI property.

cpu_reserve_limit_weight.title: 设置 CPU 预留、上限与相对权重
notes: Reservation、Limit、Weight 均为 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData 上的属性（继承自 CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData）。Reservation 与 Limit 为 uint64，Weight 为 uint32。
单位说明：Reservation 与 Limit 以「单逻辑处理器百分比 * 1000」计。默认 Reservation=0，Limit=100000（即 100%），Weight=100。
修改方式：取出 ProcessorSettingData 实例，设置三个属性后经 GetText(1) 序列化传入 ModifyResourceSettings（以数组形式 @(...) 传参）。三个属性可一次性修改。
对停止态的空虚拟机无需启动即可修改。ModifyResourceSettings 返回 0 表示同步成功，返回 4096 表示异步任务，须轮询 Job。
清理使用 DestroySystem 移除测试虚拟机。
cpu_reserve_limit_weight.title_en: Configuring CPU Reservation, Limit, and Relative Weight
notes_en: Reservation, Limit, and Weight are all properties on Msvm_ProcessorSettingData (inherited from CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData). Reservation and Limit are uint64, and Weight is uint32.
Unit description: Reservation and Limit are expressed as per-logical-processor percentage * 1000. The defaults are Reservation=0, Limit=100000 (i.e., 100%), and Weight=100.

Modification procedure: retrieve the ProcessorSettingData instance, set the three properties, serialize via GetText(1), and pass the result to ModifyResourceSettings (supplied as an array with @(...)). All three properties can be modified in a single call.

An empty virtual machine in the stopped state can be modified without being started. ModifyResourceSettings returning 0 indicates synchronous success, while returning 4096 indicates an asynchronous job that must be polled.
Cleanup uses DestroySystem to remove the test virtual machine.

create_switch.title: 创建内部(Internal)虚拟交换机
notes: 使用 Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService.DefineSystem 创建交换机，签名与创建虚拟机的同名方法一致：DefineSystem(SystemSettings, ResourceSettings[], ReferenceConfiguration)；OUT 参数为 ResultingSystem 与 Job，返回码 0 表示成功、4096 表示异步 Job。

三种交换机的区别取决于 ResourceSettings 数组：Private 不传端口(空数组或 null)；Internal 传 1 个 Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData，其 HostResource 指向宿主 Msvm_ComputerSystem.__PATH(宿主由此获得一块 vNIC)；External 的 HostResource 指向物理 Msvm_ExternalEthernetPort。
端口的 ResourceSubType 由 provider 自动填为 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Ethernet Connection'，ResourceType=33，无需手动设置。
DefineSystem 走异步路径(返回 4096)时，OUT 参数 ResultingSystem 可能为空，需先用 Wait-Job2 等待 Job 到达 JobState=7(Completed)，再按 ElementName 反查 Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch 获取 __PATH。
定位宿主 Msvm_ComputerSystem 时，Caption/Description 为本地化字符串，不应按 'Hosting Computer System' 匹配；可靠判据是宿主的 Name 等于 ElementName(计算机名)，而虚拟机的 Name 为 GUID。
验证交换机类型时，不宜依赖 GetRelated('Msvm_InternalEthernetPort')(该关联不稳定)；应枚举交换机 SettingData 下的 Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData，按 HostResource 是否指向宿主判定 Internal。
清理使用 Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService.DestroySystem(switch.__PATH)，同样可能返回 4096 需等待；finally 块按 ElementName 兜底删除，避免异常时残留。
notes_en: The switch is created with Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService.DefineSystem, whose signature matches the method of the same name used to create a virtual machine: DefineSystem(SystemSettings, ResourceSettings[], ReferenceConfiguration). Its OUT parameters are ResultingSystem and Job; a return code of 0 indicates success and 4096 indicates an asynchronous job.

The distinction between the three switch types depends on the ResourceSettings array: Private passes no port (empty array or null); Internal passes one Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData whose HostResource points to the host Msvm_ComputerSystem.__PATH (giving the host a vNIC); External sets HostResource to a physical Msvm_ExternalEthernetPort.
The port's ResourceSubType is automatically filled in by the provider as 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Ethernet Connection' with ResourceType=33, and does not need to be set manually.

When DefineSystem takes the asynchronous path (returning 4096), the OUT parameter ResultingSystem may be empty; use Wait-Job2 to wait for the job to reach JobState=7 (Completed), then look up Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch by ElementName to obtain the __PATH.

When locating the host Msvm_ComputerSystem, Caption/Description are localized strings and should not be matched against 'Hosting Computer System'; a reliable criterion is that the host's Name equals its ElementName (computer name), whereas a VM's Name is a GUID.

When verifying the switch type, do not rely on GetRelated('Msvm_InternalEthernetPort') (that association is unreliable); instead enumerate the Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData under the switch's SettingData and determine Internal by whether HostResource points to the host.

Cleanup uses Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService.DestroySystem(switch.__PATH), which may likewise return 4096 and require waiting; the finally block removes by ElementName as a fallback to avoid residue on exceptions.

create_vhd.title: 创建 VHDX 文件
notes: 使用 Msvm_ImageManagementService.CreateVirtualHardDisk(VirtualDiskSettingData)，入参为 Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData 的嵌入实例，经 GetText(1) 序列化。

VirtualHardDiskSettingData 关键属性：Type(2=Fixed/3=Dynamic/4=Differencing)、Format(2=VHD/3=VHDX/4=VHDSet)、Path、MaxInternalSize(字节，uint64)；BlockSize/LogicalSectorSize/PhysicalSectorSize 设为 0 表示采用默认值(默认 BlockSize=33554432=32MiB，LogicalSector=512，PhysicalSector=4096)。
CreateVirtualHardDisk 通常返回 4096(异步 Job)，需用 Wait-Job2 轮询 ConcreteJob.JobState 直至 7(Completed)。
动态盘创建后的初始物理文件约 4MiB(4194304 字节)，并非声明的 MaxInternalSize。
读回校验使用 GetVirtualHardDiskSettingData(Path)，OUT 参数名为 SettingData，其内容为 CIM-XML(<INSTANCE><PROPERTY NAME=...><VALUE>...)，而非 MOF，应以 XML 正则取值。读回的 MaxInternalSize=68719476736=64GiB，与请求一致。
该操作仅生成磁盘文件，不创建虚拟机；清理只需 Remove-Item 删除 .vhdx。
notes_en: The operation uses Msvm_ImageManagementService.CreateVirtualHardDisk(VirtualDiskSettingData), whose input is an embedded instance of Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData serialized via GetText(1).

Key properties of VirtualHardDiskSettingData: Type (2=Fixed/3=Dynamic/4=Differencing), Format (2=VHD/3=VHDX/4=VHDSet), Path, and MaxInternalSize (in bytes, uint64); setting BlockSize/LogicalSectorSize/PhysicalSectorSize to 0 selects the default values (default BlockSize=33554432=32MiB, LogicalSector=512, PhysicalSector=4096).
CreateVirtualHardDisk typically returns 4096 (asynchronous job) and requires Wait-Job2 to poll ConcreteJob.JobState until it reaches 7 (Completed).
The initial physical file for a dynamic disk after creation is approximately 4MiB (4194304 bytes) rather than the declared MaxInternalSize.

Read-back verification uses GetVirtualHardDiskSettingData(Path); the OUT parameter is named SettingData and its content is CIM-XML (<INSTANCE><PROPERTY NAME=...><VALUE>...), not MOF, so values should be extracted with an XML regular expression. The read-back MaxInternalSize=68719476736=64GiB matches the request.
This operation only produces the disk file and does not create a virtual machine; cleanup only requires Remove-Item to delete the .vhdx.

dda_dismount_doc.title: DDA 设备直通流程与方法签名核对
dda_dismount_doc.code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

# ============ DDA (Discrete Device Assignment) 完整步骤 ============
# 服务: Msvm_AssignableDeviceService (CIM_Service 子类, 单例, 无 properties)
$ads = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_AssignableDeviceService

# --- STEP A: 主机侧 dismount (从主机拆下 PCIe 设备, 使其可被分配) ---
# 先在设备管理器/PnP 中禁用目标设备并获取其 PNP InstanceId 与 LocationPath。
# 构造 dismount 设置实例 (嵌入实例, 需 GetText(1) 序列化):
#   $dsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $dsd.DeviceInstancePath  = 'PCI\VEN_xxxx&DEV_xxxx\...'   # PNP device instance ID
#   $dsd.DeviceLocationPath  = 'PCIROOT(0)#PCI(....)'          # PNP location path
#   $dsd.RequireAcsSupport       = $true   # 要求 ACS 支持
#   $dsd.RequireDeviceMitigations= $true   # 要求设备缓解措施
#   $r = $ads.DismountAssignableDevice($dsd.GetText(1))
#   if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
#   # OUT: $r.DismountedDeviceInstancePath = 已拆下的设备实例路径
#   # 注意: 本脚本不执行实际 dismount (会影响主机物理设备), 仅核对方法签名。

# --- STEP B: 将已拆下的设备分配给 VM ---
# 经 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.AddResourceSettings, 资源类为
# Msvm_PciExpressSettingData (CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData 子类):
#   $pci = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_PciExpressSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $pci.HostResource = @($r.DismountedDeviceInstancePath)
#   # 可选: VirtualFunctions / NumaAwarePlacement / GuestPciExpressMode(0=Paravirtualized,1=Emulated)
#   $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd.__PATH, @($pci.GetText(1)))
# 大 BAR 设备(如 GPU) 还需在 Msvm_MemorySettingData 上设置 LowMmioGapSize/HighMmioGapSize。

# --- STEP C: 还原 — 从 VM 移除资源后, 将设备 mount 回主机 ---
#   $r2 = $ads.MountAssignableDevice($deviceInstancePath, $deviceLocationPath)
#   if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job }
#   # OUT: $r2.MountedDeviceInstancePath

# ============ 只读方法签名核对 ============
$cls = [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceService"
$dm  = $cls.Methods['DismountAssignableDevice']
($dm.InParameters.Properties  | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
($dm.OutParameters.Properties | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
$mm  = $cls.Methods['MountAssignableDevice']
($mm.InParameters.Properties  | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
($mm.OutParameters.Properties | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData").CreateInstance().Properties.Name
@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PciExpress).Count   # 主机可枚举的 PCIe 设备数
notes: 此条目为纯文档与只读任务：不执行实际 dismount(以免影响主机物理设备)，脚本仅核对类、方法、参数签名并进行枚举，不创建任何 VM。
Msvm_AssignableDeviceService 为单例服务类，无实例属性。
DismountAssignableDevice(IN: DismountSettingData，即嵌入的 Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData，经 GetText(1) 序列化；OUT: DismountedDeviceInstancePath, Job)。
MountAssignableDevice(IN: DeviceInstancePath, DeviceLocationPath；OUT: MountedDeviceInstancePath, Job)。两者返回 4096 时需用 Wait-Job2 等待。
Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData 关键可写字段：DeviceInstancePath、DeviceLocationPath、RequireAcsSupport、RequireDeviceMitigations(另含继承的 Caption/Description/ElementName/InstanceID)。
分配给 VM 使用资源类 Msvm_PciExpressSettingData(继承 CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData，共 28 个属性)，经 AddResourceSettings 下发；GPU 等大 BAR 设备另需设置 Low/HighMmioGapSize。
Get-WmiObject Msvm_PciExpress 用于枚举主机可分配的 PCIe 设备(仅作存在性记录，不触碰设备)。
返回码 ValueMap：0=成功，4096=异步 Job，32768-32779 为各类错误。
dda_dismount_doc.title_en: DDA Device Passthrough Workflow and Method Signature Review
notes_en: This entry is a documentation-only, read-only task: no actual dismount is performed (to avoid affecting a host physical device); the script only reviews the class, method, and parameter signatures and performs enumeration, without creating any VM.
Msvm_AssignableDeviceService is a singleton service class with no instance properties.
DismountAssignableDevice (IN: DismountSettingData, i.e., an embedded Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData serialized via GetText(1); OUT: DismountedDeviceInstancePath, Job).
MountAssignableDevice (IN: DeviceInstancePath, DeviceLocationPath; OUT: MountedDeviceInstancePath, Job). Both require Wait-Job2 when they return 4096.

Key writable fields of Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData: DeviceInstancePath, DeviceLocationPath, RequireAcsSupport, and RequireDeviceMitigations (plus the inherited Caption/Description/ElementName/InstanceID).

Assigning to a VM uses the resource class Msvm_PciExpressSettingData (inheriting from CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData, with 28 properties in total), applied via AddResourceSettings; large-BAR devices such as GPUs additionally require Low/HighMmioGapSize to be set.
Get-WmiObject Msvm_PciExpress is used to enumerate the assignable PCIe devices on the host (recorded only for existence, without touching the device).
Return code ValueMap: 0=success, 4096=asynchronous job, 32768-32779=various errors.
dda_dismount_doc.code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

# ============ DDA (Discrete Device Assignment) full procedure ============
# Service: Msvm_AssignableDeviceService (CIM_Service subclass, singleton, no properties)
$ads = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_AssignableDeviceService

# --- STEP A: host-side dismount (detach the PCIe device from the host so it can be assigned) ---
# First disable the target device in Device Manager/PnP and obtain its PNP InstanceId and LocationPath.
# Build the dismount setting instance (embedded instance, must be serialized via GetText(1)):
#   $dsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $dsd.DeviceInstancePath  = 'PCI\VEN_xxxx&DEV_xxxx\...'   # PNP device instance ID
#   $dsd.DeviceLocationPath  = 'PCIROOT(0)#PCI(....)'          # PNP location path
#   $dsd.RequireAcsSupport       = $true   # require ACS support
#   $dsd.RequireDeviceMitigations= $true   # require device mitigations
#   $r = $ads.DismountAssignableDevice($dsd.GetText(1))
#   if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
#   # OUT: $r.DismountedDeviceInstancePath = the instance path of the dismounted device
#   # Note: this script does not perform an actual dismount (which would affect a host physical device); it only reviews the method signatures.

# --- STEP B: assign the dismounted device to a VM ---
# Via Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.AddResourceSettings, with the resource class
# Msvm_PciExpressSettingData (CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData subclass):
#   $pci = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_PciExpressSettingData").CreateInstance()
#   $pci.HostResource = @($r.DismountedDeviceInstancePath)
#   # Optional: VirtualFunctions / NumaAwarePlacement / GuestPciExpressMode(0=Paravirtualized,1=Emulated)
#   $vsms.AddResourceSettings($vssd.__PATH, @($pci.GetText(1)))
# Large-BAR devices (such as GPUs) additionally require LowMmioGapSize/HighMmioGapSize to be set on Msvm_MemorySettingData.

# --- STEP C: restore — after removing the resource from the VM, mount the device back to the host ---
#   $r2 = $ads.MountAssignableDevice($deviceInstancePath, $deviceLocationPath)
#   if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job }
#   # OUT: $r2.MountedDeviceInstancePath

# ============ read-only method signature review ============
$cls = [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceService"
$dm  = $cls.Methods['DismountAssignableDevice']
($dm.InParameters.Properties  | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
($dm.OutParameters.Properties | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
$mm  = $cls.Methods['MountAssignableDevice']
($mm.InParameters.Properties  | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
($mm.OutParameters.Properties | % { $_.Name+':'+$_.Type }) -join ','
([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Msvm_AssignableDeviceDismountSettingData").CreateInstance().Properties.Name
@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PciExpress).Count   # number of PCIe devices enumerable on the host

def_gen1.title: 创建第一代虚拟机
notes: 第一代虚拟机设置 VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:1'(第二代为 SubType:2)。
DefineSystem 可能同步返回 ReturnValue=0(无 Job)，此时无需轮询；仍应保留 4096 走 Wait-Job2 的兜底分支以适配异步返回。
DefineSystem 的 OUT 参数名为 ResultingSystem，$r.ResultingSystem 即新建虚拟机的 __PATH。
嵌入实例须经 GetText(1) 序列化后传入。
清理使用 DestroySystem $vm.__PATH；脚本以 try/finally 保证清理。
notes_en: A Generation 1 virtual machine sets VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:1' (Generation 2 is SubType:2).

DefineSystem may return synchronously with ReturnValue=0 (no job), in which case no polling is needed; the 4096 branch calling Wait-Job2 should still be retained as a fallback to accommodate asynchronous returns.
The OUT parameter of DefineSystem is named ResultingSystem; $r.ResultingSystem is the __PATH of the newly created virtual machine.
The embedded instance must be serialized via GetText(1) before being passed in.
Cleanup uses DestroySystem $vm.__PATH; the script guarantees cleanup with try/finally.

def_gen2.title: 创建第二代虚拟机
def_gen2.code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$vmName = 'WMITEST_def_gen2'

function Wait-Job2($p) {
    if (-not $p) { return 7 }
    $j = [wmi]$p
    while ($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4) {
        Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200
        $j = [wmi]$p
    }
    return $j.JobState
}

$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# 构造第二代 (SubType:2) 设置实例
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $vmName
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'

$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { $null = Wait-Job2 $r.Job }
elseif ($r.ReturnValue -ne 0) { throw "DefineSystem failed: $($r.ReturnValue)" }

# OUT 参数名为 ResultingSystem
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# 从关联的 VSSD 读回子类型
$vssdRead = ([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$vssdRead.VirtualSystemSubType   # -> Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2

# 清理
$d = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { $null = Wait-Job2 $d.Job }
notes: DefineSystem 可能同步返回 0(无 Job)，此时无需等待；仍应保留 if 4096 走 Wait-Job2 的兜底分支以适配异步返回。
OUT 参数名为 ResultingSystem，[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem 即得到 Msvm_ComputerSystem。
第二代虚拟机设置 VSSD.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'(取值仅 SubType:1/SubType:2)；嵌入实例经 GetText(1) 序列化。
VirtualSystemSubType 须从虚拟机关联的 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 读回(Msvm_ComputerSystem 上不含该属性)。
DestroySystem 可能返回 4096(异步)，需用 Wait-Job2 等待。
notes_en: DefineSystem may return 0 synchronously (no job), in which case no waiting is needed; the if 4096 branch calling Wait-Job2 should still be retained as a fallback to accommodate asynchronous returns.
The OUT parameter is named ResultingSystem; [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem yields the Msvm_ComputerSystem.
A Generation 2 virtual machine sets VSSD.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2' (the only valid values are SubType:1/SubType:2); the embedded instance is serialized via GetText(1).
