Msvm_Processor.DeviceID has the format 'Microsoft:<GUID>\<socket>\<lp>', and ElementName is the localized "Logical Processor N".

Counting semantics differ: Msvm_Processor under root\virtualization\v2 counts logical processors from the hypervisor perspective (including all hardware threads), whereas Win32_Processor reflects the socket/core view; the two values are not directly interchangeable.

MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode and MaxNumaNodesPerSocket are NUMA projection fields on Msvm_ProcessorSettingData (per virtual machine), not on the host Msvm_Processor, and must be read through the virtual machine's VSSD -> ProcessorSettingData.
HwThreadsPerCore=0 means the host setting is inherited. VirtualNumaEnabled resides on the VSSD and defaults to True.

In a single-NUMA-node environment the NodeID has the form Microsoft:PhysicalNode\0, with no cross-node topology. DestroySystem may return 4096 asynchronously, so Wait-Job2 is required to wait for completion.
processor_topology.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

# --- A: Host logical processors (one instance per LP; DeviceID encodes the hypervisor LP index) ---
$hostProcs=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Processor)
'HostLogicalProcessors = '+$hostProcs.Count
$s=$hostProcs|Select-Object -First 1
'DeviceID = '+$s.DeviceID
'MaxClockSpeed(MHz) = '+$s.MaxClockSpeed

# Compare against the socket/core view of Win32_Processor
$w32=@(Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_Processor)
'Win32 Cores = '+($w32|Measure-Object NumberOfCores -Sum).Sum+' LP = '+($w32|Measure-Object NumberOfLogicalProcessors -Sum).Sum

# --- B: Host NUMA ---
$numa=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_NumaNode)
'HostNumaNodes = '+$numa.Count
'Numa[0] NodeID = '+($numa|Select-Object -First 1).NodeID

# --- C: The NUMA projection fields of ProcessorSettingData (create a temporary generation 2 virtual machine, read the default values, then delete it) ---
$vmName='WMITEST_processor_topology'; $vm=$null
try {
  $vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
  $vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\root\virtualization\v2:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName=$vmName; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
  $vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
  $vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $proc=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  'PSD MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode = '+$proc.MaxProcessorsPerNumaNode
  'PSD MaxNumaNodesPerSocket    = '+$proc.MaxNumaNodesPerSocket
  'PSD HwThreadsPerCore         = '+$proc.HwThreadsPerCore
  'VSSD VirtualNumaEnabled      = '+$vssd2.VirtualNumaEnabled
}
finally {
  if($vm -and $vm.__PATH){ $d=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($d.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $d.Job | Out-Null } }
}

read_dda_pool.title: 读取可直通设备 (DDA 可分配 PCI Express 设备)
read_dda_pool.code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
# 1) 枚举主机上可直通的 PCI Express 设备(DDA 候选)
$pcie = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PciExpress)
# 2) primordial PCI Express 资源池——可分配设备所属的池
$pool = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool |
    Where-Object { $_.ResourceSubType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Virtual Pci Express Port' -and $_.Primordial -eq $true } |
    Select-Object -First 1
# 3) 按 DeviceInstancePath 去重计设备数(每个物理设备可能有多个 Msvm_PciExpress 实例)
$paths = @($pcie | Select-Object -ExpandProperty DeviceInstancePath | Sort-Object -Unique)
Write-Output ('PCIE_INSTANCE_COUNT=' + $pcie.Count)
Write-Output ('DISTINCT_DEVICE_PATH_COUNT=' + $paths.Count)
foreach ($d in $pcie) {
    Write-Output ('DEV InstancePath=' + $d.DeviceInstancePath + ' | Location=' + $d.LocationPath)
}
if ($pool) { Write-Output ('POOL ResourceType=' + $pool.ResourceType + ' SubType=' + $pool.ResourceSubType + ' Primordial=' + $pool.Primordial) }
notes: 纯读操作，无需创建虚拟机，不涉及任何写入或破坏性操作。
主机可直通设备经 Msvm_PciExpress 暴露，关键只读属性为 DeviceID、DeviceInstancePath(PCIP\VEN_xxx&DEV_xxx...)、LocationPath(PCIROOT(..)#PCI(..)) 及 FunctionNumber。
可分配池为 Msvm_ResourcePool 中 ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Virtual Pci Express Port' 且 Primordial=True 的实例，ResourceType=32769。
同一物理设备可能返回多个 Msvm_PciExpress 实例但 DeviceInstancePath 相同（如经 PCIe-to-PCI 桥），应按 DeviceInstancePath 去重以得到真实设备数。
DDA 实际分配流程（不在本读取操作范围）：DismountAssignableDevice (Msvm_AssignableDeviceService) 将设备从主机卸载，再经 AddResourceSettings 将 Msvm_PciExpressSettingData 添加到目标虚拟机。列出的设备未必满足 DDA 直通预检（需 ACS、可重置、隔离等条件），本示例仅验证枚举读取。
Msvm_PciExpress 自 build 10586 起提供。
read_dda_pool.title_en: Read Pass-Through Devices (DDA Assignable PCI Express Devices)
notes_en: A pure read operation; it requires no virtual machine creation and involves no writes or destructive operations.

Host pass-through devices are exposed through Msvm_PciExpress, whose key read-only properties are DeviceID, DeviceInstancePath (PCIP\VEN_xxx&DEV_xxx...), LocationPath (PCIROOT(..)#PCI(..)), and FunctionNumber.
The assignable pool is the Msvm_ResourcePool instance with ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Virtual Pci Express Port' and Primordial=True, whose ResourceType=32769.

The same physical device may return multiple Msvm_PciExpress instances sharing the same DeviceInstancePath (for example, through a PCIe-to-PCI bridge), so devices should be deduplicated by DeviceInstancePath to obtain the true device count.

The actual DDA assignment flow (out of scope for this read operation): DismountAssignableDevice (Msvm_AssignableDeviceService) dismounts the device from the host, and then AddResourceSettings adds Msvm_PciExpressSettingData to the target virtual machine. The listed devices do not necessarily pass the DDA pass-through prechecks (which require conditions such as ACS, resettability, and isolation); this example only validates enumeration reads.
Msvm_PciExpress is available since build 10586.
read_dda_pool.code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
# 1) Enumerate the PCI Express devices on the host eligible for pass-through (DDA candidates)
$pcie = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PciExpress)
# 2) The primordial PCI Express resource pool -- the pool to which assignable devices belong
$pool = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool |
    Where-Object { $_.ResourceSubType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Virtual Pci Express Port' -and $_.Primordial -eq $true } |
    Select-Object -First 1
# 3) Count devices deduplicated by DeviceInstancePath (each physical device may have multiple Msvm_PciExpress instances)
$paths = @($pcie | Select-Object -ExpandProperty DeviceInstancePath | Sort-Object -Unique)
Write-Output ('PCIE_INSTANCE_COUNT=' + $pcie.Count)
Write-Output ('DISTINCT_DEVICE_PATH_COUNT=' + $paths.Count)
foreach ($d in $pcie) {
    Write-Output ('DEV InstancePath=' + $d.DeviceInstancePath + ' | Location=' + $d.LocationPath)
}
if ($pool) { Write-Output ('POOL ResourceType=' + $pool.ResourceType + ' SubType=' + $pool.ResourceSubType + ' Primordial=' + $pool.Primordial) }

read_gpu.title: 读取可分区 GPU
read_gpu.code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'

# 可分区 GPU（GPU-P 池）
$pgpu = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PartitionableGpu)
"PartitionableGpuCount=$($pgpu.Count)"
foreach ($g in $pgpu) {
    "Name=$($g.Name)"
    "ValidPartitionCounts=$($g.ValidPartitionCounts -join ',')"
    "TotalVRAM=$($g.TotalVRAM) AvailableVRAM=$($g.AvailableVRAM) OptimalPartitionVRAM=$($g.OptimalPartitionVRAM)"
    "TotalCompute=$($g.TotalCompute) AvailableCompute=$($g.AvailableCompute)"
}

# 物理 3D GPU（RemoteFX 时代；已弃用，通常为空）
$p3d = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor)
"Physical3dGpuCount=$($p3d.Count)"
foreach ($g in $p3d) {
    "GPUID=$($g.GPUID) EnabledForVirtualization=$($g.EnabledForVirtualization) CompatibleForVirtualization=$($g.CompatibleForVirtualization)"
    "DriverProvider=$($g.DriverProvider) DriverVersion=$($g.DriverVersion) DedicatedVideoMemory=$($g.DedicatedVideoMemory)"
}
notes: 纯读操作，无需创建虚拟机，无写入或清理。
Msvm_PartitionableGpu 枚举 GPU-P 可分区 GPU 池；Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor 对应 RemoteFX 时代的物理 3D GPU（已弃用，现代系统通常为 0 个）。
每个可分区 GPU 的 ValidPartitionCounts 列出其支持的分区数量取值集合。
Name 为 GPU 的设备接口路径(PCI#VEN_xxxx...{GUID}\GPUPARAV)，进行 GPU-P 分区时以此引用该 GPU。
VRAM/Compute 相关字段返回的是驱动上报的归一化抽象额度（分区时按比例分配），并非真实字节数，不应按物理显存字节解读。
Msvm_PartitionableGpu 主要属性包括 ValidPartitionCounts、PartitionCount，以及 Total/Available/Min/Max/OptimalPartition 前缀的 VRAM、Encode、Decode、Compute 字段与 SupportsIncomingLiveMigration。
notes_en: A pure read operation; it requires no virtual machine creation and performs no writes or cleanup.

Msvm_PartitionableGpu enumerates the pool of GPU-P partitionable GPUs; Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor corresponds to the physical 3D GPUs of the RemoteFX era (deprecated, typically 0 on modern systems).
The ValidPartitionCounts property of each partitionable GPU lists the set of supported partition-count values.
Name is the device interface path of the GPU (PCI#VEN_xxxx...{GUID}\GPUPARAV), which is used to reference the GPU when performing GPU-P partitioning.

The VRAM/Compute fields return normalized abstract quotas reported by the driver (allocated proportionally at partition time) rather than actual byte counts, and should not be interpreted as physical VRAM bytes.

The main properties of Msvm_PartitionableGpu include ValidPartitionCounts, PartitionCount, the VRAM, Encode, Decode, and Compute fields prefixed with Total/Available/Min/Max/OptimalPartition, and SupportsIncomingLiveMigration.
read_gpu.code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'

# Partitionable GPUs (GPU-P pool)
$pgpu = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_PartitionableGpu)
"PartitionableGpuCount=$($pgpu.Count)"
foreach ($g in $pgpu) {
    "Name=$($g.Name)"
    "ValidPartitionCounts=$($g.ValidPartitionCounts -join ',')"
    "TotalVRAM=$($g.TotalVRAM) AvailableVRAM=$($g.AvailableVRAM) OptimalPartitionVRAM=$($g.OptimalPartitionVRAM)"
    "TotalCompute=$($g.TotalCompute) AvailableCompute=$($g.AvailableCompute)"
}

# Physical 3D GPUs (RemoteFX era; deprecated, usually empty)
$p3d = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor)
"Physical3dGpuCount=$($p3d.Count)"
foreach ($g in $p3d) {
    "GPUID=$($g.GPUID) EnabledForVirtualization=$($g.EnabledForVirtualization) CompatibleForVirtualization=$($g.CompatibleForVirtualization)"
    "DriverProvider=$($g.DriverProvider) DriverVersion=$($g.DriverVersion) DedicatedVideoMemory=$($g.DedicatedVideoMemory)"
}

read_host.title: 读取宿主信息
read_host.code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'

# 枚举全部 Msvm_ComputerSystem。宿主与虚拟机的区别在于宿主没有关联的
# Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData（仅虚拟机经 Msvm_SettingsDefineState 关联 VSSD）。
# 语言无关：不要用 Caption/Description 判定，它们是本地化文本。
$all = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ComputerSystem
$host_cs = $null
foreach ($cs in $all) {
    # GetRelated 返回 ManagementObjectCollection（作为对象恒为真），
    # 需包裹 @() 后判断 .Count，而非用 -not。
    $vssd = @($cs.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData'))
    if ($vssd.Count -eq 0) { $host_cs = $cs; break }
}
if (-not $host_cs) { Write-Host 'FAIL: could not identify host'; exit 1 }

$hostName = $host_cs.ElementName

# 宿主逻辑 CPU 数与总内存从 Win32 读取（v2 命名空间的 Msvm_Processor
# 计的是全部虚拟处理器与宿主之和，并非宿主逻辑 CPU 数）。
$w32cs = Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_ComputerSystem
$logicalCpus = $w32cs.NumberOfLogicalProcessors
$totalMemMB  = [math]::Round([uint64]$w32cs.TotalPhysicalMemory / 1MB)

Write-Host "HOST ElementName       : $hostName"
Write-Host "HOST EnabledState      : $($host_cs.EnabledState)"
Write-Host "Win32 LogicalProcessors: $logicalCpus"
Write-Host "Total physical mem (MB): $totalMemMB"
notes: 宿主与虚拟机的语言无关区分法：宿主的 Msvm_ComputerSystem 没有关联的 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData（GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') 数量为 0），每台虚拟机则为 1。不应用 Caption/Description 判定，二者为本地化文本。
GetRelated 返回的是 ManagementObjectCollection（作为对象恒为真），需用 @(...).Count -eq 0 判空，不能用 -not $vssd。
宿主名取自 Msvm_ComputerSystem.ElementName；EnabledState=2 表示 Enabled。
宿主逻辑 CPU 数与物理内存应从 Win32_ComputerSystem 读取（NumberOfLogicalProcessors、TotalPhysicalMemory）。root\virtualization\v2 下的 Msvm_Processor 计数为全主机所有虚拟处理器与宿主之和，不可当作宿主逻辑 CPU 数使用。
纯读操作，不创建任何虚拟机，无需清理。
notes_en: The language-independent way to distinguish the host from a virtual machine: the host's Msvm_ComputerSystem has no associated Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData (GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') returns a count of 0), whereas each virtual machine returns 1. Caption/Description should not be used for this decision, since both are localized text.
GetRelated returns a ManagementObjectCollection (always truthy as an object), so emptiness must be tested with @(...).Count -eq 0 rather than -not $vssd.
The host name is taken from Msvm_ComputerSystem.ElementName; EnabledState=2 indicates Enabled.

The host logical CPU count and physical memory should be read from Win32_ComputerSystem (NumberOfLogicalProcessors, TotalPhysicalMemory). The Msvm_Processor count under root\virtualization\v2 is the sum of all virtual processors on the host and the host itself, and must not be used as the host logical CPU count.
A pure read operation; it creates no virtual machine and requires no cleanup.
read_host.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'

# Enumerate all Msvm_ComputerSystem. The host differs from a virtual machine in that the host has no associated
# Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData (only a virtual machine is associated with a VSSD through Msvm_SettingsDefineState).
# Language-independent: do not decide based on Caption/Description, which are localized text.
$all = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ComputerSystem
$host_cs = $null
foreach ($cs in $all) {
    # GetRelated returns a ManagementObjectCollection (always truthy as an object),
    # so it must be wrapped in @() and tested with .Count rather than -not.
    $vssd = @($cs.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData'))
    if ($vssd.Count -eq 0) { $host_cs = $cs; break }
}
if (-not $host_cs) { Write-Host 'FAIL: could not identify host'; exit 1 }

$hostName = $host_cs.ElementName

# The host logical CPU count and total memory are read from Win32 (Msvm_Processor in the v2 namespace
# counts the sum of all virtual processors and the host, not the host logical CPU count).
$w32cs = Get-WmiObject -Class Win32_ComputerSystem
$logicalCpus = $w32cs.NumberOfLogicalProcessors
$totalMemMB  = [math]::Round([uint64]$w32cs.TotalPhysicalMemory / 1MB)

Write-Host "HOST ElementName       : $hostName"
Write-Host "HOST EnabledState      : $($host_cs.EnabledState)"
Write-Host "Win32 LogicalProcessors: $logicalCpus"
Write-Host "Total physical mem (MB): $totalMemMB"

read_summary.title: 批量获取虚拟机概览信息
read_summary.code:
$ns   = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# RequestedInformation 常用码(子集):
#   0=Name(GUID) 1=ElementName 2=CreationTime 3=Notes
#   100=NumberOfProcessors 101=EnabledState 102=ProcessorLoad
#   103=ProcessorLoadHistory 104=MemoryUsage 105=Heartbeat 106=UpTime
#   107=GuestOperatingSystem 108=Snapshots 110=HealthState
$req = [uint32[]]@(0,1,2,3,100,101,102,104,105,106,107,110)

# 收集所有已实现虚拟机的 VirtualSystemSettingData,将其 __PATH 引用一次性传入。
$allVssd = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData |
           Where-Object { $_.VirtualSystemType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized' }
$paths = @($allVssd | ForEach-Object { $_.__PATH })

$r = $vsms.GetSummaryInformation([string[]]$paths, $req)   # 返回码 0=成功, 4096=异步 Job
if ($r.ReturnValue -ne 0) { throw "GetSummaryInformation rv=$($r.ReturnValue)" }

foreach ($info in $r.SummaryInformation) {
  [pscustomobject]@{
    ElementName  = $info.ElementName
    Guid         = $info.Name
    EnabledState = $info.EnabledState
    vCPU         = $info.NumberOfProcessors
    MemoryUsage  = $info.MemoryUsage
    ProcLoad     = $info.ProcessorLoad
    Heartbeat    = $info.Heartbeat
    UpTime       = $info.UpTime
    HealthState  = $info.HealthState
  }
}
notes: GetSummaryInformation 在 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService 上调用,为同步读操作,返回码 0 表示成功(非异步 Job)。
方法签名: GetSummaryInformation(SettingData[] IN, RequestedInformation uint32[] IN) -> (ReturnValue uint32, SummaryInformation Msvm_SummaryInformationBase[] OUT)。输出参数名为 SummaryInformation。
SettingData 参数为 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 的引用数组,直接传入各 VSSD 的 __PATH 字符串数组即可(PowerShell 按 ref 处理)。一次传入多个 path 可批量返回多行结果。
仅枚举已实现虚拟机时,以 VirtualSystemType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized' 过滤 VSSD,避免将快照或计划态配置一并计入。
RequestedInformation 决定返回哪些字段。运行时统计类字段(NumberOfProcessors、MemoryUsage、ProcessorLoad、Heartbeat、HealthState、UpTime)仅在虚拟机运行时填充;关机虚拟机上这些字段为空或为 0,属正常现象。
EnabledState=3 表示 Disabled(已关机)。身份字段 ElementName 与 Name(GUID)始终可读,不受运行状态影响。

RequestedInformation 常用码: 0=Name(GUID) 1=ElementName 2=CreationTime 3=Notes 100=NumberOfProcessors 101=EnabledState 102=ProcessorLoad 104=MemoryUsage 105=Heartbeat 106=UpTime 107=GuestOperatingSystem 110=HealthState。
read_summary.title_en: Batch Retrieval of Virtual Machine Summary Information
notes_en: GetSummaryInformation is invoked on Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService and is a synchronous read operation; a ReturnValue of 0 indicates success (not an asynchronous Job).

Method signature: GetSummaryInformation(SettingData[] IN, RequestedInformation uint32[] IN) -> (ReturnValue uint32, SummaryInformation Msvm_SummaryInformationBase[] OUT). The output parameter is named SummaryInformation.

The SettingData parameter is a reference array of Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData; the array of __PATH strings for each VSSD can be passed in directly (PowerShell handles it by ref). Passing multiple paths at once returns multiple rows of results in a single batch.
To enumerate only realized virtual machines, filter the VSSD by VirtualSystemType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized' to avoid including snapshots or planned-state configurations.

RequestedInformation determines which fields are returned. The runtime statistics fields (NumberOfProcessors, MemoryUsage, ProcessorLoad, Heartbeat, HealthState, UpTime) are populated only while the virtual machine is running; on a powered-off virtual machine these fields are empty or 0, which is normal.
EnabledState=3 indicates Disabled (powered off). The identity fields ElementName and Name(GUID) are always readable and are unaffected by run state.

Common RequestedInformation codes: 0=Name(GUID) 1=ElementName 2=CreationTime 3=Notes 100=NumberOfProcessors 101=EnabledState 102=ProcessorLoad 104=MemoryUsage 105=Heartbeat 106=UpTime 107=GuestOperatingSystem 110=HealthState.
read_summary.code_en:
$ns   = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# Common RequestedInformation codes (subset):
#   0=Name(GUID) 1=ElementName 2=CreationTime 3=Notes
#   100=NumberOfProcessors 101=EnabledState 102=ProcessorLoad
#   103=ProcessorLoadHistory 104=MemoryUsage 105=Heartbeat 106=UpTime
#   107=GuestOperatingSystem 108=Snapshots 110=HealthState
$req = [uint32[]]@(0,1,2,3,100,101,102,104,105,106,107,110)

# Collect the VirtualSystemSettingData of all realized virtual machines and pass their __PATH references in a single call.
$allVssd = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData |
           Where-Object { $_.VirtualSystemType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized' }
$paths = @($allVssd | ForEach-Object { $_.__PATH })

$r = $vsms.GetSummaryInformation([string[]]$paths, $req)   # ReturnValue 0=success, 4096=asynchronous Job
if ($r.ReturnValue -ne 0) { throw "GetSummaryInformation rv=$($r.ReturnValue)" }

foreach ($info in $r.SummaryInformation) {
  [pscustomobject]@{
    ElementName  = $info.ElementName
    Guid         = $info.Name
    EnabledState = $info.EnabledState
    vCPU         = $info.NumberOfProcessors
    MemoryUsage  = $info.MemoryUsage
    ProcLoad     = $info.ProcessorLoad
    Heartbeat    = $info.Heartbeat
    UpTime       = $info.UpTime
    HealthState  = $info.HealthState
  }
}

read_vm_list.title: 列出所有虚拟机
notes: 区分宿主与虚拟机的可靠方法: 在 Msvm_ComputerSystem 实例中,虚拟机的 Name 属性为 GUID,宿主的 Name 等于主机名(非 GUID)。不应使用 Caption 区分,因为 Caption 已本地化(如中文'承载系统/虚拟机'),按字符串匹配不可移植。
ElementName 为显示名;Name 为 GUID;EnabledState 常见值 2=Enabled(运行)、3=Disabled(关机)。EnabledState 可直接读取,无需轮询。
该操作为只读枚举,不调用任何 WMI 方法,不修改任何虚拟机。
notes_en: A reliable way to distinguish the host from virtual machines: in Msvm_ComputerSystem instances, the Name property of a virtual machine is a GUID, whereas the Name of the host equals the host name (not a GUID). Caption should not be used for this distinction, because Caption is localized (e.g., the Chinese terms for 'hosting system / virtual machine'), so string matching is not portable.
ElementName is the display name; Name is the GUID; common EnabledState values are 2=Enabled (running) and 3=Disabled (stopped). EnabledState can be read directly without polling.
This operation is a read-only enumeration; it does not call any WMI method and does not modify any virtual machine.

read_vm_settings.title: 读取虚拟机的配置与资源分配
read_vm_settings.code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- ComputerSystem -> (Msvm_SettingsDefineState) -> Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData ---
# $vm 为已存在的 Msvm_ComputerSystem;经 SettingsDefineState 关联取当前(已实现)VSSD。
$vssd = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData','Msvm_SettingsDefineState',$null,$null,$null,$null,$false,$null) | Select-Object -First 1
$vssdObj = [wmi]$vssd.__PATH
# ElementName / VirtualSystemSubType / Version
$vssdObj.ElementName; $vssdObj.VirtualSystemSubType; $vssdObj.Version
# --- ProcessorSettingData ---
$proc = [wmi]($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
$proc.VirtualQuantity; $proc.Reservation; $proc.Limit; $proc.Weight
# --- MemorySettingData ---
$mem = [wmi]($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_MemorySettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
$mem.VirtualQuantity; $mem.DynamicMemoryEnabled
# --- 所有资源分配(控制器/设备) ---
$rasd = @($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData'))
$rasd | ForEach-Object { '{0} {1}' -f $_.ResourceType, $_.ResourceSubType }
notes: 关键关联: Msvm_ComputerSystem 经 Msvm_SettingsDefineState 关联到当前(已实现)的 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData。快照设置同样是 VSSD,用 SettingsDefineState 限定关联类可仅取当前配置那一条,避免误取检查点设置。
在 VSSD 上用 GetRelated 直接获取 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData 与 Msvm_MemorySettingData(各一条),以及 Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData(所有控制器与设备)。第二代空虚拟机默认含 4 条 RASD: 虚拟键盘、串口控制器、合成鼠标、合成键盘,ResourceType 均为 13。
内存 VirtualQuantity 单位为 MB(默认 1024);CPU VirtualQuantity 为 vCPU 数;Limit=100000 表示 100%(以千分之一百分比为刻度)。
GetRelated 返回的是浅对象,需对其 .__PATH 再执行 [wmi] 获取完整实例,才能稳定读取全部属性。
该操作为纯读操作。将 $vm 替换为目标 Msvm_ComputerSystem 即可,不产生任何写入。
第二代虚拟机 VirtualSystemSubType 为 Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2;配置版本 Version=12.0 为 Windows Server 2025 默认。
read_vm_settings.title_en: Read a Virtual Machine's Configuration and Resource Allocation
notes_en: Key association: Msvm_ComputerSystem is associated through Msvm_SettingsDefineState to the current (realized) Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData. Snapshot settings are also VSSD, so constraining the association class with SettingsDefineState retrieves only the current configuration and avoids inadvertently picking up checkpoint settings.

On the VSSD, GetRelated directly retrieves Msvm_ProcessorSettingData and Msvm_MemorySettingData (one each), as well as Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData (all controllers and devices). An empty generation 2 virtual machine contains 4 RASD by default: virtual keyboard, serial controller, synthetic mouse, and synthetic keyboard, all with ResourceType 13.
Memory VirtualQuantity is in MB (default 1024); CPU VirtualQuantity is the number of vCPUs; Limit=100000 represents 100% (measured in units of one-thousandth of a percent).
GetRelated returns shallow objects; you must run [wmi] on their .__PATH to obtain the full instance before you can reliably read all properties.
This operation is purely read-only. Simply substitute $vm with the target Msvm_ComputerSystem; no writes are produced.
A generation 2 virtual machine has VirtualSystemSubType Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2; configuration version Version=12.0 is the Windows Server 2025 default.
read_vm_settings.code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- ComputerSystem -> (Msvm_SettingsDefineState) -> Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData ---
# $vm is an existing Msvm_ComputerSystem; retrieve the current (realized) VSSD through the SettingsDefineState association.
$vssd = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData','Msvm_SettingsDefineState',$null,$null,$null,$null,$false,$null) | Select-Object -First 1
$vssdObj = [wmi]$vssd.__PATH
# ElementName / VirtualSystemSubType / Version
$vssdObj.ElementName; $vssdObj.VirtualSystemSubType; $vssdObj.Version
# --- ProcessorSettingData ---
$proc = [wmi]($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
$proc.VirtualQuantity; $proc.Reservation; $proc.Limit; $proc.Weight
# --- MemorySettingData ---
$mem = [wmi]($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_MemorySettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
$mem.VirtualQuantity; $mem.DynamicMemoryEnabled
# --- All resource allocations (controllers/devices) ---
$rasd = @($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData'))
$rasd | ForEach-Object { '{0} {1}' -f $_.ResourceType, $_.ResourceSubType }

reference_point.title: 创建参考点(增量备份与变更块跟踪 RCT)
notes: Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePointService.CreateReferencePoint(AffectedSystem REF, ReferencePointSettings string, ReferencePointType uint16, ResultingReferencePoint IN/OUT REF) OUT Job。ReferencePointType: 0=Log based(Hyper-V 副本日志), 1=RCT based(基于虚拟磁盘弹性变更跟踪 RCT)。
前置条件: 虚拟机必须挂载至少一块 VHDX,否则创建参考点必然失败。无磁盘时 type=1 的 Job 报 ErrorCode=32770,type=0 返回 32773。参考点服务于增量备份与变更块跟踪(CBT)。挂盘后 type=1(RCT)可成功,返回 4096 并由 Job 完成。

ReferencePointSettings 可传 $null(可选;对应类 Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePointSettingData 仅含一个只读属性 ConsistencyLevel)。ResultingReferencePoint 虽为 IN/OUT REF 亦可传 $null,结果实例通过枚举 Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePoint 获取。
读回方式: 枚举 Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePoint,经 GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem')回到属主虚拟机比对 ElementName。可读回字段包括 ConsistencyLevel 与 ReferencePointType。
DestroyReferencePoint(AffectedReferencePoint REF) OUT Job 用于删除参考点,返回 4096 时需轮询 Job。DestroySystem 会连带清理该虚拟机的参考点,但显式删除更为稳妥。
所有写方法返回 4096 时需以 Wait-Job2 轮询;JobState 7=完成, 10=失败。
reference_point.title_en: Create a Reference Point (Incremental Backup and Resilient Change Tracking, RCT)
notes_en: Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePointService.CreateReferencePoint(AffectedSystem REF, ReferencePointSettings string, ReferencePointType uint16, ResultingReferencePoint IN/OUT REF) OUT Job. ReferencePointType: 0=Log based (Hyper-V Replica log), 1=RCT based (Resilient Change Tracking on the virtual disk).

Precondition: the virtual machine must have at least one VHDX attached, otherwise creating a reference point necessarily fails. With no disk, the type=1 Job reports ErrorCode=32770 and type=0 returns 32773. Reference points serve incremental backup and changed block tracking (CBT). Once a disk is attached, type=1 (RCT) succeeds, returning 4096 and completing through the Job.

ReferencePointSettings may be passed as $null (optional; the corresponding class Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePointSettingData contains only a single read-only property ConsistencyLevel). Although ResultingReferencePoint is an IN/OUT REF, it may also be passed as $null; the resulting instance is obtained by enumerating Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePoint.

Read-back method: enumerate Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePoint, then use GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem') to return to the owning virtual machine and compare ElementName. Readable fields include ConsistencyLevel and ReferencePointType.

DestroyReferencePoint(AffectedReferencePoint REF) OUT Job deletes a reference point; when it returns 4096, poll the Job. DestroySystem cleans up the virtual machine's reference points as well, but explicit deletion is more reliable.
When any write method returns 4096, poll with Wait-Job2; JobState 7=completed, 10=failed.

rename_vm.title: 重命名虚拟机
rename_vm.code:
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# $vm 为目标虚拟机(例如来自 DefineSystem 或 Msvm_ComputerSystem)
# 获取该虚拟机当前的 VirtualSystemSettingData
$vssd=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
# 修改 ElementName 并经 ModifySystemSettings 提交(SystemSettings IN string, Job OUT)
$vssd.ElementName='NewVmName'
$r=$vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
# 返回码 0 表示成功。读回校验:
$vm2=[wmi]$vm.__PATH
$check=$vm2.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
Write-Output $check.ElementName   # -> NewVmName ; $vm2.ElementName 同步更新
notes: 重命名通过整机设置完成: 修改 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData.ElementName 后,以 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1)) 提交,而非直接修改 Msvm_ComputerSystem。
ModifySystemSettings 签名: SystemSettings(IN string,须为 GetText(1) 序列化结果且含有效 InstanceID), Job(OUT ref CIM_ConcreteJob)。该方法通常同步返回 rv=0,不进入 4096 Job 流程。
改名后 Msvm_ComputerSystem.ElementName 与 VSSD.ElementName 同步更新;需重新以 [wmi]$vm.__PATH 获取最新对象再读回。
返回码: 0=成功, 1=不支持, 2=失败, 4=参数无效, 5=状态无效, 6=参数不兼容, 4096=Job 已启动(需 Wait-Job2 轮询)。
notes_en: Renaming is performed through the whole-system settings: modify Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData.ElementName and then commit it with Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1)), rather than modifying Msvm_ComputerSystem directly.

ModifySystemSettings signature: SystemSettings (IN string, must be the GetText(1) serialization result and contain a valid InstanceID), Job (OUT ref CIM_ConcreteJob). This method usually returns rv=0 synchronously and does not enter the 4096 Job flow.
After renaming, Msvm_ComputerSystem.ElementName and VSSD.ElementName are updated together; the latest object must be re-fetched with [wmi]$vm.__PATH before reading it back.
Return codes: 0=Success, 1=Not Supported, 2=Failed, 4=Invalid Parameter, 5=Invalid State, 6=Incompatible Parameters, 4096=Job Started (requires polling with Wait-Job2).
rename_vm.code_en:
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# $vm is the target virtual machine (e.g., from DefineSystem or Msvm_ComputerSystem)
# Get the virtual machine's current VirtualSystemSettingData
$vssd=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
# Modify ElementName and commit via ModifySystemSettings (SystemSettings IN string, Job OUT)
$vssd.ElementName='NewVmName'
$r=$vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
# Return code 0 indicates success. Read-back verification:
$vm2=[wmi]$vm.__PATH
$check=$vm2.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
Write-Output $check.ElementName   # -> NewVmName ; $vm2.ElementName is updated in sync

replication_caps.title: 读取主机复制能力与配置
replication_caps.code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'

# 1) Msvm_ReplicationService —— 主机复制服务(单例)
$svc = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ReplicationService
$svc.ElementName

# 2) Msvm_ReplicationServiceSettingData —— 主机复制配置(端口/认证/监控)
$rssd = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ReplicationServiceSettingData
$authMap = @{ 1='Kerberos'; 2='Certificate'; 3='CertAndKerberos' }
[pscustomobject]@{
    RecoveryServerEnabled     = $rssd.RecoveryServerEnabled
    AllowedAuthenticationType = $rssd.AllowedAuthenticationType   # 0=未配置(禁用时), 1=Kerberos, 2=Cert, 3=both
    AuthText                  = $authMap[[int]$rssd.AllowedAuthenticationType]
    HttpPort                  = $rssd.HttpPort
    HttpsPort                 = $rssd.HttpsPort
    CertificateThumbPrint     = $rssd.CertificateThumbPrint
    MonitoringInterval        = $rssd.MonitoringInterval        # 秒, 默认43200=12h
    MonitoringStartTime       = $rssd.MonitoringStartTime
} | Format-List

# 3) Msvm_ReplicationSettingData —— 复制设置模板/各VM复制设置(枚举)
$rsd = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ReplicationSettingData)
"ReplicationSettingData instances = $($rsd.Count)"
notes: 此配方为纯读取操作，无需创建虚拟机，不产生写入或清理。
涉及三个类，均可用 Get-WmiObject 直接枚举：Msvm_ReplicationService 为单例主机服务；Msvm_ReplicationServiceSettingData 保存主机复制配置(端口/认证/监控)，其属性均为只读，修改须通过 Msvm_ReplicationService.ModifyServiceSettings 下发。

当 RecoveryServerEnabled=False（未作为复制副本服务器启用）时，AllowedAuthenticationType 通常为 0（未配置）。默认 HttpPort=80、HttpsPort=443。MonitoringInterval 以秒计，默认 43200（即 12 小时）。AllowedAuthenticationType 枚举：1=Kerberos，2=Certificate，3=两者兼有。
Msvm_ReplicationSettingData 可存在多个实例，包含每台虚拟机的复制参数与默认模板，属性含 ReplicationInterval、CompressionEnabled、RecoveryHistory、AuthenticationType 等。
ElementName 存储的是 UTF-16 值；在按 GBK 渲染的控制台中可能显示为乱码，属显示层现象，不影响读取到的实际值。
以上三个类自 build 9200 起提供，属性集稳定。
replication_caps.title_en: Read Host Replication Capabilities and Configuration
notes_en: This recipe is a pure read operation; it requires no virtual machine creation and produces no writes or cleanup.

Three classes are involved, all of which can be enumerated directly with Get-WmiObject: Msvm_ReplicationService is the singleton host service; Msvm_ReplicationServiceSettingData holds the host replication configuration (ports/authentication/monitoring), and its properties are read-only, with modifications required through Msvm_ReplicationService.ModifyServiceSettings.

When RecoveryServerEnabled=False (not enabled as a replica server), AllowedAuthenticationType is usually 0 (not configured). The defaults are HttpPort=80 and HttpsPort=443. MonitoringInterval is measured in seconds, defaulting to 43200 (i.e., 12 hours). AllowedAuthenticationType enumeration: 1=Kerberos, 2=Certificate, 3=both.

Msvm_ReplicationSettingData may have multiple instances, containing the replication parameters for each virtual machine as well as the default template; its properties include ReplicationInterval, CompressionEnabled, RecoveryHistory, AuthenticationType, and others.
ElementName stores a UTF-16 value; in a console rendered as GBK it may appear as garbled text, which is a display-layer artifact and does not affect the actual value read.
These three classes have been available since build 9200, and their property sets are stable.
replication_caps.code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'

# 1) Msvm_ReplicationService -- host replication service (singleton)
$svc = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ReplicationService
$svc.ElementName

# 2) Msvm_ReplicationServiceSettingData -- host replication configuration (ports/authentication/monitoring)
$rssd = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ReplicationServiceSettingData
$authMap = @{ 1='Kerberos'; 2='Certificate'; 3='CertAndKerberos' }
[pscustomobject]@{
    RecoveryServerEnabled     = $rssd.RecoveryServerEnabled
    AllowedAuthenticationType = $rssd.AllowedAuthenticationType   # 0=not configured (when disabled), 1=Kerberos, 2=Cert, 3=both
    AuthText                  = $authMap[[int]$rssd.AllowedAuthenticationType]
    HttpPort                  = $rssd.HttpPort
    HttpsPort                 = $rssd.HttpsPort
    CertificateThumbPrint     = $rssd.CertificateThumbPrint
    MonitoringInterval        = $rssd.MonitoringInterval        # seconds, default 43200=12h
    MonitoringStartTime       = $rssd.MonitoringStartTime
} | Format-List

# 3) Msvm_ReplicationSettingData -- replication settings template / per-VM replication settings (enumeration)
$rsd = @(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ReplicationSettingData)
"ReplicationSettingData instances = $($rsd.Count)"

resource_pool_create.title: 创建自定义资源池
resource_pool_create.code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$rpcs = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService
$poolId = 'MyMemoryPool'

# 1) 取作为父池的根(primordial)池, 此处使用内存根池(ResourceType=4)
$parent = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object {
  $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 -and $_.ResourceSubType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
} | Select-Object -First 1

# 2) PoolSettings: Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData, 属性名为 PoolID(ID 大写)
$rpsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData").CreateInstance()
$rpsd.PoolID = $poolId
$rpsd.ResourceType = [uint16]4
$rpsd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'

# 3) AllocationSettings: 对应资源类型的 RASD(内存=Msvm_MemorySettingData)
#    PoolID 必须等于【新建子池】的 PoolID(不是父池的空字符串);
#    各配额(Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight)均填 0 -> 子池从父池按需取用
$masd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_MemorySettingData").CreateInstance()
$masd.PoolID = $poolId
$masd.ResourceType = [uint16]4
$masd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
$masd.Reservation = [uint64]0
$masd.Limit = [uint64]0
$masd.VirtualQuantity = [uint64]0
$masd.Weight = [uint32]0

# 4) CreatePool 签名:
#    CreatePool(PoolSettings string, ParentPools REF[], AllocationSettings string[]) -> OUT Pool, Job
$r = $rpcs.CreatePool($rpsd.GetText(1), @($parent.__PATH), @($masd.GetText(1)))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }

# 5) 读回校验
$child = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object { $_.PoolId -eq $poolId } | Select-Object -First 1
$child | Format-List PoolId, ResourceType, Primordial, InstanceID

# 6) 删除子池: DeletePool(Pool REF) -> OUT Job
$rd = $rpcs.DeletePool($child.__PATH)
if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
notes: 创建与删除资源池的方法为 Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService.CreatePool / DeletePool。
CreatePool 的三个输入参数为：PoolSettings（Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData 内嵌实例字符串）、ParentPools（REF 数组）、AllocationSettings（对应资源 RASD 内嵌实例的字符串数组）；输出为 Pool(REF) 与 Job。内存池场景通常同步完成并返回 0，无需轮询 Job。
设置实例时属性名为 PoolID（ID 大写）。读回时实例以只读属性 PoolId 暴露。WMI 属性名大小写不敏感，写入与过滤两种写法均可。

常见陷阱：AllocationSettings 中 RASD 的 PoolID 必须等于新建子池的 PoolID（而非父池的空字符串），且 Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight 必须全部为 0，以便子池从父池按需取用。若沿用父池空 PoolID 或设置了非零预留，CreatePool 提交的 Job 会失败并返回 ErrorCode=32773（Invalid Parameter，提示缺少资源类型）。
内置 New-VMResourcePool cmdlet 生成的子池 RPSD 与 MemorySettingData 中所有配额均为 0，且 PoolID 均指向子池名，可作为写法参照。
父池取根(primordial)池：Get-WmiObject Msvm_ResourcePool | ?{ $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 }。各资源类型（内存 4、处理器 3、以太网 10、VHD 31、GPU 分区 32770 等）均有对应根池可作父池。
DeletePool 要求子池无未结分配，否则返回 In Use（32774）。空子池可直接删除并返回 0。
Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService 自 build 9200 起提供，稳定可用。
notes_en: The methods for creating and deleting a resource pool are Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService.CreatePool / DeletePool.

The three input parameters of CreatePool are: PoolSettings (an embedded Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData instance string), ParentPools (a REF array), and AllocationSettings (an array of embedded RASD instance strings for the corresponding resource); the outputs are Pool (REF) and Job. For the memory pool scenario it typically completes synchronously and returns 0, with no need to poll the Job.

When setting the instance, the property name is PoolID (with ID in uppercase). On read-back the instance exposes the read-only property PoolId. WMI property names are case-insensitive, so either spelling works for both writing and filtering.

Common pitfall: in AllocationSettings, the RASD's PoolID must equal the PoolID of the new child pool (not the parent pool's empty string), and Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight must all be 0 so the child pool draws from the parent pool on demand. If the parent pool's empty PoolID is reused or a non-zero reservation is set, the Job submitted by CreatePool fails and returns ErrorCode=32773 (Invalid Parameter, indicating a missing resource type).

The child pool RPSD and MemorySettingData produced by the built-in New-VMResourcePool cmdlet have all quotas set to 0 and their PoolID pointing at the child pool name, which can serve as a reference pattern.

Take the parent pool as the primordial root pool: Get-WmiObject Msvm_ResourcePool | ?{ $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 }. Each resource type (memory 4, processor 3, Ethernet 10, VHD 31, GPU partition 32770, etc.) has a corresponding root pool that can serve as the parent.
DeletePool requires the child pool to have no outstanding allocations; otherwise it returns In Use (32774). An empty child pool can be deleted directly and returns 0.
Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService has been available since build 9200 and is stable.
resource_pool_create.code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$rpcs = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService
$poolId = 'MyMemoryPool'

# 1) Get the root (primordial) pool to use as the parent; here the memory root pool (ResourceType=4) is used
$parent = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object {
  $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 -and $_.ResourceSubType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
} | Select-Object -First 1

# 2) PoolSettings: Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData, with the property named PoolID (ID uppercase)
$rpsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData").CreateInstance()
$rpsd.PoolID = $poolId
$rpsd.ResourceType = [uint16]4
$rpsd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'

# 3) AllocationSettings: the RASD for the corresponding resource type (memory = Msvm_MemorySettingData)
#    PoolID must equal the PoolID of the [newly created child pool] (not the parent pool's empty string);
#    each quota (Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight) is set to 0 -> the child pool draws from the parent pool on demand
$masd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_MemorySettingData").CreateInstance()
$masd.PoolID = $poolId
$masd.ResourceType = [uint16]4
$masd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
$masd.Reservation = [uint64]0
$masd.Limit = [uint64]0
$masd.VirtualQuantity = [uint64]0
$masd.Weight = [uint32]0

# 4) CreatePool signature:
#    CreatePool(PoolSettings string, ParentPools REF[], AllocationSettings string[]) -> OUT Pool, Job
$r = $rpcs.CreatePool($rpsd.GetText(1), @($parent.__PATH), @($masd.GetText(1)))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }

# 5) Read back and verify
$child = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object { $_.PoolId -eq $poolId } | Select-Object -First 1
$child | Format-List PoolId, ResourceType, Primordial, InstanceID

# 6) Delete the child pool: DeletePool(Pool REF) -> OUT Job
$rd = $rpcs.DeletePool($child.__PATH)
if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }

save_restore_state.title: 保存并恢复虚拟机状态
save_restore_state.code:
# 保存/恢复VM状态。RequestStateChange 的 RequestedState 枚举。
$vm=[wmi]$vmPath   # Msvm_ComputerSystem
# RequestedState 取值: 2=Running 3=Off 4=Stopping 6=Saved 9=Paused 10=Starting 11=Reset
#                      32773=Saving 32776=Pausing 32777=Resuming 32779=FastSaved 32780=FastSaving
$vm.RequestStateChange([uint16]2,$null)   # 启动
$vm.RequestStateChange([uint16]6,$null)   # 保存(目标稳定态 Saved=6)。之后 EnabledState 读回可能为 6 或 32769=已保存
$vm.RequestStateChange([uint16]2,$null)   # 从保存态恢复(=启动)
# 返回 4096 则轮询 Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState 至 7
notes: 启动虚拟机后调用 RequestStateChange(6) 可将其转入保存态（成功时 JobState=7，EnabledState=6）。
RequestStateChange 的 RequestedState 枚举：2=Running，3=Off，4=Stopping，6=Saved，9=Paused，10=Starting，11=Reset，32773=Saving，32776=Pausing，32777=Resuming，32779=FastSaved，32780=FastSaving。
保存操作应传入稳定态 6（Saved），32773（Saving）为过渡态，不应作为目标传入。EnabledState 读回可能显示 32769=Saved，该属性枚举与 RequestedState 枚举不同，二者不可混用。
恢复保存态虚拟机：对其调用 RequestStateChange([uint16]2) 即从保存态启动。对应 cmdlet 语义为 Save-VM=ChangeState(Save=6)，Resume=RequestStateChange(2)。
方法返回 4096 表示异步执行，需轮询关联 Msvm_ConcreteJob 的 JobState 至 7 判定成功。
save_restore_state.title_en: Save and Restore Virtual Machine State
notes_en: After starting the virtual machine, calling RequestStateChange(6) transitions it into the saved state (on success, JobState=7 and EnabledState=6).

The RequestedState enumeration for RequestStateChange: 2=Running, 3=Off, 4=Stopping, 6=Saved, 9=Paused, 10=Starting, 11=Reset, 32773=Saving, 32776=Pausing, 32777=Resuming, 32779=FastSaved, 32780=FastSaving.

The save operation should pass the stable state 6 (Saved); 32773 (Saving) is a transitional state and should not be passed as the target. On read-back, EnabledState may show 32769=Saved; this property's enumeration differs from the RequestedState enumeration, and the two must not be conflated.

To restore a saved virtual machine: call RequestStateChange([uint16]2) on it to start from the saved state. The corresponding cmdlet semantics are Save-VM=ChangeState(Save=6) and Resume=RequestStateChange(2).
A method return of 4096 indicates asynchronous execution; poll the associated Msvm_ConcreteJob's JobState until 7 to determine success.
save_restore_state.code_en:
# Save/restore VM state. The RequestedState enumeration of RequestStateChange.
$vm=[wmi]$vmPath   # Msvm_ComputerSystem
# RequestedState values: 2=Running 3=Off 4=Stopping 6=Saved 9=Paused 10=Starting 11=Reset
#                      32773=Saving 32776=Pausing 32777=Resuming 32779=FastSaved 32780=FastSaving
$vm.RequestStateChange([uint16]2,$null)   # Start
$vm.RequestStateChange([uint16]6,$null)   # Save (target stable state Saved=6). Afterwards EnabledState may read back as 6 or 32769=Saved
$vm.RequestStateChange([uint16]2,$null)   # Restore from saved state (= start)
# If it returns 4096, poll Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState until 7

secureboot_template.title: 设置安全启动模板 (SecureBootTemplateId)
secureboot_template.code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
# 常用安全启动模板 GUID
$tplWindows='1734c6e8-3154-4dda-ba5f-a874cc483422'  # MicrosoftWindows (Gen2 默认)
$tplMSUEFI ='272e7447-90a4-4563-a4b9-8e4ab00526ce'  # MicrosoftUEFICertificateAuthority (Linux/第三方)
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# 创建第二代虚拟机
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_secureboot_template'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
# 读取当前设置并写入模板
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled=$true
$vssd2.SecureBootTemplateId=$tplMSUEFI
$mr=$vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if($mr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $mr.Job|Out-Null}
# 读回(需从 VM 路径重新 GetRelated 取 VSSD)
$got=(([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1).SecureBootTemplateId
Write-Host "SecureBootTemplateId=$got"
# 清理
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)|Out-Null
notes: 安全启动模板属性位于 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData，名为 SecureBootTemplateId（string，可读写），通过 ModifySystemSettings 下发，而非 ModifyResourceSettings。
两个常用模板 GUID：MicrosoftWindows=1734c6e8-3154-4dda-ba5f-a874cc483422（第二代虚拟机新建时的默认值）；MicrosoftUEFICertificateAuthority=272e7447-90a4-4563-a4b9-8e4ab00526ce（适用于 Linux 及第三方系统）。
读回的 GUID 为大写形式，比较时应先统一大小写（如 ToLower()）。新建第二代虚拟机时默认 SecureBootEnabled=True 且模板为 MicrosoftWindows。
修改后须从 $vm.__PATH 重新 GetRelated 获取 VSSD 才能读到新值，原有 $vssd2 句柄仍为修改前的快照。ModifySystemSettings 在本操作中同步返回 0。
notes_en: The secure boot template property resides in Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData and is named SecureBootTemplateId (string, read/write); it is applied via ModifySystemSettings rather than ModifyResourceSettings.

Two commonly used template GUIDs: MicrosoftWindows=1734c6e8-3154-4dda-ba5f-a874cc483422 (the default value when creating a Generation 2 virtual machine); MicrosoftUEFICertificateAuthority=272e7447-90a4-4563-a4b9-8e4ab00526ce (for Linux and third-party systems).

The GUID read back is in uppercase form, so normalize the case (e.g. ToLower()) before comparing. A newly created Generation 2 virtual machine defaults to SecureBootEnabled=True with the MicrosoftWindows template.

After modification, you must re-obtain the VSSD via GetRelated from $vm.__PATH to read the new value; the existing $vssd2 handle remains a snapshot from before the change. ModifySystemSettings returns 0 synchronously in this operation.
secureboot_template.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
# Commonly used secure boot template GUIDs
$tplWindows='1734c6e8-3154-4dda-ba5f-a874cc483422'  # MicrosoftWindows (Gen2 default)
$tplMSUEFI ='272e7447-90a4-4563-a4b9-8e4ab00526ce'  # MicrosoftUEFICertificateAuthority (Linux/third-party)
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# Create a Generation 2 virtual machine
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_secureboot_template'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
# Read the current settings and write the template
$vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled=$true
$vssd2.SecureBootTemplateId=$tplMSUEFI
$mr=$vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if($mr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $mr.Job|Out-Null}
# Read back (re-obtain the VSSD via GetRelated from the VM path)
$got=(([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1).SecureBootTemplateId
Write-Host "SecureBootTemplateId=$got"
# Cleanup
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)|Out-Null

serial_com.title: 配置虚拟机串口连接命名管道
notes: 第二代虚拟机创建后默认即有 2 个串口（COM 1、COM 2），无需 AddResourceSettings；直接从 VSSD 经 GetRelated('Msvm_SerialPortSettingData') 取得已存在的 RASD 修改即可。
关键属性为 Connection（string[] 数组），继承自 CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData，并非 Msvm_SerialPortSettingData 自身声明。该类自身仅显式声明 DebuggerMode 属性。
Connection 须赋字符串数组 @('\\.\pipe\NAME')。命名管道路径格式为 \\.\pipe\<name>（本地管道）或 \\<server>\pipe\<name>（远程）。
ResourceSubType 为 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Serial Port'。COM 1 的 InstanceID 以 \0 结尾，COM 2 以 \1 结尾。
ModifyResourceSettings 通常返回 0 并立即生效；返回 4096 时按 Job 轮询。
ModifyResourceSettings 仅修改单个资源；修改后用相同的 GetRelated 重取，并按 InstanceID 匹配读回验证。
serial_com.title_en: Configure a Virtual Machine Serial Port to Connect to a Named Pipe
notes_en: After a Generation 2 virtual machine is created, it has 2 serial ports (COM 1, COM 2) by default, with no need for AddResourceSettings; simply obtain the existing RASD from the VSSD via GetRelated('Msvm_SerialPortSettingData') and modify it.

The key property is Connection (a string[] array), inherited from CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData rather than declared by Msvm_SerialPortSettingData itself. That class only explicitly declares the DebuggerMode property.
Connection must be assigned a string array @('\\.\pipe\NAME'). The named pipe path format is \\.\pipe\<name> (local pipe) or \\<server>\pipe\<name> (remote).
The ResourceSubType is 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Serial Port'. COM 1's InstanceID ends with \0, and COM 2's ends with \1.
ModifyResourceSettings usually returns 0 and takes effect immediately; when it returns 4096, poll the Job.
ModifyResourceSettings modifies only a single resource; after modification, re-obtain it with the same GetRelated and verify the read-back by matching on InstanceID.

serial_pipe_full.title: 为双串口分别配置命名管道
serial_pipe_full.code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$name='WMITEST_serial_pipe_full'
$pipe1='\\.\pipe\wmitest_com1'
$pipe2='\\.\pipe\wmitest_com2'

# 创建第二代虚拟机
$cls=[wmiclass]("\\.\" + $ns + ":Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData")
$vssd=$cls.CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName=$name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

try {
  # 新建虚拟机的 COM1/COM2 已存在, 此处执行修改而非添加
  $vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $serials=@(([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SerialPortSettingData') | Sort-Object InstanceID)
  # serials[0]=COM1 (InstanceID ...\0), serials[1]=COM2 (...\1)
  $com1=$serials[0]; $com1.Connection=@($pipe1)
  $com2=$serials[1]; $com2.Connection=@($pipe2)
  $r1=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings(@($com1.GetText(1))); if($r1.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r1.Job | Out-Null }
  $r2=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings(@($com2.GetText(1))); if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }

  # 读回(重新查询, 不依赖本地对象缓存)
  $vssd3=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $serials2=@(([wmi]$vssd3.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SerialPortSettingData') | Sort-Object InstanceID)
  'COM1 Connection=' + ($serials2[0].Connection -join ',')
  'COM2 Connection=' + ($serials2[1].Connection -join ',')
}
finally {
  $rd=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
}
notes: 串口不通过 AddResourceSettings 添加：每台虚拟机（第一代/第二代）创建后即自带 COM1、COM2 两个 Msvm_SerialPortSettingData，只能用 ModifyResourceSettings 修改其 Connection。
区分 COM1/COM2 依据 InstanceID 尾号：...\0 为 COM1，...\1 为 COM2；ElementName 为带空格的 'COM 1' / 'COM 2'。按 InstanceID 排序最为稳定。
Connection 属性继承自父类 CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData，类型为 string[]（数组），赋值须用 @('\\.\pipe\name')；Msvm_SerialPortSettingData 自身仅独有 DebuggerMode 布尔属性。
命名管道路径形如 \\.\pipe\<name>（主机本地管道）。两个端口可各自配置不同管道，互不影响。
ModifyResourceSettings 返回 0 表示直接成功；返回 4096 时按 Job 轮询。修改后需重新 GetRelated 读回验证，不应依赖本地对象缓存。
PowerShell 5.1 注意：[wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class" 中 $ns 紧跟冒号会被解析为 ${ns:...} 作用域取值而报错；改用字符串拼接 ("\\.\" + $ns + ":Class") 可规避。
serial_pipe_full.title_en: Configure Named Pipes Separately for Both Serial Ports
notes_en: Serial ports are not added via AddResourceSettings: after each virtual machine (Generation 1 or Generation 2) is created, it comes with two Msvm_SerialPortSettingData ports, COM1 and COM2, whose Connection can only be modified using ModifyResourceSettings.
Distinguish COM1/COM2 by the InstanceID suffix: ...\0 is COM1 and ...\1 is COM2; ElementName is 'COM 1' / 'COM 2' with a space. Sorting by InstanceID is the most stable approach.

The Connection property is inherited from the parent class CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData and is of type string[] (an array); it must be assigned with @('\\.\pipe\name'). Msvm_SerialPortSettingData itself only has the unique boolean property DebuggerMode.
The named pipe path takes the form \\.\pipe\<name> (a host-local pipe). The two ports can each be configured with a different pipe, independently of one another.

ModifyResourceSettings returning 0 indicates immediate success; when it returns 4096, poll the Job. After modification, re-obtain the values via GetRelated for verification rather than relying on the local object cache.

PowerShell 5.1 note: in [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class", $ns immediately followed by a colon is parsed as a ${ns:...} scope reference and raises an error; use string concatenation ("\\.\" + $ns + ":Class") to avoid this.
serial_pipe_full.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$name='WMITEST_serial_pipe_full'
$pipe1='\\.\pipe\wmitest_com1'
$pipe2='\\.\pipe\wmitest_com2'

# Create a Generation 2 virtual machine
$cls=[wmiclass]("\\.\" + $ns + ":Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData")
$vssd=$cls.CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName=$name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

try {
  # COM1/COM2 of a newly created virtual machine already exist, so modify rather than add here
  $vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $serials=@(([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SerialPortSettingData') | Sort-Object InstanceID)
  # serials[0]=COM1 (InstanceID ...\0), serials[1]=COM2 (...\1)
  $com1=$serials[0]; $com1.Connection=@($pipe1)
  $com2=$serials[1]; $com2.Connection=@($pipe2)
  $r1=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings(@($com1.GetText(1))); if($r1.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r1.Job | Out-Null }
  $r2=$vsms.ModifyResourceSettings(@($com2.GetText(1))); if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }

  # Read back (re-query, without relying on the local object cache)
  $vssd3=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $serials2=@(([wmi]$vssd3.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SerialPortSettingData') | Sort-Object InstanceID)
  'COM1 Connection=' + ($serials2[0].Connection -join ',')
  'COM2 Connection=' + ($serials2[1].Connection -join ',')
}
finally {
  $rd=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
}

set_autostart.title: 设置虚拟机自动启动与自动停止动作
notes: AutomaticStartupAction 与 AutomaticShutdownAction 均为 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 上的 uint16 属性，属于整机设置，通过 ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1)) 修改，而非资源级的 ModifyResourceSettings。
AutomaticStartupAction 取值：2=None，3=Restart if previously active（第二代虚拟机默认值），4=Always startup。
AutomaticShutdownAction 取值：2=Turn Off，3=Save state（默认值），4=Shutdown。
关联属性 AutomaticStartupActionDelay（datetime 间隔）与 AutomaticStartupActionSequenceNumber（uint16）同样位于 VSSD，可一并设置。
修改后应重新 GetRelated 获取新副本再读回，避免读到修改前缓存的旧实例。
set_autostart.title_en: Configuring Virtual Machine Automatic Startup and Automatic Shutdown Actions
notes_en: AutomaticStartupAction and AutomaticShutdownAction are both uint16 properties on Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData and belong to the whole-system setting data; they are modified through ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1)) rather than the resource-level ModifyResourceSettings.
AutomaticStartupAction values: 2=None, 3=Restart if previously active (the default for generation 2 virtual machines), 4=Always startup.
AutomaticShutdownAction values: 2=Turn Off, 3=Save state (the default), 4=Shutdown.
The related properties AutomaticStartupActionDelay (a datetime interval) and AutomaticStartupActionSequenceNumber (uint16) also reside on the VSSD and can be set together with these actions.
After modifying, a fresh copy should be obtained again via GetRelated before reading the values back, to avoid reading a stale instance cached from before the modification.

set_notes.title: 设置虚拟机备注 (VSSD.Notes)
set_notes.code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){ return 7 }; $j = [wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j = [wmi]$p }; return $j.JobState }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# 获取目标虚拟机的设置数据（$vm 为该虚拟机的 Msvm_ComputerSystem）
$vssd = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$vssd = [wmi]$vssd.__PATH
# Notes 在 v2 中为数组类型，但 Hyper-V 仅保留首个元素，故使用单元素数组
$vssd.Notes = @('My note text (multi-word / multi-line is fine in one element)')
$rm = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1))
if($rm.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rm.Job | Out-Null }
elseif($rm.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "ModifySystemSettings rv=$($rm.ReturnValue)" }
# 读回
$readNotes = @( ([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1 ).Notes
Write-Host ($readNotes -join ' | ')
notes: 修改备注属于整机设置：获取虚拟机的 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData，设置其 .Notes，再调用 $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1))；不应使用 ModifyResourceSettings。
VSSD.Notes 在 v2 命名空间 schema 中为 string[]（array=true），但 Hyper-V 实现仅保留数组的第一个元素：传入 @('a','b') 读回仅剩 'a'。可靠写法是使用单元素数组 @('整段备注')，多行或多词内容放在同一字符串中即可。
ModifySystemSettings 可能同步返回 rv=0（未触发 4096 job），仍应保留 Wait-Job2 作为兜底。
创建实例时不能使用 [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class" 强制转换（会报无效参数），应改用 (Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class <Class> -List).CreateInstance()。另注意 PowerShell 会将 "$ns:" 解析为作用域变量，需写作 "${ns}:"。
notes_en: Modifying the notes is a whole-system setting: obtain the virtual machine's Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData, set its .Notes, then call $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1)); ModifyResourceSettings should not be used.

VSSD.Notes is declared as string[] (array=true) in the v2 namespace schema, but the Hyper-V implementation retains only the first element of the array: passing @('a','b') reads back as only 'a'. The reliable approach is to use a single-element array @('the entire note'), placing multi-line or multi-word content within that one string.
ModifySystemSettings may return rv=0 synchronously (without raising a 4096 job); Wait-Job2 should still be kept as a fallback.

When creating an instance, the [wmiclass]"\\.\$ns:Class" cast cannot be used (it reports an invalid parameter); use (Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class <Class> -List).CreateInstance() instead. Note also that PowerShell parses "$ns:" as a scoped variable, so it must be written as "${ns}:".
set_notes.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){ return 7 }; $j = [wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j = [wmi]$p }; return $j.JobState }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# Get the setting data of the target virtual machine ($vm is the Msvm_ComputerSystem of that virtual machine)
$vssd = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$vssd = [wmi]$vssd.__PATH
# Notes is an array type in v2, but Hyper-V keeps only the first element, so use a single-element array
$vssd.Notes = @('My note text (multi-word / multi-line is fine in one element)')
$rm = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd.GetText(1))
if($rm.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rm.Job | Out-Null }
elseif($rm.ReturnValue -ne 0){ throw "ModifySystemSettings rv=$($rm.ReturnValue)" }
# Read back
$readNotes = @( ([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1 ).Notes
Write-Host ($readNotes -join ' | ')

set_secureboot.title: 启用或禁用虚拟机安全启动
set_secureboot.code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns   = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$name = 'WMITEST_set_secureboot'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# 创建第二代虚拟机（仅第二代支持安全启动）
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# 获取虚拟机的 VSSD；SecureBootEnabled 位于 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData
$vssd2 = [wmi]($vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH

# 关闭安全启动
$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled = $false
$r2 = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if ($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }

# 读回
$vssd2 = [wmi]($vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
'$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled'  # -> False

# 重新开启安全启动
$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled = $true
$r3 = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if ($r3.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r3.Job | Out-Null }

# 清理
$rd = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
notes: SecureBootEnabled 是 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 上的布尔属性，修改时使用 ModifySystemSettings(VSSD.GetText(1))，而非 ModifyResourceSettings。
该属性仅适用于第二代虚拟机（VirtualSystemSubType = Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2）；新建的第二代虚拟机默认 SecureBootEnabled=True。
修改后应重新从虚拟机 GetRelated 获取 VSSD 再读回，以确认 WMI 实例已刷新。
DefineSystem、ModifySystemSettings、DestroySystem 返回 4096 时表示异步 Job，需用 Wait-Job2 轮询至完成。
若需同时指定安全启动模板，可配套设置 SecureBootTemplateId（string 类型 GUID），同样经 ModifySystemSettings 修改。
set_secureboot.title_en: Enabling or Disabling Virtual Machine Secure Boot
notes_en: SecureBootEnabled is a boolean property on Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData; it is modified using ModifySystemSettings(VSSD.GetText(1)) rather than ModifyResourceSettings.
This property applies only to generation 2 virtual machines (VirtualSystemSubType = Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2); a newly created generation 2 virtual machine defaults to SecureBootEnabled=True.
After modifying, the VSSD should be obtained again from the virtual machine via GetRelated and read back, to confirm that the WMI instance has been refreshed.
When DefineSystem, ModifySystemSettings, or DestroySystem return 4096, this indicates an asynchronous job, which must be polled to completion with Wait-Job2.
If a secure boot template is to be specified at the same time, SecureBootTemplateId (a string-type GUID) can be set alongside it, modified likewise through ModifySystemSettings.
set_secureboot.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns   = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$name = 'WMITEST_set_secureboot'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# Create a generation 2 virtual machine (only generation 2 supports secure boot)
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $name
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# Get the virtual machine's VSSD; SecureBootEnabled resides on Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData
$vssd2 = [wmi]($vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH

# Disable secure boot
$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled = $false
$r2 = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if ($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r2.Job | Out-Null }

# Read back
$vssd2 = [wmi]($vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
'$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled'  # -> False

# Re-enable secure boot
$vssd2.SecureBootEnabled = $true
$r3 = $vsms.ModifySystemSettings($vssd2.GetText(1))
if ($r3.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r3.Job | Out-Null }

# Clean up
$rd = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }

smt_threads.title: 设置每核硬件线程数 (HwThreadsPerCore)
smt_threads.code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$vmname = 'WMITEST_smt_threads'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# 创建第二代虚拟机
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $vmname
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# 定位到 ProcessorSettingData
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$proc = ([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1

# 设置 HwThreadsPerCore：0=继承主机，1=禁用SMT，2=每核两线程
$proc.HwThreadsPerCore = [uint64]2
$rm = $vsms.ModifyResourceSettings($proc.GetText(1))
if ($rm.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rm.Job | Out-Null }

# 读回
$p3 = ([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
Write-Output ("HwThreadsPerCore = {0}  Realized = {1}" -f $p3.HwThreadsPerCore, $p3.HwThreadsPerCoreRealized)

# 清理
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH) | Out-Null
notes: HwThreadsPerCore 位于 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData，类型为 uint64。0=继承主机（默认），1=禁用 SMT，2=每核 2 线程。
修改该值使用 ModifyResourceSettings(GetText(1))，可能同步返回 rv=0（未触发 4096 Job）。0/1/2 三种取值均可写入并读回。
该属性在 MOF schema 中标为 Read 限定符，但实际可经 ModifyResourceSettings 写入，Read 限定符仅为信息性标注。
HwThreadsPerCoreRealized（uint32，只读）表示来宾实际看到的每核线程数，仅在虚拟机运行时填充；关机状态下读回为空，因此不对其做断言。
该属性自 build 10586 起提供，长期稳定可用。
notes_en: HwThreadsPerCore resides on Msvm_ProcessorSettingData and is of type uint64. 0=inherit from host (default), 1=disable SMT, 2=2 threads per core.
This value is modified using ModifyResourceSettings(GetText(1)) and may return rv=0 synchronously (without raising a 4096 job). All three values 0/1/2 can be written and read back.
This property is marked with the Read qualifier in the MOF schema but can in fact be written through ModifyResourceSettings; the Read qualifier is merely an informational annotation.

HwThreadsPerCoreRealized (uint32, read-only) represents the number of threads per core actually seen by the guest and is populated only while the virtual machine is running; it reads back empty in the powered-off state, so no assertion is made on it.
This property has been available since build 10586 and has remained stable over the long term.
smt_threads.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }

$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
$vmname = 'WMITEST_smt_threads'
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService

# Create a generation 2 virtual machine
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = $vmname
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# Locate the ProcessorSettingData
$vssd2 = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
$proc = ([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1

# Set HwThreadsPerCore: 0=inherit from host, 1=disable SMT, 2=two threads per core
$proc.HwThreadsPerCore = [uint64]2
$rm = $vsms.ModifyResourceSettings($proc.GetText(1))
if ($rm.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { Wait-Job2 $rm.Job | Out-Null }

# Read back
$p3 = ([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1
Write-Output ("HwThreadsPerCore = {0}  Realized = {1}" -f $p3.HwThreadsPerCore, $p3.HwThreadsPerCoreRealized)

# Clean up
$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH) | Out-Null

snapshot_apply.title: 应用虚拟机检查点
notes: ApplySnapshot 仅有一个 IN 参数 Snapshot（对快照 VSSD 的引用）与 OUT 参数 Job；直接传快照 VSSD 的 __PATH 字符串即可。CreateSnapshot 与 ApplySnapshot 通常返回 4096，需用 Wait-Job2 轮询 Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState 至 7（Completed）。

CreateSnapshot 的 ResultingSnapshot 为 IN/OUT 引用，但当方法走异步 Job（rv=4096）时该 OUT 引用返回为空。应在任务完成后经 Msvm_SnapshotOfVirtualSystem 关联从虚拟机获取快照 VSSD，不要依赖 ResultingSnapshot。使用 Get-WmiObject 调用方法时也不能为引用形参传入 PowerShell [ref]（会报“应为 PSReference”），直接传 $null。
验证回滚不应使用 VSSD.Notes。Notes 属于主机侧元数据，ApplySnapshot 不会还原它。应改用真正纳入快照配置树的资源属性，如 ProcessorSettingData.VirtualQuantity（vCPU），可正确观察到 2->apply->1 的回滚。

创建快照后，虚拟机经普通 GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') 可能返回快照的 VSSD 而非已实现配置。应经 Msvm_SettingsDefineState 关联并按 VirtualSystemType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized' 过滤，且每次读回都重新以 [wmi]$vm.__PATH 获取关联（apply 后实例可能变更，缓存对象会过期）。
清理顺序：先对虚拟机的所有快照 DestroySnapshot，再对整机 DestroySystem，二者均可能返回 4096 需轮询。
notes_en: ApplySnapshot has only one IN parameter, Snapshot (a reference to the snapshot VSSD), and an OUT parameter, Job; passing the snapshot VSSD's __PATH string directly is sufficient. CreateSnapshot and ApplySnapshot usually return 4096 and require polling Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState to 7 (Completed) with Wait-Job2.

CreateSnapshot's ResultingSnapshot is an IN/OUT reference, but when the method runs as an asynchronous job (rv=4096) that OUT reference is returned empty. After the job completes, the snapshot VSSD should be obtained from the virtual machine through the Msvm_SnapshotOfVirtualSystem association rather than relying on ResultingSnapshot. When invoking the method with Get-WmiObject, a PowerShell [ref] cannot be passed for a reference parameter either (it reports "expected a PSReference"); pass $null directly.

VSSD.Notes should not be used to verify the rollback. Notes is host-side metadata, and ApplySnapshot does not restore it. Instead, use a resource property that is genuinely captured in the snapshot configuration tree, such as ProcessorSettingData.VirtualQuantity (vCPU), which correctly shows the 2->apply->1 rollback.

After creating a snapshot, a plain GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') on the virtual machine may return the snapshot's VSSD rather than the realized configuration. It should be obtained through the Msvm_SettingsDefineState association and filtered by VirtualSystemType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:System:Realized', and each read-back should re-obtain the association from [wmi]$vm.__PATH afresh (the instance may change after apply, so cached objects go stale).
Cleanup order: first DestroySnapshot on all of the virtual machine's snapshots, then DestroySystem on the whole system; both may return 4096 and require polling.

snapshot_create.title: 创建虚拟机检查点
snapshot_create.code:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$snapSvc = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSnapshotService

# --- 构建用于演示的虚拟机 ---
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = 'WMITEST_snapshot_create'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
if ($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { [void](Wait-Job2 $r.Job) }
$vm = [wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# --- CreateSnapshot: AffectedSystem(ref IN), SnapshotSettings(string IN), SnapshotType(uint16 IN: 2=Full,3=Disk), ResultingSnapshot(IN/OUT ref), Job(OUT) ---
$inParams = $snapSvc.GetMethodParameters('CreateSnapshot')
$inParams.AffectedSystem = $vm.__PATH
$inParams.SnapshotSettings = ''
$inParams.SnapshotType = [uint16]2
$sr = $snapSvc.InvokeMethod('CreateSnapshot', $inParams, $null)
if ($sr.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { [void](Wait-Job2 $sr.Job) }

# --- 通过 Msvm_SnapshotOfVirtualSystem 关联类定位检查点的 VSSD ---
$vmSnaps = ([wmi]$vm.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData','Msvm_SnapshotOfVirtualSystem',$null,$null,$null,$null,$false,$null)
# 检查点 VSSD 的 VirtualSystemType 为 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Snapshot:Realized'

# --- DestroySnapshot: AffectedSnapshot(ref IN), Job(OUT) ---
foreach ($s in @($vmSnaps)) {
  $dp = $snapSvc.GetMethodParameters('DestroySnapshot')
  $dp.AffectedSnapshot = $s.__PATH
  $dr = $snapSvc.InvokeMethod('DestroySnapshot', $dp, $null)
  if ($dr.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { [void](Wait-Job2 $dr.Job) }
}

# --- 清理虚拟机 ---
$dvm = $vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)
if ($dvm.ReturnValue -eq 4096) { [void](Wait-Job2 $dvm.Job) }
notes: 检查点操作由独立的 Msvm_VirtualSystemSnapshotService 提供，而非 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService。CreateSnapshot 与 DestroySnapshot 均以 4096 表示异步作业，需轮询关联的 Msvm_ConcreteJob，作业终态 JobState=7 表示已完成。

CreateSnapshot 参数：AffectedSystem(ref IN，虚拟机的 __PATH)、SnapshotSettings(string IN，传空串 '' 即可，无需嵌入 Msvm_VirtualSystemSnapshotSettingData)、SnapshotType(uint16 IN，2=全量检查点/3=磁盘检查点)、ResultingSnapshot(IN/OUT ref)、Job(OUT)。
处于关机状态(EnabledState=3 Disabled)的虚拟机即可创建全量检查点，无需先启动，也不依赖嵌套虚拟化或 GPU。

检查点不会通过 GetRelated('...SettingData') 作为常规配置直接返回，需经 Msvm_SnapshotOfVirtualSystem 关联类从虚拟机获取，或按 VirtualSystemType LIKE '%Snapshot%' 筛选。检查点 VSSD 的 VirtualSystemType 为 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Snapshot:Realized'，ElementName 形如 '<虚拟机名> - (时间)'。
DestroySnapshot 参数：AffectedSnapshot(ref IN，检查点 VSSD 的 __PATH)、Job(OUT)。DestroySystem 通常会连带清理检查点，但删除虚拟机前显式删除检查点更稳妥。
使用 GetMethodParameters + InvokeMethod 为 ref 参数赋 __PATH 字符串，在 Windows PowerShell 5.1 上可稳定工作，可避免直接调用 $svc.CreateSnapshot(...) 时的参数顺序问题。
notes_en: Checkpoint operations are provided by a separate Msvm_VirtualSystemSnapshotService rather than Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService. Both CreateSnapshot and DestroySnapshot indicate an asynchronous job with 4096, requiring the associated Msvm_ConcreteJob to be polled; a terminal JobState=7 indicates completion.

CreateSnapshot parameters: AffectedSystem (ref IN, the __PATH of the virtual machine), SnapshotSettings (string IN, an empty string '' is sufficient, with no need to embed a Msvm_VirtualSystemSnapshotSettingData instance), SnapshotType (uint16 IN, 2=full checkpoint / 3=disk checkpoint), ResultingSnapshot (IN/OUT ref), Job (OUT).
A virtual machine in the powered-off state (EnabledState=3 Disabled) can create a full checkpoint without being started first, and it does not depend on nested virtualization or a GPU.

A checkpoint is not returned directly as ordinary configuration through GetRelated('...SettingData'); it must be obtained from the virtual machine through the Msvm_SnapshotOfVirtualSystem association class, or filtered by VirtualSystemType LIKE '%Snapshot%'. The checkpoint VSSD has VirtualSystemType 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Snapshot:Realized', and its ElementName takes the form '<VM name> - (timestamp)'.

DestroySnapshot parameters: AffectedSnapshot (ref IN, the __PATH of the checkpoint VSSD), Job (OUT). DestroySystem usually removes checkpoints along with the virtual machine, but explicitly destroying checkpoints before deleting the virtual machine is more robust.

Using GetMethodParameters + InvokeMethod to assign a __PATH string to a ref parameter works reliably on Windows PowerShell 5.1 and avoids the parameter-ordering issues that can arise when calling $svc.CreateSnapshot(...) directly.
snapshot_create.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$snapSvc = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemSnapshotService

# --- Build a virtual machine for demonstration ---
$vssd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName = 'WMITEST_snapshot_create'
$vssd.VirtualSystemSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r = $vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1), $null, $null)
