vm_groups.title: 创建虚拟机集合并添加成员
vm_groups.code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$cms =Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_CollectionManagementService

# build a Gen2 test VM
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_vm_groups'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# DefineCollection: IN Name,Id,Type(uint16 0|1) ; OUT DefinedCollection(ref),Job. Type=0 => VM group.
$rc=$cms.DefineCollection('WMITEST_vm_groups_coll',$null,[uint16]0)
if($rc.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rc.Job | Out-Null }
$collPath=$rc.DefinedCollection
$coll=[wmi]$collPath

# AddMember: IN Member(VM __PATH), Collection(collPath) ; OUT Job
$ra=$cms.AddMember($vm.__PATH,$collPath)
if($ra.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $ra.Job | Out-Null }

# verify: members reachable from the collection via GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem')
$members=([wmi]$collPath).GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem')
$ok=$false; foreach($m in $members){ if($m.Name -eq $vm.Name){ $ok=$true } }

# cleanup: RemoveMember -> DestroyCollection -> DestroySystem
$rr=$cms.RemoveMember($vm.__PATH,$collPath); if($rr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rr.Job | Out-Null }
$rd=$cms.DestroyCollection($collPath); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
$rdv=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rdv.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rdv.Job | Out-Null }
Write-Host "memberFound=$ok"
notes: 服务类为 Msvm_CollectionManagementService（单例，经 Get-WmiObject 获取实例）。
DefineCollection(Name, Id, Type)：Name 为显示名（string）；Id 为 GUID 字符串，传 $null 时由服务自动生成；Type 为 uint16，0=虚拟机集合（组），1=管理集合。OUT 参数为 DefinedCollection（集合引用路径）与 Job。返回值 0 表示同步完成。
返回的 DefinedCollection 经 [wmi] 转换后即 Msvm_VirtualSystemCollection，其 ElementName 为传入的 Name。转换回的对象上 InstanceID 可能为空，集合 GUID 应从该实例的标识属性读取，不应依赖 InstanceID。
AddMember(Member, Collection)：Member 为待加入元素的引用，此处为虚拟机的 __PATH（Msvm_ComputerSystem）；Collection 为 DefinedCollection 路径。OUT 仅有 Job。Member 也可为另一个集合，从而实现集合嵌套。
验证成员：通过集合对象的 GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem') 枚举成员，并按 VM.Name（GUID）匹配确认目标虚拟机在内。
清理顺序：RemoveMember(Member, Collection) -> DestroyCollection(Collection) -> DestroySystem(VM)。
所有写方法返回 4096 时按统一范式轮询 Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState。该类自 build 10240 起提供。
vm_groups.title_en: Create a Virtual Machine Collection and Add Members
notes_en: The service class is Msvm_CollectionManagementService (a singleton, retrieved as an instance via Get-WmiObject).

DefineCollection(Name, Id, Type): Name is the display name (string); Id is a GUID string, and when $null is passed the service generates it automatically; Type is a uint16, where 0 = virtual machine collection (group) and 1 = management collection. The OUT parameters are DefinedCollection (the collection reference path) and Job. A return value of 0 indicates synchronous completion.

The returned DefinedCollection, once cast via [wmi], is an Msvm_VirtualSystemCollection whose ElementName equals the Name that was passed in. InstanceID on the cast-back object may be empty, so the collection GUID should be read from the instance's identity properties rather than relying on InstanceID.

AddMember(Member, Collection): Member is the reference to the element being added, here the virtual machine's __PATH (Msvm_ComputerSystem); Collection is the DefinedCollection path. The only OUT parameter is Job. Member may also be another collection, which enables nested collections.
Verifying membership: enumerate members via the collection object's GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem') and match by VM.Name (GUID) to confirm the target virtual machine is present.
Cleanup order: RemoveMember(Member, Collection) -> DestroyCollection(Collection) -> DestroySystem(VM).
When any write method returns 4096, poll Msvm_ConcreteJob.JobState following the uniform pattern. This class has been available since build 10240.
vm_groups.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$cms =Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_CollectionManagementService

# build a Gen2 test VM
$vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\${ns}:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
$vssd.ElementName='WMITEST_vm_groups'; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
$r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }
$vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem

# DefineCollection: IN Name,Id,Type(uint16 0|1) ; OUT DefinedCollection(ref),Job. Type=0 => VM group.
$rc=$cms.DefineCollection('WMITEST_vm_groups_coll',$null,[uint16]0)
if($rc.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rc.Job | Out-Null }
$collPath=$rc.DefinedCollection
$coll=[wmi]$collPath

# AddMember: IN Member(VM __PATH), Collection(collPath) ; OUT Job
$ra=$cms.AddMember($vm.__PATH,$collPath)
if($ra.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $ra.Job | Out-Null }

# verify: members reachable from the collection via GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem')
$members=([wmi]$collPath).GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem')
$ok=$false; foreach($m in $members){ if($m.Name -eq $vm.Name){ $ok=$true } }

# cleanup: RemoveMember -> DestroyCollection -> DestroySystem
$rr=$cms.RemoveMember($vm.__PATH,$collPath); if($rr.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rr.Job | Out-Null }
$rd=$cms.DestroyCollection($collPath); if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
$rdv=$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH); if($rdv.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rdv.Job | Out-Null }
Write-Host "memberFound=$ok"

vmgenid_bios.title: 读取与修改 BIOS GUID 及虚拟机 Generation ID
notes: BIOSGUID 位于 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 上。MOF/canonical 将其标记为 access=Read（只读），但通过 ModifySystemSettings 下发可返回 rv=0 且读回值确实改变，即该属性实际可写。该属性自 build 9200 起提供。
Hyper-V 读回 BIOSGUID 时不带花括号（返回 '8A2B...' 而非 '{8A2B...}'），写入时带或不带花括号均可接受。比较前须统一去除花括号并转为大写，否则可能误判为未改变。
暴露给来宾操作系统的虚拟机 Generation ID 为 VSSD.VirtualSystemIdentifiers（string[]，GUID）。该属性在虚拟机停止态为空，运行时才填充；其自身为只读（仅可经 ModifyVirtualSystemResources 修改，常规路径不可写）。
BIOSGUID 是第一代（SubType:1）虚拟机的概念，对应来宾内的 SMBIOS UUID；示例使用一台第一代空虚拟机。第二代虚拟机同样具有该属性，语义对应固件 UUID。
写操作使用 ModifySystemSettings（传入整机设置的 GetText(1)），而非 ModifyResourceSettings。返回 0 表示同步完成。
vmgenid_bios.title_en: Read and Modify the BIOS GUID and the Virtual Machine Generation ID
notes_en: BIOSGUID resides on Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData. The MOF/canonical marks it as access=Read (read-only), but submitting it through ModifySystemSettings returns rv=0 and the read-back value does change, meaning the property is in fact writable. This property has been available since build 9200.

Hyper-V returns BIOSGUID without braces on read-back (returning '8A2B...' rather than '{8A2B...}'), while on write it accepts the value with or without braces. Before comparing, both values must be normalized by stripping braces and converting to upper case; otherwise an unchanged result may be misreported.

The virtual machine Generation ID exposed to the guest operating system is VSSD.VirtualSystemIdentifiers (string[], GUID). This property is empty while the virtual machine is stopped and is populated only when it is running; it is itself read-only (modifiable only via ModifyVirtualSystemResources, not writable through the ordinary path).

BIOSGUID is a concept of generation 1 (SubType:1) virtual machines, corresponding to the SMBIOS UUID inside the guest; the example uses an empty generation 1 virtual machine. Generation 2 virtual machines also have this property, with semantics corresponding to the firmware UUID.
The write operation uses ModifySystemSettings (passing the GetText(1) of the whole-system setting data) rather than ModifyResourceSettings. A return value of 0 indicates synchronous completion.

vss_cluster_query.title: 查询来宾群集与 VSS 集成组件信息
notes: Msvm_VssService 类暴露 QueryGuestClusterInformation(OUT GuestClusterInformation: Msvm_GuestClusterInformation)。该类为来宾服务，superclass 为 Msvm_GuestService。
关键限制：Msvm_VssService 是来宾侧服务，仅当来宾 OS 已安装并运行集成服务(VSS/备份组件)并向主机回报时，才存在与该虚拟机关联的 INSTANCE。在无 OS 的空测试虚拟机上 $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VssService') 为空，因此 QueryGuestClusterInformation 无法在无来宾 OS 的虚拟机上调用。这是 API 设计使然。

Msvm_GuestClusterInformation(纯 OUT 嵌入返回)字段：ClusterId, ClusterSize, IsActiveActive, IsClustered, IsOnline, IsOwned, LastResourceMoveTime, SharedVirtualHardDiskPaths, SharedVirtualHardDisks，用于读取来宾 OS 所在故障转移群集的信息。

Msvm_VssComponentSettingData 是每虚拟机的 VSS 集成组件设置(继承 CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData)，每台虚拟机默认 1 个实例，EnabledState=2(启用)，经 VSSD.GetRelated('Msvm_VssComponentSettingData') 枚举。它对应虚拟机的‘备份(卷影复制)’集成服务开关；EnabledState 2=启用、3=禁用，可用 ModifyResourceSettings 修改。
此操作为纯读取(kind=read)：可确认类与方法 schema 存在、每虚拟机的 VssComponentSettingData 可枚举读回，以及 QueryGuestClusterInformation 需要活跃来宾群集这一调用前置条件。
调用 QueryGuestClusterInformation 的前置条件：来宾运行 Windows Server 故障转移群集且 Hyper-V 集成服务在线。此时 $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VssService') 返回实例，调用后从 ret.GuestClusterInformation 读取 ClusterId/ClusterSize/IsClustered 等字段。
vss_cluster_query.title_en: Query Guest Cluster and VSS Integration Component Information
notes_en: The Msvm_VssService class exposes QueryGuestClusterInformation(OUT GuestClusterInformation: Msvm_GuestClusterInformation). This class is a guest service whose superclass is Msvm_GuestService.

Key limitation: Msvm_VssService is a guest-side service, and an INSTANCE associated with the virtual machine exists only when the guest OS has the integration services (VSS/backup components) installed, running, and reporting to the host. On an empty test virtual machine with no OS, $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VssService') is empty, so QueryGuestClusterInformation cannot be invoked on a virtual machine without a guest OS. This is by API design.

Msvm_GuestClusterInformation (a pure OUT embedded return) fields: ClusterId, ClusterSize, IsActiveActive, IsClustered, IsOnline, IsOwned, LastResourceMoveTime, SharedVirtualHardDiskPaths, SharedVirtualHardDisks, used to read information about the failover cluster to which the guest OS belongs.

Msvm_VssComponentSettingData is the per-VM VSS integration component setting data (deriving from CIM_ResourceAllocationSettingData), with one instance per virtual machine by default and EnabledState=2 (enabled), enumerated via VSSD.GetRelated('Msvm_VssComponentSettingData'). It corresponds to the virtual machine's 'Backup (volume shadow copy)' integration service toggle; EnabledState 2 = enabled, 3 = disabled, and it can be modified with ModifyResourceSettings.

This operation is read-only (kind=read): it confirms that the class and method schema exist, that the per-VM VssComponentSettingData can be enumerated and read back, and that QueryGuestClusterInformation has the invocation precondition of requiring an active guest cluster.

Preconditions for invoking QueryGuestClusterInformation: the guest runs a Windows Server failover cluster and the Hyper-V integration services are online. In that case $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VssService') returns an instance, and after the call the ClusterId/ClusterSize/IsClustered and other fields are read from ret.GuestClusterInformation.

vtl2_settings.title: 读取虚拟机的 VTL2/paravisor 设置
notes: Msvm_VirtualSystemGuestManagementService 自 build 26100 起提供，是 VTL2/OpenHCL paravisor 设置的读写入口，为单例服务，各方法均以 VmId(即 ComputerSystem.Name，GUID)定位虚拟机。

三个读方法在普通(非 OpenHCL)第二代虚拟机上的返回行为：GetVtl2Settings 返回 rv=32795(无 VTL2 配置，Settings=null)；QueryVtl2Settings 抛 WBEM_E_SHUTTING_DOWN(ErrorCode=ShuttingDown，表示 VTL2 通道未建立)；GetManagementVtlSettings(VmId, Namespace) 对任意 Namespace 均抛 ErrorCode=NotFound(无管理 VTL 命名空间)。
对不存在的 VmId(如全零 GUID)，三方法均抛 ErrorCode=NotFound。因此在存在的虚拟机上 rv=32795 的语义是‘虚拟机存在但未配置 VTL2’，而非定位失败。

方法签名：GetVtl2Settings(string VmId) -> uint8[] Settings, uint64 CurrentUpdateId；QueryVtl2Settings(string VmId) -> string Settings(JSON), uint64 CurrentUpdateId；GetManagementVtlSettings(string VmId, string Namespace) -> uint8[] Settings, uint64 CurrentUpdateId。写方法 ModifyVtl2Settings/UpdateVtl2Settings/SetManagementVtlSettings 带 OUT Job(CIM_ConcreteJob 引用)，返回 4096 时须轮询作业。GetVtl2Settings/QueryVtl2Settings 的 ValueMap 仅声明 0/1，实现上另有 32795 等实现相关返回码。
要读取真正的 VTL2 JSON 载荷，需虚拟机以 OpenHCL paravisor 运行(机密计算 TDX/SEV-SNP 隔离场景)。在无此类客户机时三方法返回‘未配置/未建立/未找到’，属功能边界，而非调用错误。
vmms 提供程序在上一次 DestroySystem 后可能短暂重启，导致单例服务枚举返回空或抛 WBEM_E_SHUTTING_DOWN。脚本以 Get-SvcRetry(最多 60 次、每次 500ms)重试获取服务实例，以避免连续运行时的间歇性失败。
脚本使用唯一测试虚拟机 WMITEST_vtl2_settings，并在 try/finally 中通过 DestroySystem 清理，保证运行前后无残留。
vtl2_settings.title_en: Read a Virtual Machine's VTL2/paravisor Settings
notes_en: Msvm_VirtualSystemGuestManagementService has been available since build 26100 and is the read/write entry point for VTL2/OpenHCL paravisor settings. It is a singleton service, and each of its methods locates the virtual machine by VmId (that is, ComputerSystem.Name, a GUID).

Return behavior of the three read methods on an ordinary (non-OpenHCL) generation 2 virtual machine: GetVtl2Settings returns rv=32795 (no VTL2 configuration, Settings=null); QueryVtl2Settings throws WBEM_E_SHUTTING_DOWN (ErrorCode=ShuttingDown, indicating the VTL2 channel is not established); GetManagementVtlSettings(VmId, Namespace) throws ErrorCode=NotFound for any Namespace (no management VTL namespace).

For a nonexistent VmId (such as an all-zero GUID), all three methods throw ErrorCode=NotFound. Therefore, on an existing virtual machine, the semantics of rv=32795 is 'the virtual machine exists but VTL2 is not configured', not a lookup failure.

Method signatures: GetVtl2Settings(string VmId) -> uint8[] Settings, uint64 CurrentUpdateId; QueryVtl2Settings(string VmId) -> string Settings (JSON), uint64 CurrentUpdateId; GetManagementVtlSettings(string VmId, string Namespace) -> uint8[] Settings, uint64 CurrentUpdateId. The write methods ModifyVtl2Settings/UpdateVtl2Settings/SetManagementVtlSettings carry an OUT Job (a CIM_ConcreteJob reference), and when they return 4096 the job must be polled. The ValueMap of GetVtl2Settings/QueryVtl2Settings declares only 0/1, while the implementation additionally uses implementation-specific return codes such as 32795.

To read an actual VTL2 JSON payload, the virtual machine must run with an OpenHCL paravisor (a confidential computing TDX/SEV-SNP isolation scenario). In the absence of such a guest, the three methods return 'not configured/not established/not found', which is a functional boundary rather than an invocation error.

The vmms provider may briefly restart after a preceding DestroySystem, causing singleton service enumeration to return empty or to throw WBEM_E_SHUTTING_DOWN. The script retries obtaining the service instance with Get-SvcRetry (up to 60 attempts, 500ms each) to avoid intermittent failures during consecutive runs.
The script uses a unique test virtual machine WMITEST_vtl2_settings and cleans it up via DestroySystem within a try/finally, ensuring no residue before or after the run.

vtpm_security.title: 为第二代虚拟机启用 vTPM 安全设置
vtpm_security.code:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$secsvc=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_SecurityService
$name='WMITEST_vtpm_security'
try {
  # 1) 创建第二代虚拟机（vTPM 仅适用于 SubType:2）
  $vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName=$name; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
  $vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
  # 2) 定位 Msvm_SecuritySettingData（VSSD -> SecuritySettingData）
  $vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $sec=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SecuritySettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  # 3) 生成守护者与密钥保护器并设置（启用 TpmEnabled=true 前必需）
  $g=Get-HgsGuardian -Name 'WMITESTGuardian' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
  if(-not $g){$g=New-HgsGuardian -Name 'WMITESTGuardian' -GenerateCertificates}
  $kp=New-HgsKeyProtector -Owner $g -AllowUntrustedRoot
  $r2=$secsvc.SetKeyProtector($sec.GetText(1),$kp.RawData)   # 返回 0 表示成功，4096 表示异步 Job
  if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r2.Job|Out-Null}
  # 4) 通过 Msvm_SecurityService.ModifySecuritySettings 启用 TPM（TpmEnabled 在类上为只读，通过重新提交嵌入实例修改）
  $sec2=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SecuritySettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $sec2.TpmEnabled=$true
  $r3=$secsvc.ModifySecuritySettings($sec2.GetText(1))
  if($r3.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r3.Job|Out-Null}
  # 5) 读回确认
  $secR=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SecuritySettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  Write-Output "TpmEnabled=$($secR.TpmEnabled)"   # 预期 True
}
finally {
  if($vm){$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)|Out-Null}
}
notes: vTPM 相关的三个方法均定义在 Msvm_SecurityService 上（而非 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService）：ModifySecuritySettings、SetKeyProtector、GetKeyProtector。

Msvm_SecuritySettingData 通过 VSSD 的 GetRelated('Msvm_SecuritySettingData') 获取；其属性（TpmEnabled、ShieldingRequested、DataProtectionRequested、EncryptStateAndVmMigrationTraffic 等）均为只读，修改值需将嵌入实例经 GetText(1) 重新提交给 ModifySecuritySettings。
vTPM 仅对第二代虚拟机（VirtualSystemSubType 为 Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2）有效。将 TpmEnabled 置为 true 前必须先调用 SetKeyProtector，否则启用 TPM 的作业将失败。
使用 New-HgsGuardian -GenerateCertificates 与 New-HgsKeyProtector -Owner $g -AllowUntrustedRoot 生成本地守护者及密钥保护器；SetKeyProtector 的 KeyProtector 入参类型为 uint8[]，应传入 $kp.RawData。
方法返回码：0 表示同步成功；4096 表示已启动异步作业；32768 至 32778 为 SetKeyProtector 与 GetKeyProtector 的厂商特定错误码区段。
vtpm_security.title_en: Enable vTPM Security Settings for a Generation 2 Virtual Machine
notes_en: The three vTPM-related methods are all defined on Msvm_SecurityService (not on Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService): ModifySecuritySettings, SetKeyProtector, GetKeyProtector.

Msvm_SecuritySettingData is obtained via the VSSD's GetRelated('Msvm_SecuritySettingData'); its properties (TpmEnabled, ShieldingRequested, DataProtectionRequested, EncryptStateAndVmMigrationTraffic, etc.) are all read-only, and changing a value requires resubmitting the embedded instance to ModifySecuritySettings via GetText(1).

vTPM applies only to generation 2 virtual machines (VirtualSystemSubType of Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2). SetKeyProtector must be called before setting TpmEnabled to true; otherwise the job that enables the TPM will fail.

Use New-HgsGuardian -GenerateCertificates and New-HgsKeyProtector -Owner $g -AllowUntrustedRoot to generate a local guardian and key protector; the KeyProtector input parameter of SetKeyProtector is of type uint8[] and should be passed $kp.RawData.

Method return codes: 0 indicates synchronous success; 4096 indicates that an asynchronous job has been started; 32768 through 32778 is the vendor-specific error code range for SetKeyProtector and GetKeyProtector.
vtpm_security.code_en:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
$secsvc=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_SecurityService
$name='WMITEST_vtpm_security'
try {
  # 1) Create a generation 2 virtual machine (vTPM applies only to SubType:2)
  $vssd=([wmiclass]"\\.\$ns`:Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData").CreateInstance()
  $vssd.ElementName=$name; $vssd.VirtualSystemSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2'
  $r=$vsms.DefineSystem($vssd.GetText(1),$null,$null)
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r.Job|Out-Null}
  $vm=[wmi]$r.ResultingSystem
  # 2) Locate Msvm_SecuritySettingData (VSSD -> SecuritySettingData)
  $vssd2=$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $sec=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SecuritySettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  # 3) Generate a guardian and key protector and set it (required before enabling TpmEnabled=true)
  $g=Get-HgsGuardian -Name 'WMITESTGuardian' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
  if(-not $g){$g=New-HgsGuardian -Name 'WMITESTGuardian' -GenerateCertificates}
  $kp=New-HgsKeyProtector -Owner $g -AllowUntrustedRoot
  $r2=$secsvc.SetKeyProtector($sec.GetText(1),$kp.RawData)   # 0 indicates success, 4096 indicates an asynchronous Job
  if($r2.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r2.Job|Out-Null}
  # 4) Enable the TPM via Msvm_SecurityService.ModifySecuritySettings (TpmEnabled is read-only on the class, modified by resubmitting the embedded instance)
  $sec2=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SecuritySettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  $sec2.TpmEnabled=$true
  $r3=$secsvc.ModifySecuritySettings($sec2.GetText(1))
  if($r3.ReturnValue -eq 4096){Wait-Job2 $r3.Job|Out-Null}
  # 5) Read back to confirm
  $secR=([wmi]$vssd2.__PATH).GetRelated('Msvm_SecuritySettingData')|Select-Object -First 1
  Write-Output "TpmEnabled=$($secR.TpmEnabled)"   # expected True
}
finally {
  if($vm){$vsms.DestroySystem($vm.__PATH)|Out-Null}
}

collection_refpoint.title: 创建集合级参考点(增量备份/CBT)
notes: 服务为 Msvm_CollectionReferencePointService(单例)。方法 CreateReferencePoint(Collection ref, ReferencePointSettings string 嵌入实例|$null, ReferencePointType uint16, ResultingReferencePointCollection ref, OUT Job)。ReferencePointType 枚举: 0=Log based / 1=RCT based / 2=RCT based。

该功能需要来宾集群/多虚拟机一致性备份环境，由 VSS 或备份子系统在集群或适当的备份上下文中触发，依赖 Msvm_CollectionSnapshotService 的一致性快照能力与来宾集成。对独立主机上一个停机的空虚拟机组直接调用会被拒绝，所有集合级参考点尝试均同步返回 rv=32770(Failed，厂商专用码，不产生 Job)。此结果与集合类型(0=虚拟机组 / 1=管理集合)、ReferencePointSettings(null 或 ConsistencyLevel=2)、ReferencePointType(0/1/2)均无关。

单虚拟机服务 Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePointService.CreateReferencePoint(type=1) 在同一停机虚拟机与同一 RCT VHDX 上可成功执行(rv=4096, JobState=7, ErrorCode=0)，说明 RCT 磁盘前置条件已满足、虚拟机停机(EnabledState=3)对单虚拟机路径无碍。集合级服务的限制来自其对活动备份上下文的要求。
参数约束: ResultingReferencePointCollection 虽为 IN 引用参数，但必须传 $null；传入真实集合路径会抛出 WMI 'Invalid method parameter(s)' 异常，而非返回码。
集合的创建与添加成员本身可用: DefineCollection(Name, $null, Type) + AddMember(VM.__PATH, collPath)。清理顺序为 RemoveMember -> DestroyCollection -> DestroySystem。
全程仅操作以 WMITEST_collection_refpoint 命名的对象；try/finally 确保删除集合、虚拟机与 vhdx。
collection_refpoint.title_en: Create a Collection-Level Reference Point (Incremental Backup / CBT)
notes_en: The service is Msvm_CollectionReferencePointService (singleton). Method CreateReferencePoint(Collection ref, ReferencePointSettings string embedded instance|$null, ReferencePointType uint16, ResultingReferencePointCollection ref, OUT Job). ReferencePointType enumeration: 0=Log based / 1=RCT based / 2=RCT based.

This feature requires a guest cluster / multi-VM consistent backup environment, triggered by VSS or the backup subsystem within a cluster or an appropriate backup context, and depends on the consistent snapshot capability of Msvm_CollectionSnapshotService together with guest integration. Calling it directly against a group of stopped, empty virtual machines on a standalone host is rejected: all collection-level reference point attempts return rv=32770 synchronously (Failed, vendor-specific code, no Job produced). This result is independent of the collection type (0=VM group / 1=management collection), ReferencePointSettings (null or ConsistencyLevel=2), and ReferencePointType (0/1/2).

The single-VM service Msvm_VirtualSystemReferencePointService.CreateReferencePoint(type=1) succeeds on the same stopped virtual machine and the same RCT VHDX (rv=4096, JobState=7, ErrorCode=0), indicating that the RCT disk prerequisite is met and that the virtual machine being stopped (EnabledState=3) poses no obstacle to the single-VM path. The limitation of the collection-level service stems from its requirement for an active backup context.

Parameter constraint: although ResultingReferencePointCollection is an IN reference parameter, $null must be passed; passing a real collection path throws a WMI 'Invalid method parameter(s)' exception rather than returning a return code.
Collection creation and member addition themselves work: DefineCollection(Name, $null, Type) + AddMember(VM.__PATH, collPath). The cleanup order is RemoveMember -> DestroyCollection -> DestroySystem.
Only objects named with WMITEST_collection_refpoint are operated on throughout; try/finally ensures the collection, virtual machine, and vhdx are removed.

collection_snapshot.title: 创建虚拟机集合级快照
notes: Msvm_CollectionSnapshotService.CreateSnapshot(Collection REF IN, SnapshotSettings string IN, SnapshotType uint16 IN, ResultingSnapshotCollection REF IN/OUT, Job REF OUT)。SnapshotType 枚举: 1=Standard Snapshot, 2=Recovery Snapshot。DestroySnapshot(AffectedSnapshotCollection REF) OUT Job。

该功能需要处于活动状态(运行或已保存)的集群/备份组成员。集合级快照产生的是组崩溃一致(group crash-consistent)快照，Msvm_VirtualSystemCollection 属于 Hyper-V Replica 与备份组基础设施(属性含 ReplicationState / ReplicationMode / GroupCrashConsistent / LastApplyVirtualMachineIds)。对没有操作系统、始终停机的测试虚拟机无法生成: 无论集合 Type(0/1)、SnapshotType(1/2)、成员虚拟机是否挂载 VHDX，CreateSnapshot 一律直接返回 rv=32770(厂商特定 Failed)，不产生异步 Job，也无 Msvm_Error 对象可读。同源用例 collection_refpoint 亦属此类。
不存在 Msvm_CollectionSnapshotSettingData 类，SnapshotSettings 传空串即可。ResultingSnapshotCollection 虽为 IN/OUT REF，用 GetMethodParameters/InvokeMethod 或直接位置调用传 $null 均可，成功时结果应为 Msvm_SnapshotCollection 引用。
集合的创建、添加成员与清理链路本身可用(DefineCollection Type0 -> AddMember -> RemoveMember -> DestroyCollection)，各步返回 rv=0/4096 正常，仅 CreateSnapshot 因主机与来宾状态限制失败。因此记录为 UNSUPPORTED。
全程仅操作以 WMITEST_ 命名的对象；清理在 try/finally 中依次删除集合快照(若有)、各虚拟机快照兜底、RemoveMember、DestroyCollection、DestroySystem 与 vhdx，运行前后均确认无残留。
collection_snapshot.title_en: Create a Collection-Level Snapshot of Virtual Machines
notes_en: Msvm_CollectionSnapshotService.CreateSnapshot(Collection REF IN, SnapshotSettings string IN, SnapshotType uint16 IN, ResultingSnapshotCollection REF IN/OUT, Job REF OUT). SnapshotType enumeration: 1=Standard Snapshot, 2=Recovery Snapshot. DestroySnapshot(AffectedSnapshotCollection REF) OUT Job.

This feature requires cluster / backup group members that are in an active state (running or saved). A collection-level snapshot produces a group crash-consistent snapshot, and Msvm_VirtualSystemCollection belongs to the Hyper-V Replica and backup group infrastructure (with properties including ReplicationState / ReplicationMode / GroupCrashConsistent / LastApplyVirtualMachineIds). It cannot be produced for test virtual machines that have no operating system and remain stopped: regardless of the collection Type (0/1), SnapshotType (1/2), or whether the member virtual machine has a VHDX attached, CreateSnapshot always returns rv=32770 directly (vendor-specific Failed), producing no asynchronous Job and no readable Msvm_Error object. The related case collection_refpoint falls into the same category.

There is no Msvm_CollectionSnapshotSettingData class, so an empty string can be passed for SnapshotSettings. Although ResultingSnapshotCollection is an IN/OUT REF, passing $null works whether via GetMethodParameters/InvokeMethod or a direct positional call; on success the result should be an Msvm_SnapshotCollection reference.

Collection creation, member addition, and the cleanup chain themselves work (DefineCollection Type0 -> AddMember -> RemoveMember -> DestroyCollection), with each step returning rv=0/4096 normally; only CreateSnapshot fails due to host and guest state constraints. It is therefore recorded as UNSUPPORTED.

Only objects named with WMITEST_ are operated on throughout; cleanup in try/finally removes, in order, the collection snapshot (if any), a fallback pass over per-VM snapshots, RemoveMember, DestroyCollection, DestroySystem, and the vhdx, with no residue confirmed before and after the run.

container_image.title: 探测容器镜像管理服务类的可用性
container_image.code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
# Msvm_ContainerImageManagementService: Windows Server Containers 镜像仓库管理服务
# 该类仅存在于 build 10586；在后续版本中已被移除，26100 上不再提供。
$classes = @(
  'Msvm_ContainerImageManagementService',
  'Msvm_ContainerImage',
  'Msvm_ContainerImageManagementServiceSettingData',
  'Msvm_ContainerImageExportSettingData',
  'Msvm_ContainerImageImportSettingData'
)
foreach ($cls in $classes) {
  $exists = $false; $methods = @()
  try {
    $c = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -List -Class $cls -ErrorAction Stop
    if ($c) { $exists = $true; $methods = @($c.Methods | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }) }
  } catch { $exists = $false }
  Write-Output ("CLASS $cls Exists=$exists Methods=" + ($methods -join ','))
}
# 服务方法签名（build 10586）供参考:
#   DefineContainerImage(ContainerImageSettings string, ReferenceConfiguration ref CIM_VirtualSystemSettingData) -> ResultingContainerImage ref, Job ref
#   ImportContainerImage(ContainerImageToImport string, ImportSettings string) -> ResultingContainerImage ref, Job ref
#   ExportContainerImage(ExportedFile string, ContainerImageToExport ref, ExportSettings string) -> Job ref
#   ValidateContainerImage(ContainerImageToValidate ref Msvm_ContainerImage) -> Job ref
#   DestroyContainerImage(AffectedContainerImage ref) -> Job ref
#   ModifyServiceSettings(SettingData string) -> Job ref
# Msvm_ContainerImage 键属性: Publisher/Name/Version (string, Key), IsOSImage (bool)
# Msvm_ContainerImageManagementServiceSettingData: DefaultRepository (string)
# 返回码 ValueMap: 0,4096,32768..32778
notes: 该功能需要 build 10586 环境：Msvm_ContainerImageManagementService 及全部 Msvm_ContainerImage* 类仅在该版本提供，此后被移除，在较新的 root\virtualization\v2 命名空间下不存在。
该系列类是 Windows Server 2016 早期技术预览 (build 10586) 提供的 WMI 版 Windows Server Containers 镜像仓库接口，first_seen 与 last_seen 均为 10586。
现代 Windows 容器不再经由 v2 命名空间的 WMI 管理，改由 HCS (Host Compute Service, computestorage/computecore API) 及 docker/containerd 处理，因此 root\virtualization\v2 下不再暴露容器镜像相关类。

服务方法签名（DefineContainerImage / ImportContainerImage / ExportContainerImage / ValidateContainerImage / DestroyContainerImage / ModifyServiceSettings）已记录于 code 字段供参考，OUT 参数均含 Job (CIM_ConcreteJob ref)，返回 4096 时须轮询 Job 直至完成。
本示例为纯读探测操作，不创建任何虚拟机或镜像，无需清理。
container_image.title_en: Probe the Availability of the Container Image Management Service Class
notes_en: This capability requires a build 10586 environment: Msvm_ContainerImageManagementService and all Msvm_ContainerImage* classes are provided only in that version, were subsequently removed, and do not exist under the newer root\virtualization\v2 namespace.

This family of classes is the WMI-based Windows Server Containers image repository interface provided by the early Windows Server 2016 technical preview (build 10586); both first_seen and last_seen are 10586.

Modern Windows containers are no longer managed through WMI in the v2 namespace, and are instead handled by HCS (Host Compute Service, the computestorage/computecore API) and docker/containerd, so container image related classes are no longer exposed under root\virtualization\v2.

The service method signatures (DefineContainerImage / ImportContainerImage / ExportContainerImage / ValidateContainerImage / DestroyContainerImage / ModifyServiceSettings) are recorded in the code field for reference; each has an OUT Job parameter (CIM_ConcreteJob ref), and when 4096 is returned the Job must be polled until it completes.
This example is a pure read probe operation; it creates no virtual machine or image and requires no cleanup.
container_image.code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
# Msvm_ContainerImageManagementService: the Windows Server Containers image repository management service
# This class exists only in build 10586; it was removed in later versions and is no longer provided on 26100.
$classes = @(
  'Msvm_ContainerImageManagementService',
  'Msvm_ContainerImage',
  'Msvm_ContainerImageManagementServiceSettingData',
  'Msvm_ContainerImageExportSettingData',
  'Msvm_ContainerImageImportSettingData'
)
foreach ($cls in $classes) {
  $exists = $false; $methods = @()
  try {
    $c = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -List -Class $cls -ErrorAction Stop
    if ($c) { $exists = $true; $methods = @($c.Methods | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }) }
  } catch { $exists = $false }
  Write-Output ("CLASS $cls Exists=$exists Methods=" + ($methods -join ','))
}
# Service method signatures (build 10586) for reference:
#   DefineContainerImage(ContainerImageSettings string, ReferenceConfiguration ref CIM_VirtualSystemSettingData) -> ResultingContainerImage ref, Job ref
#   ImportContainerImage(ContainerImageToImport string, ImportSettings string) -> ResultingContainerImage ref, Job ref
#   ExportContainerImage(ExportedFile string, ContainerImageToExport ref, ExportSettings string) -> Job ref
#   ValidateContainerImage(ContainerImageToValidate ref Msvm_ContainerImage) -> Job ref
#   DestroyContainerImage(AffectedContainerImage ref) -> Job ref
#   ModifyServiceSettings(SettingData string) -> Job ref
# Msvm_ContainerImage key properties: Publisher/Name/Version (string, Key), IsOSImage (bool)
# Msvm_ContainerImageManagementServiceSettingData: DefaultRepository (string)
# Return code ValueMap: 0,4096,32768..32778

fibre_channel.title: 为虚拟机添加合成光纤通道适配器 (虚拟 HBA)
notes: 该操作需要主机具备物理 NPIV-capable 光纤通道 HBA 作为后端。当主机无此硬件时 (Msvm_ExternalFcPort 枚举为空)，合成 FC 适配器 (虚拟 HBA) 无法添加，故此配方标记为 UNSUPPORTED。

完整流程为两步：① 从 AllocationCapabilities 取默认 Msvm_SyntheticFcPortSettingData 端口模板，修改 WWN (VirtualPortWWNN/WWPN/Secondary*) 后 AddResourceSettings；② 取默认 FC 连接模板 (Msvm_FibreChannelPortAllocationSettingData)，设 Parent=新端口路径、PoolId/HostResource 指向目标虚拟 SAN，再 AddResourceSettings。SanName 为必填项。本配方仅演示第一步 (添加合成 FC 端口)。
当主机配置了基于虚拟化的安全 (VBS) 时，设备无法落地会次生返回 AddResourceSettings 转入 Job 后 JobState=10 (Exception)、ErrorCode=32773，错误文案为‘在未配置 VirtualizationBasedSecurityOptOut 的情况下无法修改属性’。此为表象，根本原因仍是缺少 FC 硬件。
WWNN/WWPN 在 Msvm_SyntheticFcPortSettingData 实例对象上为只读，但可在嵌入实例模板 (GetText(1)) 中赋值，再经 AddResourceSettings 下发生效。
即便端口配置添加成功，若无 NPIV-capable 物理 HBA，虚拟 HBA 也无法连接到任何真实 SAN。
fibre_channel.title_en: Add a Synthetic Fibre Channel Adapter (Virtual HBA) to a Virtual Machine
notes_en: This operation requires the host to have a physical NPIV-capable Fibre Channel HBA as the backend. When the host lacks such hardware (Msvm_ExternalFcPort enumerates empty), a synthetic FC adapter (virtual HBA) cannot be added, so this recipe is marked UNSUPPORTED.

The complete flow has two steps: (1) obtain the default Msvm_SyntheticFcPortSettingData port template from AllocationCapabilities, modify the WWNs (VirtualPortWWNN/WWPN/Secondary*), then AddResourceSettings; (2) obtain the default FC connection template (Msvm_FibreChannelPortAllocationSettingData), set Parent=the new port path and PoolId/HostResource pointing to the target virtual SAN, then AddResourceSettings. SanName is a required field. This recipe demonstrates only the first step (adding the synthetic FC port).

When the host is configured with virtualization-based security (VBS), the failure to instantiate the device produces a secondary result: after AddResourceSettings transitions to a job, JobState=10 (Exception) and ErrorCode=32773, with the error text 'the property cannot be modified without VirtualizationBasedSecurityOptOut configured'. This is a surface symptom; the root cause remains the absence of FC hardware.
WWNN/WWPN are read-only on the Msvm_SyntheticFcPortSettingData instance object, but can be assigned in the embedded instance template (GetText(1)) and take effect through AddResourceSettings.
Even if the port configuration is added successfully, without an NPIV-capable physical HBA the virtual HBA cannot connect to any real SAN.

graceful_shutdown.title: 经集成组件优雅关机/重启/休眠
notes: 优雅关机经关机集成组件 Msvm_ShutdownComponent(子设备类，superclass=CIM_LogicalDevice)完成，区别于 Msvm_ComputerSystem.RequestStateChange 的强制关机/停止。
当虚拟机处于关机态(EnabledState=3)时，Msvm_ShutdownComponent 不存在实例——vm.GetRelated('Msvm_ShutdownComponent') 返回空，直接 WQL 查询亦无结果。因此空闲或未运行的虚拟机无法调用 InitiateShutdown，本条目标记为 UNSUPPORTED：需来宾 OS 运行且启用关机集成服务，该组件才会出现。

方法签名：InitiateShutdown(Force boolean, Reason string) -> uint32；InitiateReboot(Force boolean, Reason string) -> uint32(自 build 10240 起提供)；InitiateHibernate() 无参数 -> uint32(自 build 17763 起提供)。三者均无 Job OUT 参数，为同步返回码，rc=0 表示成功，非 0 为错误(ValueMap 含 32768..32782 厂商错误码)。
正确用法：先让虚拟机安装来宾 OS 并启用关机集成服务且处于运行态，再经 $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_ShutdownComponent') 获取组件对象调用。这区别于 RequestStateChange(3=Disabled)的强制断电。
脚本注意：[wmiclass] 路径中用 ${ns} 括起命名空间变量，避免 $ns: 被解析为 PowerShell 驱动器；GetText(1) 序列化嵌入实例；DefineSystem 的 OUT 为 ResultingSystem，返回值可能为 4096，须 Wait-Job2 等待作业完成。
graceful_shutdown.title_en: Graceful shutdown/reboot/hibernate via the integration components
notes_en: Graceful shutdown is performed via the shutdown integration component Msvm_ShutdownComponent (a child device class, superclass=CIM_LogicalDevice), as distinct from the forced shutdown/stop of Msvm_ComputerSystem.RequestStateChange.

When the virtual machine is in the powered-off state (EnabledState=3), no Msvm_ShutdownComponent instance exists -- vm.GetRelated('Msvm_ShutdownComponent') returns empty, and a direct WQL query also yields no result. An idle or non-running virtual machine therefore cannot call InitiateShutdown, and this entry is marked UNSUPPORTED: the guest OS must be running with the shutdown integration service enabled for the component to appear.

Method signatures: InitiateShutdown(Force boolean, Reason string) -> uint32; InitiateReboot(Force boolean, Reason string) -> uint32 (available since build 10240); InitiateHibernate() with no parameters -> uint32 (available since build 17763). None of the three has a Job OUT parameter; they return synchronous return codes, where rc=0 indicates success and non-zero is an error (the ValueMap includes vendor error codes 32768..32782).

Correct usage: first have the virtual machine install a guest OS with the shutdown integration service enabled and in the running state, then obtain the component object via $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_ShutdownComponent') to make the call. This is distinct from the forced power-off of RequestStateChange(3=Disabled).

Scripting notes: in the [wmiclass] path, enclose the namespace variable with ${ns} to prevent $ns: from being parsed as a PowerShell drive; GetText(1) serializes the embedded instance; the OUT of DefineSystem is ResultingSystem, whose return value may be 4096, requiring Wait-Job2 to wait for the job to complete.

migration_check.title: 校验虚拟机是否可迁移至目标主机
notes: 本示例需要启用实时迁移的环境。当 EnableVirtualSystemMigration=False 时，Msvm_VirtualSystemMigrationService 的活动实例仅暴露 1 个方法(RequestStateChange)；CheckVirtualSystemIsMigratableToHost 等迁移方法虽在类定义(Get-WmiObject -List)中存在，但活动实例的提供程序未实现，调用会抛出 '此方法未与任何管理实现'(provider method-not-implemented)。
前置条件：通过 Enable-VMMigration 或 ModifyServiceSettings 将 EnableVirtualSystemMigration 置为 True，并配置迁移网络(Msvm_VirtualSystemMigrationNetworkSettingData)后，该方法方可调用。

方法签名：CheckVirtualSystemIsMigratableToHost(ComputerSystem REF, DestinationHost string, MigrationSettingData string=Msvm_VirtualSystemMigrationSettingData 嵌入实例, NewSystemSettingData string, NewResourceSettingData string[], OUT IsMigratable boolean)；返回 uint32：0=检查已执行(参见 OUT IsMigratable)、1=不支持、2=失败、3=超时、4=参数无效、5=状态无效、6=参数不兼容。
MigrationSettingData.MigrationType：2=实时迁移、3=暂停迁移、4=停机迁移。DestinationHost 接受的格式由关联的 CIM_VirtualSystemMigrationCapabilities.DestinationHostFormatsSupported 决定。
迁移方法未被 PowerShell 动态包装到实例上，必须使用 Invoke-WmiMethod -Path $migSvc.__PATH -Name ... 直连提供程序调用；在实例上直接调用会因方法缺失而报 '不能对 Null 值表达式调用方法'。
migration_check.title_en: Check Whether a Virtual Machine Is Migratable to a Destination Host
notes_en: This example requires an environment with live migration enabled. When EnableVirtualSystemMigration=False, the live instance of Msvm_VirtualSystemMigrationService exposes only 1 method (RequestStateChange); migration methods such as CheckVirtualSystemIsMigratableToHost exist in the class definition (Get-WmiObject -List) but are not implemented by the live instance's provider, and invoking them raises 'This method is not associated with any management implementation' (provider method-not-implemented).

Precondition: after setting EnableVirtualSystemMigration to True via Enable-VMMigration or ModifyServiceSettings and configuring the migration networks (Msvm_VirtualSystemMigrationNetworkSettingData), the method can be invoked.

Method signature: CheckVirtualSystemIsMigratableToHost(ComputerSystem REF, DestinationHost string, MigrationSettingData string = Msvm_VirtualSystemMigrationSettingData embedded instance, NewSystemSettingData string, NewResourceSettingData string[], OUT IsMigratable boolean); returns uint32: 0=check performed (see OUT IsMigratable), 1=not supported, 2=failed, 3=timeout, 4=invalid parameter, 5=invalid state, 6=incompatible parameters.

MigrationSettingData.MigrationType: 2=live migration, 3=paused migration, 4=offline (stopped) migration. The formats accepted for DestinationHost are determined by the associated CIM_VirtualSystemMigrationCapabilities.DestinationHostFormatsSupported.

The migration methods are not dynamically wrapped onto the instance by PowerShell; they must be invoked by connecting directly to the provider with Invoke-WmiMethod -Path $migSvc.__PATH -Name ...; calling them directly on the instance fails with 'You cannot call a method on a null-valued expression' because the method is absent.

nic_sriov_offload.title: 配置虚拟网卡硬件卸载 (SR-IOV/VMQ/IPsec)
notes: 需要具备 SR-IOV(VT-d/IOMMU) 的物理网卡及以 New-VMSwitch -EnableIov $true 创建的交换机。在不具备 SR-IOV 的主机上，AddFeatureSettings 下发 Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortOffloadSettingData 返回 rv=4096，异步 Job 以 JobState=10(Exception)、ErrorCode=32773、HRESULT 0x80070032(ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED) 结束。Get-VMSwitch 报告 IovSupport=False。

WMI 写入路径与 net_bandwidth 相同：构建网卡(克隆 \Default SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData) -> 连接(EthernetPortAllocationSettingData -> 交换机) -> Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService(vsms).AddFeatureSettings(AffectedConfiguration=连接引用, FeatureSettings[]=Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortOffloadSettingData.GetText(1))。此为 Set-VMNetworkAdapter -IovWeight/-VmqWeight 所用路径。虚拟机端口功能不应使用 Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService。

卸载属性含义(Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortOffloadSettingData，均为 uint32)：IOVOffloadWeight(默认 0；>0 启用 SR-IOV，相对权重)、VMQOffloadWeight(默认 100；0 禁用 VMQ)、IPSecOffloadLimit(默认 512；IPsec SA 卸载槽位上限)、IOVQueuePairsRequested(默认 1)、IOVInterruptModeration(0=Default/1=Adaptive/2=Off/100=Low/200=Medium/300=High)、PacketDirectNumProcs/PacketDirectModerationCount/Interval(Packet Direct)。
该失败并非仅针对 SR-IOV：IOVOffloadWeight=0 但仅修改 VMQ/IPsec 值的功能同样以 JobState=10/ErrorCode=32773 失败。当交换机后端网卡不支持 SR-IOV 时，整个卸载功能类无法经 WMI 应用到端口。
运行后无残留 WMITEST_nic_sriov_offload。
控制台的中文错误文本可能显示为 GBK 乱码；解码后的 HRESULT 0x80070032 = ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED 为权威判定依据。
nic_sriov_offload.title_en: Configure Virtual Network Adapter Hardware Offload (SR-IOV/VMQ/IPsec)
notes_en: Requires a physical network adapter with SR-IOV (VT-d/IOMMU) and a switch created with New-VMSwitch -EnableIov $true. On a host without SR-IOV, applying Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortOffloadSettingData via AddFeatureSettings returns rv=4096, and the asynchronous Job ends with JobState=10 (Exception), ErrorCode=32773, HRESULT 0x80070032 (ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED). Get-VMSwitch reports IovSupport=False.

The WMI write path is identical to net_bandwidth: build the adapter (clone the \Default SyntheticEthernetPortSettingData) -> connect it (EthernetPortAllocationSettingData -> switch) -> Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService (vsms).AddFeatureSettings(AffectedConfiguration=connection reference, FeatureSettings[]=Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortOffloadSettingData.GetText(1)). This is the path used by Set-VMNetworkAdapter -IovWeight/-VmqWeight. Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitchManagementService should not be used for VM port features.

Offload property meanings (Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortOffloadSettingData, all uint32): IOVOffloadWeight (default 0; >0 enables SR-IOV, a relative weight), VMQOffloadWeight (default 100; 0 disables VMQ), IPSecOffloadLimit (default 512; upper limit of IPsec SA offload slots), IOVQueuePairsRequested (default 1), IOVInterruptModeration (0=Default/1=Adaptive/2=Off/100=Low/200=Medium/300=High), PacketDirectNumProcs/PacketDirectModerationCount/Interval (Packet Direct).

This failure is not specific to SR-IOV: a feature with IOVOffloadWeight=0 that modifies only the VMQ/IPsec values likewise fails with JobState=10/ErrorCode=32773. When the switch's backing adapter does not support SR-IOV, the entire offload feature class cannot be applied to the port via WMI.
No residual WMITEST_nic_sriov_offload remains after the run.
The Chinese error text in the console may appear as GBK mojibake; the decoded HRESULT 0x80070032 = ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED is the authoritative basis for the determination.

remotefx_3d.title: 添加 RemoteFX 3D 显示控制器(旧机制)
notes: 该特性需要主机具备 RemoteFX 物理 GPU 池(Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor);缺少该硬件时无法添加 RemoteFX 3D 显示控制器。此时 AddResourceSettings 返回 4096(Job),Job 终态 JobState=10(Exception),ErrorCode=32773(资源添加被拒),读回控制器数为 0。
RemoteFX vGPU 自 Windows Server 2019 / Windows 10 1809 起已弃用并默认禁用(出于安全考虑)。现代 GPU 虚拟化应改用 GPU 分区(GPU-P,Msvm_PartitionableGpu)或 DDA 直通。

类 Msvm_Synthetic3DDisplayControllerSettingData 仍存在于 WMI schema 中,可 CreateInstance,但会被 VMMS 在运行时拒绝。关键字段: ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic 3D Display Controller'、MaximumMonitors、MaximumScreenResolution、VRAMSizeBytes。
CreateInstance 后 ResourceSubType 与 ResourceType 为空,需显式赋值 ResourceSubType;即便正确赋值,在缺少 RemoteFX GPU 的主机上失败模式不变(ErrorCode=32773)。
通用排错方式: 写操作返回 4096 时用 Wait-Job2 获取 JobState;终态为 10 时,通过 [wmi]$ra.Job 读取 ErrorCode 与 ErrorDescription 定位原因。ErrorCode=32773 表示 'cannot add resource',即该资源类型在当前主机或该虚拟机上不被允许。
remotefx_3d.title_en: Add a RemoteFX 3D Display Controller (Legacy Mechanism)
notes_en: This feature requires the host to have a RemoteFX physical GPU pool (Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor); without that hardware, a RemoteFX 3D display controller cannot be added. In this case AddResourceSettings returns 4096 (Job), the Job reaches a terminal JobState=10 (Exception) with ErrorCode=32773 (resource addition rejected), and the read-back controller count is 0.

RemoteFX vGPU has been deprecated and disabled by default since Windows Server 2019 / Windows 10 1809 (for security reasons). Modern GPU virtualization should use GPU partitioning (GPU-P, Msvm_PartitionableGpu) or DDA passthrough instead.

The class Msvm_Synthetic3DDisplayControllerSettingData still exists in the WMI schema and can be created with CreateInstance, but it is rejected by VMMS at run time. Key fields: ResourceSubType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic 3D Display Controller', MaximumMonitors, MaximumScreenResolution, VRAMSizeBytes.

After CreateInstance, ResourceSubType and ResourceType are empty, so ResourceSubType must be assigned explicitly; even with a correct assignment, the failure mode does not change on a host lacking a RemoteFX GPU (ErrorCode=32773).

General troubleshooting approach: when a write operation returns 4096, use Wait-Job2 to obtain the JobState; if the terminal state is 10, read ErrorCode and ErrorDescription through [wmi]$ra.Job to identify the cause. ErrorCode=32773 means 'cannot add resource', i.e., the resource type is not permitted on the current host or on that virtual machine.

resource_pool_child.title: 创建子资源池
resource_pool_child.code:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$rpcs   = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService
$rpcsCl = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService -List

# CreateChildResourcePool / DeleteResourcePool 在 MOF 中定义于基类 CIM_ResourcePoolConfigurationService,
# 但 Hyper-V 的 Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService provider 未将其实现为可调用方法。
# provider 仅暴露 CreatePool / DeletePool / ModifyPoolResources / ModifyPoolSettings。
$names = @($rpcsCl.Methods | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })
'LIVE methods: ' + ($names -join ', ')
$hasChild = $names -contains 'CreateChildResourcePool'

# 直接调用 CreateChildResourcePool 会抛出异常(方法无实现, HRESULT 0x80131501):
try { $rpcs.GetMethodParameters('CreateChildResourcePool') }
catch { 'INVOKE ERROR (expected): ' + $_.Exception.GetType().FullName }

# === 可用的等价写法 = CreatePool ===
# CreatePool(PoolSettings string, ParentPools REF[], AllocationSettings string[]) -> OUT Pool, Job
$poolId = 'WMITEST_resource_pool_child'
$parent = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object {
  $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 -and $_.ResourceSubType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
} | Select-Object -First 1

$rpsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData").CreateInstance()
$rpsd.PoolID = $poolId; $rpsd.ResourceType = [uint16]4; $rpsd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'

# AllocationSettings 中 RASD 的 PoolID 必须等于新子池名, 各配额均填 0 (子池按需从父池取用)
$masd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_MemorySettingData").CreateInstance()
$masd.PoolID = $poolId; $masd.ResourceType = [uint16]4; $masd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
$masd.Reservation=[uint64]0; $masd.Limit=[uint64]0; $masd.VirtualQuantity=[uint64]0; $masd.Weight=[uint32]0

$r = $rpcs.CreatePool($rpsd.GetText(1), @($parent.__PATH), @($masd.GetText(1)))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }

# 读回校验
$child = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object { $_.PoolId -eq $poolId } | Select-Object -First 1
$child | Format-List PoolId, ResourceType, Primordial, InstanceID

# 删除子池: DeletePool(Pool REF) (DeleteResourcePool 同样未实现)
$rd = $rpcs.DeletePool($child.__PATH)
if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }
notes: Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService 实际仅暴露七个方法:RequestStateChange / StartService / StopService / CreatePool / ModifyPoolResources / ModifyPoolSettings / DeletePool。不包含 CreateChildResourcePool 与 DeleteResourcePool。

CreateChildResourcePool / DeleteResourcePool 是 DMTF 基类 CIM_ResourcePoolConfigurationService 定义的标准方法,但 Hyper-V provider 未将其实现为可调用的 WMI 方法。直接调用 GetMethodParameters 或 InvokeMethod 会抛出 MethodInvocationException(HRESULT 0x80131501,方法无实现)。这是 MOF 声明与实际实现脱节的典型情形。
因此以 CreateChildResourcePool 创建子池的操作判定为 UNSUPPORTED。

创建子资源池的可用方法为 CreatePool(参见 resource_pool_create 配方),删除对应 DeletePool。CreatePool 接受三个入参:PoolSettings(Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData 内嵌串)、ParentPools(REF[])、AllocationSettings(对应资源 RASD 内嵌串数组)。内存子池场景同步返回 0,无需轮询 Job。
AllocationSettings 中 RASD 的 PoolID 必须等于新子池名,且 Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight 均为 0,否则 Job 失败(ErrorCode=32773)。DeletePool 要求子池无未结分配:空子池返回 0,占用中返回 32774。
父池取 primordial(原始)根池:Get-WmiObject Msvm_ResourcePool | ?{ $_.Primordial -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 }。资源类型取值:内存 4 / 处理器 3 / 以太网 10 / VHD 31 / GPU 分区 32770。
notes_en: Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService exposes only seven methods: RequestStateChange / StartService / StopService / CreatePool / ModifyPoolResources / ModifyPoolSettings / DeletePool. It does not include CreateChildResourcePool or DeleteResourcePool.

CreateChildResourcePool / DeleteResourcePool are standard methods defined on the DMTF base class CIM_ResourcePoolConfigurationService, but the Hyper-V provider does not implement them as invocable WMI methods. Calling GetMethodParameters or InvokeMethod directly throws a MethodInvocationException (HRESULT 0x80131501, method has no implementation). This is a typical case of a MOF declaration being decoupled from the actual implementation.
Consequently, creating a child pool via CreateChildResourcePool is classified as UNSUPPORTED.

The available method for creating a child resource pool is CreatePool (see the resource_pool_create recipe), with DeletePool as its counterpart for deletion. CreatePool takes three input parameters: PoolSettings (an embedded Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData instance string), ParentPools (REF[]), and AllocationSettings (an array of embedded RASD strings for the corresponding resource). For the memory child pool scenario it returns 0 synchronously, with no need to poll the Job.

In AllocationSettings, the PoolID of the RASD must equal the name of the new child pool, and Reservation/Limit/VirtualQuantity/Weight must all be 0; otherwise the Job fails (ErrorCode=32773). DeletePool requires the child pool to have no outstanding allocations: an empty child pool returns 0, while one still in use returns 32774.

Take the parent pool as the primordial root pool: Get-WmiObject Msvm_ResourcePool | ?{ $_.Primordial -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 }. ResourceType values: memory 4 / processor 3 / Ethernet 10 / VHD 31 / GPU partition 32770.
resource_pool_child.code_en:
$ns = 'root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$rpcs   = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService
$rpcsCl = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService -List

# CreateChildResourcePool / DeleteResourcePool are defined in the MOF on the base class CIM_ResourcePoolConfigurationService,
# but the Hyper-V Msvm_ResourcePoolConfigurationService provider does not implement them as invocable methods.
# The provider only exposes CreatePool / DeletePool / ModifyPoolResources / ModifyPoolSettings.
$names = @($rpcsCl.Methods | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })
'LIVE methods: ' + ($names -join ', ')
$hasChild = $names -contains 'CreateChildResourcePool'

# Calling CreateChildResourcePool directly throws an exception (method has no implementation, HRESULT 0x80131501):
try { $rpcs.GetMethodParameters('CreateChildResourcePool') }
catch { 'INVOKE ERROR (expected): ' + $_.Exception.GetType().FullName }

# === Available equivalent = CreatePool ===
# CreatePool(PoolSettings string, ParentPools REF[], AllocationSettings string[]) -> OUT Pool, Job
$poolId = 'WMITEST_resource_pool_child'
$parent = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object {
  $_.Primordial -eq $true -and $_.ResourceType -eq 4 -and $_.ResourceSubType -eq 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
} | Select-Object -First 1

$rpsd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_ResourcePoolSettingData").CreateInstance()
$rpsd.PoolID = $poolId; $rpsd.ResourceType = [uint16]4; $rpsd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'

# In AllocationSettings, the RASD's PoolID must equal the new child pool name, and every quota is set to 0 (the child pool draws from the parent pool on demand)
$masd = ([wmiclass]"\\.\$($ns):Msvm_MemorySettingData").CreateInstance()
$masd.PoolID = $poolId; $masd.ResourceType = [uint16]4; $masd.ResourceSubType = 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Memory'
$masd.Reservation=[uint64]0; $masd.Limit=[uint64]0; $masd.VirtualQuantity=[uint64]0; $masd.Weight=[uint32]0

$r = $rpcs.CreatePool($rpsd.GetText(1), @($parent.__PATH), @($masd.GetText(1)))
if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $r.Job | Out-Null }

# Read back and verify
$child = Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_ResourcePool | Where-Object { $_.PoolId -eq $poolId } | Select-Object -First 1
$child | Format-List PoolId, ResourceType, Primordial, InstanceID

# Delete the child pool: DeletePool(Pool REF) (DeleteResourcePool is likewise not implemented)
$rd = $rpcs.DeletePool($child.__PATH)
if($rd.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ Wait-Job2 $rd.Job | Out-Null }

shared_vhd.title: 配置共享 VHDX 与 SCSI-3 持久预留
notes: 共享 VHDX 与 SCSI-3 持久预留需要故障转移群集的群集共享卷（CSV）、共享 SAS 存储或横向扩展文件服务器（SOFS）承载 .vhds 文件。独立（非群集）Hyper-V 主机上的本地 NTFS 卷不满足该硬件/环境要求，AddResourceSettings 会以 JobState=10、ErrorCode=32768（存储不支持虚拟硬盘共享）或 32770（不是可共享的 VHD 文件）失败，故状态判定为 UNSUPPORTED。
WMI 写法：在 Msvm_StorageAllocationSettingData 上设置 PersistentReservationsSupported=$true（共享盘/持久预留开关），其余与普通挂盘一致（Parent=磁盘驱动器路径，HostResource=@(盘路径)）。该属性在类定义中标为 Read 限定符，但实例上可写。

共享盘必须使用 VHD Set（.vhds），不能使用普通 .vhdx。创建方式：设置 Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData 的 Type=3（Dynamic）+ Format=4（VHDSet），再经 Msvm_ImageManagementService.CreateVirtualHardDisk 创建。Type 枚举仅有 2/3/4（Fixed/Dynamic/Differencing），无独立的 VHDSet 类型，VHD Set 通过 Format=4 区分。
VHD Set 创建时会同时生成 <name>.vhds（元数据）与一个 <guid>.avhdx（数据）文件，清理时两者都需删除。
Type 或 Format 取值非法（如 Type=5/6）时，CreateVirtualHardDisk 直接返回 32773（参数无效），而非以 Job 错误形式返回。
在 Windows Server 2025 中共享 VHDX / VHD Set 仍为受支持特性，上述限制源自缺少群集共享存储环境，而非特性本身缺失。
shared_vhd.title_en: Configuring a Shared VHDX with SCSI-3 Persistent Reservations
notes_en: A shared VHDX with SCSI-3 persistent reservations requires a failover cluster's Cluster Shared Volume (CSV), shared SAS storage, or a Scale-Out File Server (SOFS) to host the .vhds file. A local NTFS volume on a standalone (non-clustered) Hyper-V host does not meet this hardware/environment requirement, and AddResourceSettings fails with JobState=10 and ErrorCode=32768 (the storage does not support virtual hard disk sharing) or 32770 (not a shareable VHD file), so the status is judged UNSUPPORTED.

WMI approach: set PersistentReservationsSupported=$true on Msvm_StorageAllocationSettingData (the shared-disk / persistent-reservation switch); everything else is the same as for an ordinary disk attach (Parent=the disk drive path, HostResource=@(the disk path)). This property is marked with the Read qualifier in the class definition but is writable on the instance.

A shared disk must use a VHD Set (.vhds); an ordinary .vhdx cannot be used. Creation method: set Type=3 (Dynamic) + Format=4 (VHDSet) on Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData, then create it through Msvm_ImageManagementService.CreateVirtualHardDisk. The Type enumeration has only 2/3/4 (Fixed/Dynamic/Differencing) and no separate VHDSet type; a VHD Set is distinguished by Format=4.
Creating a VHD Set produces both a <name>.vhds (metadata) file and a <guid>.avhdx (data) file, and both must be deleted during cleanup.
When Type or Format has an invalid value (e.g. Type=5/6), CreateVirtualHardDisk returns 32773 (invalid parameter) directly, rather than as a job error.

In Windows Server 2025, shared VHDX / VHD Set remains a supported feature; the above limitation stems from the absence of a cluster shared storage environment rather than from any lack of the feature itself.

synth3d_enable.title: 在主机侧启用 RemoteFX GPU 虚拟化
synth3d_enable.code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
# 1) 枚举支持 RemoteFX 的物理 GPU
$phys=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor)
# 2) 定位主机 Synthetic3D 服务(单例)
$svc=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Synthetic3DService
# 3) 在某物理 GPU 上启用 RemoteFX 虚拟化(PhysicalGPU 为 REF; 传 __PATH)
if($phys.Count -gt 0){
  $target=$phys[0]
  $r=$svc.EnableGPUForVirtualization($target.__PATH)   # ret 0=成功, 1=不支持, 4096=异步作业
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $j=[wmi]$r.Job; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -m 200; $j=[wmi]$r.Job} }
  # 回读
  ([wmi]$target.__PATH).EnabledForVirtualization
}
# 停用操作对称: $svc.DisableGPUForVirtualization($target.__PATH)
notes: 该操作需要支持 RemoteFX 的物理 3D GPU。Msvm_Synthetic3DService 类以单例形式存在(Name=synth3d)，但当 Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor 枚举数为 0 时，主机上没有可虚拟化的物理 3D GPU，EnableGPUForVirtualization 无可作用的目标。
RemoteFX vGPU 自 Windows 10 / Server 1809 起弃用，其后的版本已从平台移除。现代 GPU 虚拟化应使用 GPU-P (Msvm_GpuPartitionSettingData) 或 DDA(离散设备分配)。

方法签名：Msvm_Synthetic3DService.EnableGPUForVirtualization([IN,REF]Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor PhysicalGPU, [OUT,REF]CIM_ConcreteJob Job) -> uint32。返回码 0=Completed with No Error，1=Not supported；返回 4096 时需轮询作业。DisableGPUForVirtualization 的参数与返回码对称。该方法自 build 9200 起提供。
PhysicalGPU 为 REF 参数，传入 GPU 实例的 __PATH。GPU 是否已启用虚拟化可读取 Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor.EnabledForVirtualization(只读 Boolean)。
该操作为主机侧操作，与具体虚拟机无关。
synth3d_enable.title_en: Enable RemoteFX GPU Virtualization on the Host Side
notes_en: This operation requires a physical 3D GPU that supports RemoteFX. The Msvm_Synthetic3DService class exists as a singleton (Name=synth3d), but when the Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor enumeration count is 0, the host has no virtualizable physical 3D GPU and EnableGPUForVirtualization has no target to act on.

RemoteFX vGPU has been deprecated since Windows 10 / Server 1809 and was removed from the platform in later versions. Modern GPU virtualization should use GPU-P (Msvm_GpuPartitionSettingData) or DDA (Discrete Device Assignment).

Method signature: Msvm_Synthetic3DService.EnableGPUForVirtualization([IN,REF]Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor PhysicalGPU, [OUT,REF]CIM_ConcreteJob Job) -> uint32. Return codes 0=Completed with No Error, 1=Not supported; when 4096 is returned, the job must be polled. The parameters and return codes of DisableGPUForVirtualization are symmetric. This method has been available since build 9200.

PhysicalGPU is a REF parameter that takes the __PATH of the GPU instance. Whether a GPU has virtualization enabled can be read from Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor.EnabledForVirtualization (a read-only Boolean).
This is a host-side operation and is unrelated to any specific virtual machine.
synth3d_enable.code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
# 1) Enumerate physical GPUs that support RemoteFX
$phys=@(Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Physical3dGraphicsProcessor)
# 2) Locate the host Synthetic3D service (singleton)
$svc=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_Synthetic3DService
# 3) Enable RemoteFX virtualization on a physical GPU (PhysicalGPU is a REF; pass __PATH)
if($phys.Count -gt 0){
  $target=$phys[0]
  $r=$svc.EnableGPUForVirtualization($target.__PATH)   # ret 0=success, 1=not supported, 4096=asynchronous job
  if($r.ReturnValue -eq 4096){ $j=[wmi]$r.Job; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -m 200; $j=[wmi]$r.Job} }
  # Read back
  ([wmi]$target.__PATH).EnabledForVirtualization
}
# The disable operation is symmetric: $svc.DisableGPUForVirtualization($target.__PATH)

thumbnail_screenshot.title: 获取虚拟机缩略图
notes: 方法签名：Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.GetVirtualSystemThumbnailImage(TargetSystem REF, WidthPixels uint16, HeightPixels uint16) -> ImageData uint8[]；返回 uint32 返回码。
TargetSystem 必须传入虚拟机的 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData 的 __PATH（REF CIM_VirtualSystemSettingData），不能传 Msvm_ComputerSystem。可通过 $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') 获取。
图像格式为原始 RGB565，每像素 2 字节，期望字节数 = Width*Height*2（80x60 即 9600）。该方法同步返回，不返回 Job。
返回码映射（ValueMap）：0=成功，4096=Job，32775=Invalid State。缩略图取自运行中的视频帧缓冲，仅当虚拟机处于运行或已保存状态时才返回非空字节。
该操作需要处于运行或已保存状态的虚拟机环境。停止状态（EnabledState=3）的虚拟机调用此方法恒返回 32775（Invalid State）且 ImageData 为空。
thumbnail_screenshot.title_en: Retrieving a Virtual Machine Thumbnail Image
notes_en: Method signature: Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.GetVirtualSystemThumbnailImage(TargetSystem REF, WidthPixels uint16, HeightPixels uint16) -> ImageData uint8[]; returns a uint32 return code.

TargetSystem must be passed the __PATH of the virtual machine's Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData (REF CIM_VirtualSystemSettingData), not Msvm_ComputerSystem. It can be obtained via $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData').
The image format is raw RGB565 at 2 bytes per pixel, so the expected byte count = Width*Height*2 (80x60 yields 9600). This method returns synchronously and does not return a Job.

Return code mapping (ValueMap): 0=success, 4096=Job, 32775=Invalid State. The thumbnail is taken from the running video frame buffer and returns non-empty bytes only when the virtual machine is in the running or saved state.

This operation requires a virtual machine in the running or saved state. Calling this method on a virtual machine in the stopped state (EnabledState=3) always returns 32775 (Invalid State) with empty ImageData.
